rows.translation: 阿舍兰德
阿舍兰德

rows.original:
[flags.ASHE_USE
        |[ashe.wasStored
            |[wayfort.hasFreja
                |"Ah, dear flame. I was wondering when you'd pick me up again."
                
                "You don't sound annoyed."
                
                "Of course not, thankfully I have been able to spend lots of time with your lovely little dragon-baby!" Ashe sounds utterly ecstatic, and she hums in your grasp. "She's such an attentive little darling. You should be proud! How about we go do more deeds and collect some tales, shall we?"
                
                [silly
                    |More like collect tails, heh.
                ]
                |"..." Your mace is surprisingly sulky when you pick her up again.
                
                "Something wrong?" You ask, running a finger along Ashelander's little heart-gem.
                
                "...About time you remembered that I exist. I don't like being left in your box alone, at least have some dragons for me to train."
                
                "Is my mace being huffy?"
                
                "I am not huffy," Ashe huffs.
            ]
            |"Something on your mind, dear flame?" Ashe hums positively in your grasp.
        ] 
        |"Ah! Not so roughly..." A clear voice rings in your head, and you nearly drop the flanged mace. "Hey! Oh— okay that's quite the sensation." The voice is undoubtedly Ashe herself... and with none of the weakness and pain; instead it's crystal clear, full of warmth and pride. "Hmm. I hadn't fully expected this."
        
        "This wasn't your plan?" You ask the mace aloud, [party.som
            |glad that there's nobody watching.
            |catching a queer look from [companion1.name] before you point at said mace. "Ashe is in here and she's talking."
            
            "Tell [companion1.mf
                |him
                |her
            ] I said hello."
            
            "And she says hello?"
            
            [party.comp kiyoko
                |"That's nice honey." Kiyoko resumes brushing her hair with an indulgent smile.
                |[companion.mf
                    |he
                    |she
                ] doesn't appear completely certain, but you get an awkward smile and a nod at least.
            ]
            |getting a funny look from your companions. "Oh, Ashe is in here, and she's talking." 
            
            [party.comp kiyoko
                |"That's nice honey." Kiyoko resumes brushing her hair with an indulgent smile.
                |Your companions share a look and shrug, apparently used to your eccentricities by now.
            ]
        ]
        
        You refocus your attention on the mace — Ashe — and turn her gently over in your hand. "What happened, then?"
        
        If a mace could purse its lips together, this one would. Instead there's a long period of silence before she speaks up again. "I am not certain... I just didn't want to die, and the grasp my being had on my body has been tenuous at best for a very, very long time. Compared to my original form, this magical mace meant just as much — if not more — to me, and is certainly more whole."
        
        "You aren't going to get dizzy if I swing you, are you?" It'd be a shame if your brand new weapon were unuseable; all the screaming would get old incredibly fast.
        
        Your mace laughs, a deep, adoring little laugh. "No, no. I'm alright, in fact I encourage you to use me for all sorts of smiting, and good deeds. Oh! But do try to keep me clean... and I'd like to spend lots of time in the sun."
        
        "Anything else?"
        
        Ashe ponders this for a little while, before eventually speaking up. "I'd like to visit your dreams, if that's okay?"
        
        "You can do that?"
        
        "I could before I was a weapon! It was my specialty, to visit the dreams of mortals and give them guidance. I can't just eat everyone who misbehaves."
    ]
rows.translation:
[flags.ASHE_USE
        |[ashe.wasStored
            |[wayfort.hasFreja
                |啊，亲爱的火焰啊，我一直在想你什么时候会再来接我呢。”

“你听起来一点都不生气呢。”

“当然没有啦，幸好我能够有这么多时间和你那可爱的小龙宝宝一起玩耍！”阿什听起来开心极了，在你的怀抱中欢快地哼着小曲。“它真是太贴心、太可爱了，你应该感到骄傲才对！我们再去完成一些任务、收集一些故事吧，怎么样？
                
                [silly
                    |更像是在收集尾巴，呵呵。
                ]
                |……”当你再次拿起你的战锤时，它竟然显得格外不高兴。

“出了什么问题吗？”你问道，同时用手指轻轻抚摸着阿舍兰德那颗小小的心形宝石。

“……你终于想起我的存在了。我可不喜欢被单独关在你的盒子里，至少应该给我一些龙让我来训练吧。”

“难道我的战锤在生气吗？”

“我并没有生气，”阿舍气呼呼地说。
            ]
            |亲爱的火焰，是不是有什么心事？”阿什在你怀中轻声问道。
        ] 
        |啊！别这么用力……”一个清晰的声音在你脑海中响起，你差点把那把带法兰的钉头锤掉在地上。“嘿！哦——好吧，这种感觉还挺不错的。”这个声音毫无疑问就是艾什本人……而且完全没有丝毫虚弱或痛苦的痕迹，反而十分清晰，充满了温暖与自豪。“嗯，我其实没完全预料到会这样。”

“这本来不是你的计划吧？”你对着那把钉头锤自言自语道。 [party.som
            |幸好没有人在看。
            |被人投以奇怪的目光 [companion1.name] 在你们指着那把长矛之前，先听我说——艾希就在里面，而且她现在正在说话。”

“快告诉他们吧。 [companion1.mf
                |他
                |她
            ] 我打了招呼。”

“然后她也回了招呼？
            
            [party.comp kiyoko
                |真好，亲爱的。”清子带着满足的微笑继续梳着自己的头发。
                |[companion.mf
                    |他
                    |她
                ] 虽然看起来并不十分确定，但至少你会得到一个尴尬的微笑和一声点头。
            ]
            |你的同伴们纷纷向你投来奇怪的目光。“哦，原来艾希在这里，而且还在说话呢。 
            
            [party.comp kiyoko
                |真好，亲爱的。”清子带着满足的微笑继续梳着自己的头发。
                |你的同伴们互相对视了一下，然后耸了耸肩——显然，他们已经习惯你的这些古怪行为了。
            ]
        ]
        
        你将注意力重新集中在那根钉头锤上——也就是艾希——然后轻轻地将它拿在手中转动着。“那么，发生了什么事呢？”

如果这根钉头锤能够抿紧嘴唇的话，它肯定会的。然而，接下来是一段漫长的沉默，直到她再次开口说话。 我不太确定……我只是不想死，而且很长很长时间以来，我的意识对身体的控制力一直都非常微弱。与我的原始形态相比，这把魔法战锤对我来说同样重要——甚至更为重要——它让我感觉更加完整。如果我把你甩来甩去，你应该不会觉得头晕吧？”要是你那崭新的武器因此无法使用，那就太可惜了——毕竟所有的尖叫声很快就会让人听腻的。

你的钉头锤发出了笑声，那是一种深沉而充满爱意的笑声。 不，不。我没事的，事实上，我鼓励你们利用我来做各种有益的事情……哦！不过请尽量保持我的干净……而且我希望能多晒晒太阳。”

“还有别的吗？
        
        阿什思考了一会儿，最终开口说道：“如果可以的话，我想进入你的梦境看看。”

“你真的能做到吗？”

“在我还是一把武器的时候，我就能做到！帮助人类进入梦境并给予他们指引，本来就是我的专长。 我总不能把那些行为不端的人都吃掉吧。
    ]

rows.translation: 积极肯定的话语

rows.original: How does Ashe think you're doing?
rows.translation: 艾什觉得你做得怎么样？
训练

rows.original: Exercise and meditate under Ashelander's tutelage; it's perfect for a night's sleep!
rows.translation: 在阿舍兰德的指导下进行锻炼和冥想，这样对保证一夜好眠非常有帮助！
rows.raw: "Exercise and meditate under Ashelander's tutelage; it's perfect for a night's sleep!"

rows.translation: 你今天已经完成训练了！
性别

rows.original: Have a little fun with Ashelander's weapon form.
rows.translation: 试着使用阿舍兰德的武器形态，享受一下其中的乐趣吧。
rows.raw: "Have a little fun with Ashelander's weapon form."

rows.translation: 返回

rows.original: "It would be my pleasure!" The mace beams at you... or at least gives you the impression of beaming.
rows.translation: “能为您效劳是我的荣幸！”那根钉头锤正朝你射来……至少给你的感觉是这样。
rows.raw: '\n    "It would be my pleasure!" The mace beams at you... or at least gives you the impression of beaming.\n    '

rows.original: [pc.ptcd |If maces could smile... Ashe's voice is clear, warm, and cheerful as she all but [silly |blows you |showers you with praise ]. "Dear flame I am so proud of you; you're a beacon of the good things in life I stand for, and the world will only be better for your involvement." The draconic mace hums gently in your grasp, and you give her a fond flange-rub as she continues. "Mmm... I've sworn it before, I will stand by you, and your children, no matter what, but it gladdens me to see you're being a good bean." |"I think you're doing well, but..." Ashe pauses, humming pensively in a fashion you can actually feel in your palm. "I worry, too, that you indulge too deeply in acts and pleasures, without thought for the aftermath. It's not the done thing, to take advantage and risk your soul in the grasp of demons... [kasyrra.romantic |although I suppose many would risk much and more for love with a queen, demon or not. ]I only plead that you be careful, how about we exercise and meditate for a while?" |Ashelander may not be able to grimace, but you can sense it from the mace all the same. "Dear flame, you scare me sometimes." "Scare you?" "Yes... you're driven in such a way that I cannot see a happy future for you, like a [pc.mf |king |queen ] who has lost their country, or a puppy without love. I wish you would spend some time meditating, or indulging in some of the world's goods beyond simple pleasures of the flesh. You will struggle to face the demons if you become one." She takes some time to consider you, before earnestly promising. "I will always be here for you and your family, however. I will protect your children, and face your foes. I have sworn such, and I will do so gladly." |Ashe spends a long time in silence when you check in on her, and when she speaks up it's with clear sorrow; "Were you anyone but my savior I would scorn you, dear flame. Instead I pity you, and promise to watch over your children so that they might avoid your fate." After another pause she adds, "even if the whole world should turn against you, I won't." ]
rows.translation: [pc.ptcd |如果战锤会微笑的话…… 艾什的声音清晰、温暖而欢快，她几乎是在…… [silly |让你大吃一惊 |对你赞不绝口 ]亲爱的火焰，我…… 所以 我为你感到骄傲；你正是我所推崇的美好品质的象征，有了你的参与，这个世界一定会变得更好。”你手中握着的巨龙之锤轻轻发出嗡鸣声，而她继续说道：“嗯……我之前就说过，无论发生什么，我都会支持你和你的孩子们。不过，看到你如今表现得如此出色，我真的感到非常高兴。 |我觉得你做得还不错，但是……”艾希停顿了一下，若有所思地哼着小曲，那种氛围简直让人能真切地感受到。“我也很担心，你会过于沉溺于那些享乐之中，而完全不考虑后果。利用这些享乐来冒险，甚至让灵魂陷入恶魔的掌控之中……这种做法并不符合正确的道义。 [kasyrra.romantic |我想，为了得到一位女王的爱，即使对方是恶魔，许多人也应该愿意付出巨大的代价。 ]我只恳求你们一定要小心谨慎，我们不妨先锻炼一会儿，再静下心来冥想一会儿，怎么样？ |阿舍兰德或许无法做出鬼脸，但你可以从他的动作中感受到那种情绪。“亲爱的火焰，有时候你真的会让我感到害怕。” “害怕我？” “是的……你的行为方式让我看不到你未来的幸福，就像…… [pc.mf |国王 |女王 ] 那些失去了祖国的人，或是那些没有得到关爱的小狗，都是一样的。我希望你能花些时间去冥想，或者去体验一些超越世俗享乐的东西。如果你也变成了那样的人，那么面对那些内心的恶魔，你将会感到无比艰难。 她仔细考虑了一下，然后郑重地承诺道：“不过，我会永远在你和你的家人身边。我会保护你的孩子，也会与你一起对抗你的敌人。我已经发过誓，而且我会欣然履行这个承诺。 |当你去关心她时，艾什会长时间保持沉默；而当她终于开口说话时，语气中充满了深深的悲伤：“如果你不是我的救星，我一定会鄙视你，亲爱的火焰。然而，我只能同情你，并承诺会守护你的孩子们，让他们能够避免重蹈你的命运。”又过了片刻，她补充道：“即使全世界都与你为敌，我也不会这样做。 ]

rows.translation: 积极肯定的话语

rows.original:
"Ah! Healthy exercise, for a healthy mind. [pc.pregStage 1
        |Not to mention when you're pregnant! You should always be sure to take care of yourself when you carry a precious life.
        |Shall we begin?
    ]"
    
    You rest Ashe gently on the ground with the rest of your gear, and begin with a series of slow stretches at the golden dragon's instructions. [party.som
        |
        |[companion1.name] shrugs, getting up to join you in going through the motions.
        |Your companions shrug, getting up so that they can join you in going through the motions.
    ] After getting yourself loosened up — fuck it feels so good feeling your back click in so many places — you can practically feel your heartbeat from the tips of your fingers to your [pc.hasFeet
        |toes
        |hoofies
    ]. 
    
    Once stretched, you do some squats, forcing yourself to hold time with a metronomic tongue-clicking sound in your head from Ashe. At first the strain is unbearable, but your body follows along without complaint, and soon each challenging intake of breath proves to be sweet relief. "Just open your mind," Ashe sings softly. "Turn, toes, up to the sky..."
    
    You follow her guidance, reaching up towards the sky and straightening out. Your legs tremble for a few moments, before the rush of feel-good chemicals rushing to your brain flood you with relief. [party.som
        |
        |[companion1.name] looks similarly relieved as [companion1.mf
            |he
            |she
        ] straightens out and goes limp again, returning to [companion1.mf
            |his
            |her
        ] seat.
        |Your companions look similarly relieved as they straighten out and go limp again, dabbing brows and wiggling loosened-up limbs before returning to their seats.
    ] 
    
    After the exercise is complete, you sprawl out into a [pc.race] puddle and close your eyes. Guided meditation proves... difficult; she means well, but the golden dragon's deliciously salacious voice rattling around your skull has you feeling horny as opposed to enlightened. It helps, though, you know that. Eventually you're hearing only your own breathing... in, and out, in, and out.
    
    "Oh [pc.name]?" Ashe interrupts you, sounding bashful. "It's been half an hour now, you can stop."
rows.translation:
啊！健康的锻炼，才能带来健康的心态。 [pc.pregStage 1
        |更不用说当你怀孕的时候了！在孕育着一个珍贵的生命时，你一定要时刻照顾好自己。
        |我们开始吧？
    ]你将艾希以及其他装备轻轻放在地上，然后按照金龙的指示，开始进行一系列缓慢的伸展运动。 [party.som
        |
        |[companion1.name] 耸了耸肩，然后起身陪你一起做这些事情。
        |你的同伴们耸了耸肩，然后站起身来，准备和你一起完成这些仪式。
    ] 当你的身体彻底放松下来——天啊，那种全身各个部位都感到无比舒适的感觉真是太棒了——你会发现自己从指尖到脚趾，甚至能感受到自己心脏的跳动。 [pc.hasFeet
        |脚趾
        |蹄子
    ]一旦拉开了肌肉，你就开始做深蹲动作，同时努力在脑海中跟随艾希发出的有节奏的舌击声来控制呼吸的节奏。起初，这种紧张感让人难以忍受，但你的身体会默默地配合你的动作，不久之后，每一次艰难的呼吸都会带来一种甜美的解脱感。 只要敞开你的心灵，”艾希轻声唱道，“抬起你的脚趾，朝向天空……”

你按照她的指引，将双手伸向天空，身体也伸直了。你的双腿颤抖了片刻，但随后，那些让人感到愉悦的化学物质涌入你的大脑，让你感到一阵莫名的轻松。 [party.som
        |
        |[companion1.name] 看起来也同样如释重负 [companion1.mf
            |他
            |她
        ] 重新挺直身体，却又再次变得软弱无力，恢复了原来的状态。 [companion1.mf
            |他的
            |她
        ] 座位。
        |你的同伴们也显得如释重负，他们挺直身子，又放松下来，轻轻擦了擦额头，活动了一下有些僵硬的四肢，然后重新坐回了自己的座位上。
    ]

Sat on the edge of your... of someone's bed — a very large, comfortable bed — is a beautiful woman of pale skin, a soft pink complexion, and beautiful gold and rose-gold locks of hair that hang from elegant curving horns. Jewelry hangs from her in intricate beads of pearls and gold, with sleeves reminiscent of the Ashelander-Mace's haft. She's not facing you, yet, but you can make out twitching ears framed with beautiful scales. When she does turn around, it's enough to take your breath away; a peaceful, comfortable smile. A golden tail slinks out and gently squeezes your leg. "This will take some getting used to... it's not what I usually wear, but very similar to some— something Ivy picked out for me once." [var0] For a moment the golden dragon's expression becomes melancholy, but she washes it away with her hand, as though wiping the look off of her face. "Hah, now is not the time for that. I've had a great many years to unpack... all of this. Instead, I wanted to thank you, again." Ashe's eyes soften again, and her tail squeezes you tightly. "You are as a dear flame to me, as you would be to any dragon who holds you in their heart. Even if the whole world should turn against you, I will always remain. I will look over your children, and your children's children. They will know warmth and love from me, be taught strength and song by me, so that they might protect themselves, and the dreams of others." Ashe rests her hand on her... distractingly buxom chest, and gives you a brilliant smile. "I swear it upon my name, Bringer of Ash, The Fire That Renews The Forest and Scourges Foes." ]
rows.translation: [flags.ASHE_DREAM_EVENT |你在阿什那宽敞的寝室里，躺在这张舒适的大床上醒了过来。那条龙就坐在床边，一边整理着自己的毛发，一边检查着自己的妆容，然后向你露出了灿烂的笑容：“晚上好，亲爱的火焰。”她的声音宛如一首悦耳的歌谣，她的尾巴也伸过来轻轻捏了捏你：“是想要好好睡一觉，还是想要更多呢？ [var0] |你叹了口气，仰面躺下准备睡觉……但是等等，你本来就是想这么做的啊。 只是 你猛地坐直身子，满脸困惑，挠着头，这才意识到自己并不孤单。坐在某人床边——一张非常宽敞、舒适的床——的是一位皮肤白皙、面容如粉的美丽女子，她那金色的长发和玫瑰金色的发丝优雅地垂落在肩头。 她身上悬挂着由珍珠和黄金制成的复杂饰品，她的袖子设计让人联想到阿舍兰德-梅斯武器的柄部。她目前还没有正面朝向你，但你可以看到她那被美丽鳞片环绕的耳朵正在微微动着。 当她…… 做 转过身来，你会被这一幕震撼得屏住呼吸——一个宁静而舒适的微笑，一条金色的尾巴轻轻滑出，轻轻捏了捏你的腿。“这可能需要一些时间来适应……虽然这不是我平时会穿的衣服，但和某些衣服很相似……是艾薇曾经为我挑选过的。 [var0] 有那么一瞬间，那条金龙的表情显得有些忧郁，但她立刻用手将那种情绪拂去，就像是在脸上擦掉了那些痕迹一样。“哈，现在不是想这些的时候。我有太多年的时间来慢慢思考…… 所有这些。相反，我想再次感谢你。”艾什的眼睛再次变得柔和起来，她的尾巴紧紧地缠住了你。“对你来说，我就像一团温暖的火焰；对于任何将你珍藏在心中的龙来说，你也是如此。即使整个世界都与你为敌，我也会永远站在你身边。 我会照顾你的孩子，以及他们的孩子。他们会从我这里感受到温暖与爱，我会教会他们力量与歌唱，这样他们就能保护自己，也能守护他人的梦想。” 艾什将手放在她的肩上。那双迷人的大眼睛，那令人分心的饱满胸部，还有她那灿烂的笑容……“我以我的名字起誓，‘灰烬使者’，那个能够重焕森林生机、惩罚敌人的火焰。 ]
rows.raw: " [flags.ASHE_DREAM_EVENT |You awaken in the comfortable, wide bed in Ashe's vaulted halls. The dragon herself is perched on the bed, adjusting her hair and checking her makeup before giving you a beaming smile. "Good evening, dear flame." Her voice is a sing-song delight, and her tail snakes out to give you a squeeze. "Looking for a good night's sleep, or more?" [var0] |You sigh and sprawl yourself out, lying down to sleep... but wait; that's what you just did. You bolt upright, confused, scratching the back of your head when you realize you're not alone. Sat on the edge of your... of someone's bed — a very large, comfortable bed — is a beautiful woman of pale skin, a soft pink complexion, and beautiful gold and rose-gold locks of hair that hang from elegant curving horns. Jewelry hangs from her in intricate beads of pearls and gold, with sleeves reminiscent of the Ashelander-Mace's haft. She's not facing you, yet, but you can make out twitching ears framed with beautiful scales. When she does turn around, it's enough to take your breath away; a peaceful, comfortable smile. A golden tail slinks out and gently squeezes your leg. "This will take some getting used to... it's not what I usually wear, but very similar to some— something Ivy picked out for me once." [var0] For a moment the golden dragon's expression becomes melancholy, but she washes it away with her hand, as though wiping the look off of her face. "Hah, now is not the time for that. I've had a great many years to unpack... all of this. Instead, I wanted to thank you, again." Ashe's eyes soften again, and her tail squeezes you tightly. "You are as a dear flame to me, as you would be to any dragon who holds you in their heart. Even if the whole world should turn against you, I will always remain. I will look over your children, and your children's children. They will know warmth and love from me, be taught strength and song by me, so that they might protect themselves, and the dreams of others." Ashe rests her hand on her... distractingly buxom chest, and gives you a brilliant smile. "I swear it upon my name, Bringer of Ash, The Fire That Renews The Forest and Scourges Foes." ] "

rows.translation: 谢谢。

rows.original: "That means a lot, thank you..." The dragon smiles again and pats your leg. "I will be around for a long time, a simple promise is no match for the opportunity to do so, and to bask in the sun, and see the world change around me once more. " "It could be a long time, what if I do something you don't like?" Ashe shrugs. "I will try to help you, however I can. For now though, I will wish you sweet sleep. I know I am really looking forward to a nap. Just don't let me do so for decades at a time."
rows.translation: 这意味着很多，谢谢你……” 龙再次微笑着拍了拍你的腿：“我还会在这里很久很久。一个简单的承诺，远远比不上这样的机会——能够再次沐浴在阳光下，看着这个世界在我身边发生变化。” “不过这个过程可能会很漫长，要是我做了你不喜欢的事情怎么办？” 艾什耸了耸肩：“我会尽我所能来帮助你。不过现在，我还是祝你能睡个好觉。我知道…… 我 是 真的 很期待能小睡一会儿。只是别让我一次小睡几十年才醒过来吧。

"I will be around for a long time, a simple promise is no match for the opportunity to do so, and to bask in the sun, and see the world change around me once more. " "It could be a long time, what if I do something you don't like?" Ashe shrugs. "I will try to help you, however I can. For now though, I will wish you sweet sleep. I know I am really looking forward to a nap. Just don't let me do so for decades at a time." '

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: That means a lot, thank you.
rows.translation: 这意味着很多，谢谢您。
不用了，谢谢。

rows.original: You're not exactly sure how you feel about this serious promise, you just wanted [evelyn.dragon|a hot dragon dom|to end the suffering]. You give her a firm nod, and Ashe seems to understand... not that she recants her promise, she simply pats you on the leg. "Until next time you wish to see me, dear flame...
rows.translation: 你其实并不太确定自己对于这个严肃的承诺有何感受，你只是想要[evelyn.dragon|一条炽热的龙来|结束这一切痛苦]。你坚定地点了点头，而Ashe似乎也理解了……她并没有收回自己的承诺，只是轻轻拍了拍你的腿，说道：“亲爱的火焰，下次你想见我的时候再来吧……”
rows.raw: "\n            You're not exactly sure how you feel about this serious promise, you just wanted [evelyn.dragon|a hot dragon dom|to end the suffering]. You give her a firm nod, and Ashe seems to understand... not that she recants her promise, she simply pats you on the leg. \"Until next time you wish to see me, dear flame...\n            "

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: Hard to say how you feel about that.
rows.translation: 很难说你对这件事有什么感受。
rows.raw: "Hard to say how you feel about that."

rows.translation: 拥抱

rows.original: The heartbreak is just too much; she's still suffering, and no matter what she says and what she's promised, these are clearly old wounds made fresh all over again. "Eep!" Ashe yelps when you sit up and give her a tight hug, nearly losing yourself into the canyons of her cleavage. It's... warm. She wraps her arms around you, and you could swear there's only an inch of space between you and an inferno... but the sensation is only of comfort. But this is meant to be comfort for her. You pull yourself up after escaping the gravity of Ashelander's humanoid rack, instead drawing her down [pc.hasBreasts |into yours |onto your chest ]. The dragon's tail flicks around a few times, but she eventually goes limp, eyes settling to softly-golden-glowing half-orbs. "It's okay," you eventually mutter, stroking her hair, surprised when the seemingly-endless length falls between your fingers like liquid silk instead of getting tangled. "It's not your fault." Ashe sobs for a long time, this night, clinging onto you and wailing out untold hundreds of years of pain. You don't understand the words, most of the time, but you can make out Princess Iveryn's name between guilty chokes. You simply let her go until she can't, and once the tears dry up she hides her delicate face behind her hands, head turned away. "I—" The dragon appears to think better of apologizing; you'd only [pc.dcb |get pissed off after all of that |tell her not to be |tell her she's being a silly-billy otherwise ]. "Thank you, and now, I think I shall enjoy a nap... for the first time in a long time. Just be sure to wake me so that I don't rest for decades."
rows.translation: 这种心痛实在太过强烈了；她仍在遭受煎熬，无论她说什么、承诺什么，这些显然都是那些旧伤再次被揭开的伤痕。 “哎哟！”当你坐起来紧紧拥抱她时，阿什发出了惊叫，你差点就迷失在她那深深的胸沟之中……那种感觉……很温暖。她也将双臂环绕在你身上，你甚至觉得，你们之间仿佛只隔着一英寸的距离，而那一英寸之外就是地狱……但这种感觉却只有舒适与温暖。 但这本应是给她带来的安慰。 在摆脱了阿舍兰德那具类人骨架的引力后，你将她拉到自己身边，[pc.hasBreasts |将她拥入怀中 |放在自己的胸前]。龙的尾巴甩动了几下，但她最终变得软弱无力，双眼渐渐变成了柔和的金色半圆。“没关系，”你最终轻声说道，一边轻抚她的头发，却惊讶地发现，她那看似无穷的头发像液态丝绸一样从你的指间滑落，丝毫没有缠结在一起。“这不是你的错。 艾什哭了好久，整晚都紧紧抱着你，倾诉着那些积压了数百年的痛苦。大多数时候你并不理解她说的那些话，但你能从她那些带着愧疚的哭声中听出“艾薇琳公主”这个名字。你只是任由她继续哭泣，直到她再也哭不动为止。当她的泪水止住后，她便用手遮住自己娇嫩的脸，转过头去。“我……”龙似乎觉得道歉才是正确的做法；不过在经历了这一切之后，你只会[pc.dcb |变得非常生气 |告诉她不要这样 |否则就会骂她是个傻瓜]。 “谢谢你，现在我想我该小睡一会儿了……这是很久以来第一次。不过一定要叫醒我，免得我一睡就是几十年。

可怜的小宝贝。 [silly|a;]
艾薇琳

rows.original: Talk with Ashe about Iveryn; clearly they were more than just friends right?
rows.translation: 和艾希谈谈艾弗琳的事吧；很明显，她们之间的关系可不只是朋友关系，对吧？
rows.raw: "Talk with Ashe about Iveryn; clearly they were more than just friends right?"

rows.translation: 揉头
买些有助于缓解头痛的按摩产品吧。
去他的
此外，当你选择“更多”时，实际上得到的也是“更多”。

rows.original: "So, about Iveryn..." you begin, sitting up in the bed and patting the space next to you. Ashelander tenses up at the unexpected mention, finned ears flicking before she eventually nods. "Go ahead, I would be more than happy to tell you about my dearest companion." You can clearly hear the trepidation in your draconic companion's voice, but there's no point in hiding from the discussion. While Ashe is climbing up in order to share her warmth with you under the duvet itself, you lean back and let her sinuously wrap around your side. It's difficult to find a way to broach the actual subject, but you forge on ahead regardless. "Although I'd like that, I meant to say; I've met Iveryn." Ashe stiffens against you, blinking and sitting up straight again. "What? Surely that's— you're rather too young, and I know Ivy's gone." "It's... difficult to explain the circumstances of meeting her, Lady Iveryn — which she requested I call her, as opposed to princess, or whatever — was more of a memory, a recreation." "What was it like?" Ashe's breath is a hushed whisper, and she hangs off of every word. "Lumia... helped." You attempt to describe the events of your quest for the goddess, and all that came after it. Including Iveryn's end.[var0| Apparently during this time her own presence was dulled to naught but an echo; perhaps she couldn't be emulated?] Ashe bites her lip and nods slowly, "it sounds a lot like her, you know... Ivy was a good girl. The thought that she could save even another life with self-sacrifice fills me with such pride." Tears begin to well at the corners of her eyes, but they don't fall. "I've mourned her so many times, of course I'm guilty for burning away the wrathsome shadow of her glory... who knows if she would one day have become herself again? Or become something greater, even? Maybe even my death would've been the tolling bell to awaken her from that dark slumber." Once again there's a halting sigh, and she gives your hand a squeeze. "To know, by her words and yours, that she would rather have passed than be a threat to another living soul? It helps. Genuinely. Thank you, dear flame." The golden girl's body loses its tension and she sinks into you again. [var1|"Meeting Lumia herself was strange. I wish I could've joined you in that dream, but I understand why not."] "You do?" "Could you imagine trying to hold that... suspension of disbelief together, if I were there bawling like a child? We're just lucky she didn't notice me on your belt." Ashe blushes and clears her throat, trying to remain calm and collected. "...Were you two lovers then?" You grin and give her shoulders a squeeze, sensing the majority of Ashelander's melancholy departing. If she'd been taking a drink, Ashe would surely have spat it all over you. She does choke a surprised cough down, while her tail lashes about as though it might escape. "W-what?" "She was a gigantic, big-titted, muscular woman with a heart of gold. Surely you fell completely in lo—" "Ah stopstop—" Ashe looks utterly scandalized. "We loved, and laid together, but we weren't... in a relationship. That would've been far too complicated!" "How come?" Ashe sighs and pouts, "dragon reasons, mostly." She reaches up and gently pinches your ear, frowning. "Did you know the day before I was going to ask her for something more official she asked if I would take her as a consort? I was mortified! A princess, so proud and strong like her. For all I knew she'd start a fresh war if her sister Athel found out." "Isn't giant golden dragon a step up?" "I— yes, physically it is, I suppose, but I'm not royalty. We would've flipped the Winter City on its head if something like that had become official. I'd already been trying to stay away when things started looking... political. I just wanted to ask if she were willing to date..." [silly |"A shame, Iveryn's husband, Iveryn, and you? That would be one hell of a power thruple." |"Even though she had a husband?" ] "Uuuugh..." Ashe groans and curls up on herself, clearly trying not to die of embarrassment. "Don't remind me. That man had the patience of a god with Ivy. Don't get me wrong, he was also a very handsome man, and he thought this was just a brilliant idea." You just about catch a soft hiss of, "and there was that time the three of us..." "What was Iveryn's husband like?" You give the dragon a teasing little elbow, watching her squirm uncomfortably. She gives your question maybe a moment's thought. "Pure of heart, and dumb of ass." Ashe nods firmly, "but as devoted a husband as any, even if Ivy's family were having a heart-attack over it. Ivy knew he was good for her though, and no family would stop her. Not with him, nor with Lumism... Lumia-ism? Whatever." "Surely that means she was sure about becoming your consort?" Yet another blush immediately burns its way into the dragon's pale cheeks, and the temperature in the bed skyrockets until you're sweating. "Ivy may have been immune to the concerns of family drama, but I sure wasn't! Siggy may have been into it, but she was also speaking for him too, and it just— Ugh." Ashe throws her hands up into the air, finally exasperated beyond belief. "Feel better?" You ask, reaching up to pat a horn. Her face is still a mishmash of utterly conflicting emotions, but the golden beauty gives you a nod and a sigh. "I didn't know I needed to vent about that, but yes. Stupid dumb feelings." "There-there." "Thank you, dear fl—" "So which was Ivy's favorite position?"
rows.translation: 那么，关于艾薇琳……”你开始说道，坐直身子，在身旁的空位上轻拍了几下。 阿舍兰德听到这个突然提到的名字，身体微微一紧，那对鳍状的耳朵也动了一下，最终她点了点头：“请讲吧，我很乐意告诉您关于我最亲密的伙伴的一切。你可以清楚地听到你的龙形伙伴声音中的颤抖，但逃避这场讨论也是没有意义的。 当艾什爬上来，想要与你一起躺在被子里分享她的温暖时，你便向后靠去，让她柔软地缠绕在你的身侧。 很难找到一个合适的办法来开启这个话题。 实际的 虽然你有所顾虑，但仍然坚持继续前进。“虽然我也很希望那样，但我的意思是……我其实已经…… 满足要求 艾弗琳。” 阿什的身体突然变得僵硬，她眨了眨眼，又坐直了身子。“什么？难道你……你年纪还太小了，我…… 知道 艾薇已经离开了。” “关于是如何遇见她的，其实很难解释……艾薇琳女士要求我称呼她为‘艾薇’，而不是‘公主’之类的称呼。那段经历更像是一种回忆，一种重新体验。” “那是怎样的情景呢？”阿什的声音轻得像耳语，她每一句话都听得格外认真。 “卢米娅……帮了大忙。”你试图描述自己寻找那位女神的过程中发生的一切，以及之后发生的事情。包括艾薇琳的结局。[var0| 显然，在这段时间里，她的存在已经变得微乎其微，仅仅剩下一丝回音而已；或许，她已经无法被其他人模仿了吧？] 艾希咬着嘴唇，缓缓点了点头：“听起来真的很像她……艾薇是个好女孩。想到她能够通过自我牺牲来拯救另一个生命，我就感到无比自豪。”她的眼角开始泛起泪花，但泪水最终并没有落下。 我曾经多次为她哀悼，当然，我也有责任导致她那辉煌的影子被彻底抹去……谁知道呢，也许有一天她能够重新找回自我？甚至可能会变得更加伟大。或许，我的死亡反而会成为唤醒她、让她从那黑暗的沉睡中苏醒过来的信号。又一次，她轻轻叹了口气，然后握了握你的手。“从她的话以及你的话语中，我明白她宁愿死去，也不愿成为对任何生灵的威胁……这真的让我感到些许安慰。真的，非常感谢你，亲爱的朋友。那个金发女孩的身体不再紧绷，她再次紧紧依偎在你身边。 [var1|与Lumia本人见面真是件奇怪的事情。我真希望自己也能陪你一起进入那个梦，但我也理解为什么不能。] 你真的这么认为？” “你能想象吗？如果我在那里像个孩子一样哭哭啼啼，要如何保持那种‘暂时抛开怀疑’的状态呢？我们只是运气好，她没有注意到你腰带上的我。”艾什的脸颊泛起了红晕，她清了清嗓子，努力让自己保持冷静和镇定。 ……那么你们俩是恋人关系吗？”你微笑着捏了捏她的肩膀，感觉到阿舍兰德心中的忧郁大多已经消散了。 如果她当时正在喝水的话，阿舍肯定会把水喷你一身。她确实被惊得咳嗽起来，她的尾巴也剧烈地摆动着，仿佛想要挣脱束缚一样。 什、什么？” “她是一个身材高大、胸部丰满、肌肉结实的女性，但她有一颗金子般的心。 当然可以。 你完全误会了……” “啊，别说了别说了……”艾什显得极为震惊。“我们确实是相爱了，也在一起过，但我们并没有……成为恋人。 关系那样未免太复杂了！” “为什么呢？” 艾希叹了口气，撅起嘴来说：“主要是一些龙族的规矩和原因吧。”她伸手轻轻捏了捏你的耳朵，皱着眉头问道：“你知道吗，在我打算正式向她提出请求的前一天，她竟然问我是否愿意娶她为妻？ 我简直尴尬极了！她可是位公主，如此骄傲又坚强。要是她的妹妹阿瑟尔知道了，谁知道她会不会因此挑起一场新的战争呢…… “巨型金龙不就更高级一些吗？” “我……嗯，从外形上来说确实是这样，但我毕竟不是皇室成员。 如果那样的事情真的成了官方规定，我们肯定会把冬城闹得天翻地覆。从事情开始变得带有政治色彩的时候起，我就一直在尽量远离那些纷争。我只是想问问，她是否愿意和我约会……." [silly |真可惜，艾弗琳的丈夫、艾弗琳你自己，还有你……要是你们三个人联手，那可就是真正的强强联合了。 |尽管她已经有了丈夫？ ] 呃……”艾希呻吟着，把自己蜷缩起来，显然是在努力避免因为尴尬而“死掉”。“别提了……那个男人对艾薇可真是有着神一般的耐心。别误会，他也是个非常英俊的男人，但他却觉得这只不过是…… 出色 这个想法……”你几乎听到了她轻轻发出的叹息声：“还有那次，我们三个人一起……” “艾弗琳的丈夫是个怎样的人呢？”你轻轻用肘子碰了碰那条龙，看着她显得很不自在。 她似乎思考了片刻才回答你的问题。 心地纯洁，却有点傻乎乎的。”艾什坚定地点了点头，“但他是个非常专一的丈夫，就算艾薇的家人因此而大发雷霆，她也不会改变主意。艾薇知道他是个适合她的人，没有任何家庭能够阻止她。无论是她的家人，还是卢米主义组织，都阻止不了她。……Lumia主义？随便吧。” “那肯定意味着她已经下定决心要成为你的伴侣吧？” 龙的苍白面颊上又一次浮现出红晕，床上的气氛也变得异常热烈，让人不禁开始出汗。 艾薇或许对家庭纷争毫不在意，但我可完全不是这样！西吉虽然可能对这类事情感兴趣，但她说的也是他的想法，总之……唉。”阿什双手一摊，终于彻底陷入了无奈与烦躁之中。 感觉好些了吗？”你问道，同时伸手轻拍了拍她的角。 她的脸上依然交织着各种截然相反的情绪，但那位金发美女还是点了点头，叹了口气说道：“我之前都没意识到自己需要倾诉这些，不过，现在确实感觉好多了。 愚蠢至极的感情。” “好啦，好啦。” “谢谢你，亲爱的……” “那么，艾薇最喜欢的姿势是哪一个呢？
rows.raw: ' "So, about Iveryn..." you begin, sitting up in the bed and patting the space next to you. Ashelander tenses up at the unexpected mention, finned ears flicking before she eventually nods. "Go ahead, I would be more than happy to tell you about my dearest companion." You can clearly hear the trepidation in your draconic companion's voice, but there's no point in hiding from the discussion. While Ashe is climbing up in order to share her warmth with you under the duvet itself, you lean back and let her sinuously wrap around your side. It's difficult to find a way to broach the actual subject, but you forge on ahead regardless. "Although I'd like that, I meant to say; I've met Iveryn." Ashe stiffens against you, blinking and sitting up straight again. "What? Surely that's— you're rather too young, and I know Ivy's gone." "It's... difficult to explain the circumstances of meeting her, Lady Iveryn — which she requested I call her, as opposed to princess, or whatever — was more of a memory, a recreation." "What was it like?" Ashe's breath is a hushed whisper, and she hangs off of every word. "Lumia... helped." You attempt to describe the events of your quest for the goddess, and all that came after it. Including Iveryn's end.[var0| Apparently during this time her own presence was dulled to naught but an echo; perhaps she couldn't be emulated?] Ashe bites her lip and nods slowly, "it sounds a lot like her, you know... Ivy was a good girl. The thought that she could save even another life with self-sacrifice fills me with such pride." Tears begin to well at the corners of her eyes, but they don't fall. "I've mourned her so many times, of course I'm guilty for burning away the wrathsome shadow of her glory... who knows if she would one day have become herself again? Or become something greater, even? Maybe even my death would've been the tolling bell to awaken her from that dark slumber." Once again there's a halting sigh, and she gives your hand a squeeze. "To know, by her words and yours, that she would rather have passed than be a threat to another living soul? It helps. Genuinely. Thank you, dear flame." The golden girl's body loses its tension and she sinks into you again. [var1|"Meeting Lumia herself was strange. I wish I could've joined you in that dream, but I understand why not."] "You do?" "Could you imagine trying to hold that... suspension of disbelief together, if I were there bawling like a child? We're just lucky she didn't notice me on your belt." Ashe blushes and clears her throat, trying to remain calm and collected. "...Were you two lovers then?" You grin and give her shoulders a squeeze, sensing the majority of Ashelander's melancholy departing. If she'd been taking a drink, Ashe would surely have spat it all over you. She does choke a surprised cough down, while her tail lashes about as though it might escape. "W-what?" "She was a gigantic, big-titted, muscular woman with a heart of gold. Surely you fell completely in lo—" "Ah stopstop—" Ashe looks utterly scandalized. "We loved, and laid together, but we weren't... in a relationship. That would've been far too complicated!" "How come?" Ashe sighs and pouts, "dragon reasons, mostly." She reaches up and gently pinches your ear, frowning. "Did you know the day before I was going to ask her for something more official she asked if I would take her as a consort? I was mortified! A princess, so proud and strong like her. For all I knew she'd start a fresh war if her sister Athel found out." "Isn't giant golden dragon a step up?" "I— yes, physically it is, I suppose, but I'm not royalty. We would've flipped the Winter City on its head if something like that had become official. I'd already been trying to stay away when things started looking... political. I just wanted to ask if she were willing to date..." [silly |"A shame, Iveryn's husband, Iveryn, and you? That would be one hell of a power thruple." |"Even though she had a husband?" ] "Uuuugh..." Ashe groans and curls up on herself, clearly trying not to die of embarrassment. "Don't remind me. That man had the patience of a god with Ivy. Don't get me wrong, he was also a very handsome man, and he thought this was just a brilliant idea." You just about catch a soft hiss of, "and there was that time the three of us..." "What was Iveryn's husband like?" You give the dragon a teasing little elbow, watching her squirm uncomfortably. She gives your question maybe a moment's thought. "Pure of heart, and dumb of ass." Ashe nods firmly, "but as devoted a husband as any, even if Ivy's family were having a heart-attack over it. Ivy knew he was good for her though, and no family would stop her. Not with him, nor with Lumism... Lumia-ism? Whatever." "Surely that means she was sure about becoming your consort?" Yet another blush immediately burns its way into the dragon's pale cheeks, and the temperature in the bed skyrockets until you're sweating. "Ivy may have been immune to the concerns of family drama, but I sure wasn't! Siggy may have been into it, but she was also speaking for him too, and it just— Ugh." Ashe throws her hands up into the air, finally exasperated beyond belief. "Feel better?" You ask, reaching up to pat a horn. Her face is still a mishmash of utterly conflicting emotions, but the golden beauty gives you a nod and a sigh. "I didn't know I needed to vent about that, but yes. Stupid dumb feelings." "There-there." "Thank you, dear fl—" "So which was Ivy's favorite position?" '

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: You shuffle around in the dreamspace bed, making space for Ashe to slide in... and the moment she does you kick up the sheets and creep down, stopping once you can drop your head down into the dragon girl's soft thighs. She giggles and watches you sink half an inch into the warmth, splaying out her fingers delicately and stroking your forehead. "What's this, dear flame; looking to have your wrinkles smoothed?" "Mn." Ashe smiles and rests her tail out across your chest and stomach, while the warmth rolling off of her body redoubles until you're snuggled into a comfortable furnace. She still pulls the duvet up to your waist, making sure all of you is well-contained. Instead of overheating, Ashe's actual domain drops in temperature, emulating a crisp winter chill that you're now wonderfully insulated against. Her fingers delicately trace your forehead and slide down to your temples, silken gloves emanating warmth and teasing out imaginary wrinkles. "All of this tension, I'm happy to help... you just enjoy." Her little fangs show when she grins down at you past her cleavage, and her nails scratch your scalp through her gloves. A bundle of melty-noises build up in your throat, free to be sighed slowly out while Ashe hunts out your sensitive spots. [pc.hasHorns |She tests at your horns with little tugs that make you grunt at first before pressing down on the seams where they meet the rest of your bodies, scratching the surface and relieving the pressure almost immediately. ]When she finds your [pc.ears], it's with clear joy and affection that she rubs her way into the tips of them. "Ears are my favorite. I confess my extra favorite is elf ears. Nice, and long, and sensitive." Her hands mimic the motions, starting at the lobes and running up until [pc.hasTail |your [pc.tail] is wagging beneath the duvet |you're squirming under the duvet ]. "Is that so?" You tease back, reaching down to squeeze her [pc.hasTails |own ]tail. "Perhaps Ivy? [flags.LUMIA_QUEST|She did have some very teaseable ears.|Bet an elf princess comes with some lovely ears.]" "...Maybe," there's a soft huff from the dragon, and she gives you a gentle pinch. "I can stop if you're going to make fun of me, though." You bite your lip and wriggle, sinking a little further into Ashe's lap by way of response. Her jewelry jingles as she fights down a giggle, shoulders shaking, before returning to giving you a rubdown. This time she sinks her fingers into your scalp, running thumbs down the back of your neck and pushing in to massage you. Moans slip there way out of you, wordless proof of pleasure while you're given head scratches, a deep scalp massage, and [pc.hasHorns |a horn-polishing that makes your roots tingle |an ear-tickling that makes you wiggle happily ]. "Feeling relaxed?" Ashe smiles and squeezes you with her tail. You... certainly try to respond, but you only manage a cozy 'mhm' before the lights go out.
rows.translation: 你在梦境空间的床上翻来覆去，为艾希腾出空间让她钻进来……而当她真正来到你身边时，你立刻掀开被子，悄悄地躺了下去，直到你的头能够埋进那个龙族女孩柔软的大腿里才停下来。她咯咯地笑着，看着你渐渐沉入那温暖的怀抱中，她轻轻地伸展手指，轻抚着你的额头。 这是什么呀，亲爱的火焰；是想让自己的皱纹消失吗？” “嗯。” 艾什微笑着，把尾巴搭在你的胸膛和肚子上，她身上散发出的温暖逐渐增强，让你感觉仿佛置身于一个温暖的怀抱之中。 她仍然将被子拉到你的腰部，确保你们所有人都被好好地包裹起来。与其说会过热，不如说艾什所处的环境反而会变得寒冷起来，营造出一种清新的冬日气息，而你们现在也得到了很好的保温效果。 她的手指轻轻触碰你的额头，然后滑向下巴两侧，那双丝质手套散发出温暖的气息，仿佛在轻轻抚平那些并不存在的皱纹。“所有这些紧张的情绪，我很乐意帮你缓解……你只需要尽情享受就好。”当她从胸前露出微笑看着你时，那小小的獠牙若隐若现；而她的指甲透过手套，轻轻刮过你的头皮。 当艾希不断攻击你的弱点时，一股充满情感的叹息声在你的喉咙里积聚，终于可以慢慢地释放出来。 [pc.hasHorns |她轻轻拉扯你的角，起初这些动作只会让你发出闷哼声，但随后她会在那些角与身体其他部位相连的地方施加压力，轻轻刮擦表面，几乎立刻就能缓解那种压力。 ]当她找到你的时候…… [pc.ears]她带着明显的喜悦与喜爱，轻轻地将自己的身体蹭到他们的耳尖处。“耳朵是我最喜欢的部位……我得承认这一点。 额外内容 我最喜欢的是精灵耳形状的耳朵。它们既漂亮又长，而且触感也很灵敏。”她的双手模仿着那种形状，从耳垂开始，一直向上描绘着…… [pc.hasTail |你的 [pc.tail] 在被子下面摇来摇去 |你正躲在被子下面扭来扭去呢。 ]是吗？”你戏谑地回应着，同时伸手捏了捏她的胳膊。 [pc.hasTails |拥有 ]也许是艾薇吧？ [flags.LUMIA_QUEST|她的耳朵确实非常惹人想逗弄。|打赌说，精灵公主肯定有一对可爱的耳朵吧。]……也许吧，”龙轻声说道，同时轻轻捏了捏你的手指。“不过，如果你要取笑我的话，我就不说了。” 你咬了咬嘴唇，扭动着身体，作为回应，往艾什的腿上又靠得更近了一些。 她在努力忍住笑声，肩膀不停地颤抖，直到终于止住笑意，才继续为你按摩。这次，她将手指插入你的头皮，用拇指轻轻按摩你的后颈，然后用力按压进行深层按摩。 你不由自主地发出呻吟声，这些无声的声响恰恰证明了你在被轻轻挠头、接受深度头皮按摩时的愉悦感受…… [pc.hasHorns |那种能让你的全身都感到兴奋的讨好行为 |一种让人开心得忍不住扭动身体的悦耳声音 ]感觉放松多了吗？”艾什微笑着，用她的尾巴轻轻碰了碰你。 你……当然感觉轻松多了。 尝试一下吧。 你想做出回应，但最终只是发出了一声轻轻的“嗯”，然后灯光就熄灭了。

            |I'm amazed your partner wasn't woken up...
            |amazing you didn't wake up the whole [atCamp
                |campsite

        ]"

            |through your hair

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original:
Ashe grins, flashing her pointy teeth at you. "Looking to have yourself laid out and played with, dear flame? I certainly don't mind!" Her voice is a musical lilt, and it tickles its way down your spine. "I may be a good girl, but you can't heat the hearth with warm wishes alone."
    
    She settles her hands between her thighs, glittering when she winks at you. "I am happy — and able — to provide for either of your basic base desires, dear flame."
rows.translation:

rows.raw: ' The golden dragon's eyes are glittering as she takes you in, sat upon the imaginary bed. She rests crossed arms on one raised knee, and her chin atop them. Perfectly-painted lips purse, and her jewelry jingles enticingly. Eventually you can stand no more of the silence, spreading your hands and posing. "Well?" "If I'm honest? Mixed feelings, my dear flame. To think that draconic nature can be distilled down to simple acts of alchemy." Well, it was hardly simple, but... "I think you look utterly dashing, and would love to ravish you, and polish your scales, and call you a good [pc.mf |boy |girl ], but it is strange to see you in such a guise. It might take me a little while to get used to." "Well, if you're su—" "Done, I'm used to it now. How about a hug?" She opens her arms and grins, showing off neat fangs hiding amidst cute pearly whites. "That was quick." "Being angry is too much like hard work, and any time I get a little too judgmental I remember I'm a mace now. That fixes a woman's perspective very quickly."'

We'll have to stop by sometime." |"They're an all-female tribe, mostly nomadic. Pleasant people, too." "Interesting," Evelyn says. "Now I'm curious. We'll have to stop by sometime." ] Two-legged horsewomen walk around far below, heading about their daily lives. Sturdy yurts dot the landscape. |"Another village," you say. "Horsepeople?" The two of you curiously note the village. It looks like there are two-legged horsewomen walking around, far below on the ground. Sturdy yurts dot the landscape. "Interesting," Evelyn says. "I'll have to stop by there sometime." ] The two of you land at Evelyn's cave after your excursion, the dragoness [pc.hasWings |escorting you back inside |smiling as she carries you all the way inside and deposits you on her throne ]. Stretching, she lets out a happy sigh. "That was fun. Thank you for the idea, [pc.name]." "Not a problem," you say, smiling at her. "I enjoyed it too." She gives you a kiss. "Feel free to stay for more fun." |[pc.hasWings |Holding Evelyn's hand, you unwrap yourself from her body and take flight alongside her, diving through the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ]. The two of you soar through the air, gazing down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians. |With Evelyn holding you close, you laugh as she pirouettes in the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ], diving towards the ground and flinging herself back up. The two of you gaze down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians, floating high above. ] "Oh," Evelyn says. "There's more of those centaurs." You look down and sure enough, there's a group of scruffy-looking centaurs dotted across the landscape in a line. It doesn't look like they're headed anywhere in particular – just surveying the surrounding land. Or hunting for lone travelers. As you watch, they stop and gather together. It looks as though they might be taking a break to eat or rest. "How easy it would be to fall upon them..." Evelyn murmurs. [pc.hasWings |You glance at Evelyn, and her pace slows. She grins[dayNight | |, her fangs shining in the moonlight ]. "Time to introduce myself to the locals." You can see the light of feral intelligence in her gleaming emerald eyes. "Right behind you." |You glance up at Evelyn as her pace slows. She grins,[dayNight | |, her fangs shining in the moonlight ]. "I don't suppose you'd mind if I introduced myself to the locals." You can see the light of feral intelligence in her gleaming emerald eyes. "Aim for the center." ] None of the centaurs even look up to discern why the shadow across the ground is growing, and by the time they can hear you coming it's too late. A flaming meteor descends with an impact that shakes the earth, claws and fangs flying through the ranks of the hapless marauders as screaming bursts of fire light the surroundings[dayNight | |brightly enough it might as well be day ]. The centaurs have no idea what's going on [pc.hasWings |until you've landed beside her |until you've beaten down several of them ], and by then it's far too late. It's over before it begins. You send the last few brutes running for their lives[dayNight | | into the night ], panicked yells and incoherent yammering fading into the distance as fast as a centaur can gallop in one direction – which is pretty damn fast. "Ha!" Evelyn pants, grinning viciously. She's thinly layered in sweat, standing triumphant amidst the pile of singed, softly moaning centaurs she's incapacitated. "Look at the curs go. Streaming back towards their hovels, no doubt. Thank you, [pc.name]." "I didn't do much," you say. It's the truth. Most of the work was done for you by the display of the dragon queen's power. "You taught me to fight," she says. "And for that I cannot thank you enough. Aah... I should do this more often." She smiles at you. "Let us return, [pc.name]. And these rotted pillagers can make their own way home. Perhaps they'll be more wary in the future... though I doubt it." The dragoness idly kicks an unlucky centaur in the side, provoking a groan of misery. "They don't seem to have anyone intelligent leading them." "Right," you say. "I don't think they have a grand leader, or anything. I think Kasyrra's just been using them as a very unwieldy weapon." "Aahhh, of course," Evelyn murmurs, considering this. "The demon you told me about – the one responsible for the Alraune. I should have put that together... hmm. Drawing the ire of one that powerful may not have been the wisest move." "Far be it from me to divine her intentions, but I don't think she cares at all about what happens to them," you say. "They were just convenient at the time. By now, she's moved on." "I see," she says. "Thank you, [pc.name]. You've taught me yet another highly valuable lesson.. physical confrontations are to be regarded with the same wariness and restraint as mental ones, even with an overwhelming advantage." She glances at the centaurs. "Let us depart. These wretched things smell awful when you burn them."[pc.isCunning | "Probably on account of all the oil and grease in their shaggy hides," you suggest. "I'm surprised they don't go up like lanterns, to be honest with you." Evelyn barks a laugh. "That would be quite the sight. Inflammable centaurs." ] You land at Evelyn's domain not much later, dusting yourself off as the dragoness airs out her clothes. It might be prudent to ask her a bit about what she thinks of the situation in Harvest Valley. There's diplomatic opportunities to be had. |[pc.hasWings |Holding Evelyn's hand, you unwrap yourself from her body and take flight alongside her, diving through the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ]. The two of you soar through the air, gazing down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians. |With Evelyn holding you close, you laugh as she pirouettes in the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ], diving towards the ground and flinging herself back up. The two of you gaze down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians, floating high above. ] The rolling hills below are blessedly centaur-free. "Hmh," Evelyn says, smiling. "I notice there are no marauding centaurs about." "Perhaps they're afraid of dragons," you suggest. "Which does demonstrate some intelligence." Evelyn laughs. "Contrary to my expectations. I'll have to be more careful if they show up again. For all I know, they'll bring nets and bows." The giant lake comes into view after a few minutes more of flying and the two of you take the opportunity to bathe in it, washing yourselves clean after your flight. After some time relaxing in Evelyn's arms while she leans against the bank, you notice the slimes are back. They don't draw closer than they did last time, but they're clearly interested in your dragon friend. "Funny things," Evelyn says, smiling. "They're very unique," you say. [first EVE_FLY_REPEAT |She nods. "I've read about some. Fantastic Beasts has a section dedicated to them... hm." "Hmm?" you say. "I just remembered that book mentions dragons," Evelyn murmurs. "I wonder if any of it is true." You smile. "I imagine there might be a tiny grain of truth to what's otherwise an incredibly tall tale." Evelyn laughs. "I don't think any tale about a dragon would surprise me, now. I wonder if he had a source beyond 'an adventurer I once met in a tavern.' I'll have to look sometime." |"A pity they aren't made of soap," she muses. "I'm sure they'd be happy to rub all over you regardless," you say. Evelyn squeezes you. "That's what you're for, of course." ] You give the slimes a wave and they wave back as you leave, re-dressing and taking wing once more. The time spent in the air with Evelyn is every bit as fun as the time with her on the ground. You dance and whirl through the sky with the dragoness, her enormous wings thrusting the two of you higher until you could swear you can reach out and touch a wisp of cloud. Passing over the marefolk village as you return, you watch the horsepeople attend their daily lives. [flags.CQ_CLEAR |[atani.married |"Can you see your wife?" Evelyn says. You smile. "I think she's indoors.[atani.numKids 1 | Probably taking care of the children. ]" "Very good," she murmurs. |"I get more curious about this village every time I see it," Evelyn says. "You should visit," you say. "I'm sure they'd be friendly." "All in good time," she says, smiling. ] Two-legged horsewomen walk to and fro, dotting the landscape like ants around their yurts. "They're very sturdy-looking," Evelyn notes. "Ah... they are quite... solidly built," you say, battling a smile. "Very bottom-heavy. Powerful." "Thighs the size of tree trunks, you mean," Evelyn says, amused. "That's what I said!" you say. She laughs. "I can see why you might spend time among them." |"They look very sturdy," Evelyn notes. "They do have a certain strength to their lower halves, by the looks of it," you say. "Thighs the size of tree trunks, you mean," Evelyn says, amused. "Exactly," you say. She laughs. "I can see why one might spend time among them." ] The two of you land at Evelyn's cave after your excursion, the dragoness [pc.hasWings |escorting you back inside |smiling as she carries you all the way inside and deposits you on her throne ]. Stretching, she lets out a happy sigh. "That was fun. Thank you for the idea, [pc.name]." "Not a problem," you say, smiling at her. "I enjoyed it too." She gives you a kiss. "Feel free to stay for more fun." ]
rows.translation: [var0 |[pc.hasWings |牵着伊芙琳的手，你从她的身边脱离出来，与她一同飞翔，穿梭在空气中…… [dayNight |晴朗的天空 |夜空 ]你们俩在空中翱翔，从高处俯瞰萨瓦拉，仿佛是它的守护者一般。 |在伊芙琳紧紧抱着你的时候，看着她在你身边旋转跳跃，你们一起笑了起来。 [dayNight |晴朗的天空 |夜空 ]她俯身向地面冲去，却又立刻弹了回来。你们两人从高处俯视着萨瓦拉，就像它的守护者一样，悬浮在半空中。 ] 看，”伊芙琳指着山坡上那些散布着的棕色身影说道，“那是半人马。” “哦，”你回答道，“那些应该就是那些掠夺者吧……在当地居民看来，它们确实是这个山谷的祸害。” “真的吗？”她显得很感兴趣，“嗯……也许我应该偶尔放火烧掉它们几只。 [pc.isDK |你暗自笑了笑：“我觉得如果你真的把它们拿走了，应该也没人会注意到吧。 |并不是说我在支持这个做法，但我觉得就算你们真的这么做了，也没人会在意吧，”你叹了口气说道，“这些规定已经让很多人失去了家园，甚至造成了更严重的后果。 ] 当你从这些瘦弱的小马人身边经过时，你低头看了看他们。你不确定他们在干什么，但看起来他们可能只是在执行巡逻任务。看来，即使你完成了任务，这片土地上还是会留下一些痕迹的。 又飞行了几分钟后，那片巨大的湖泊终于出现在眼前。你们俩便趁机在湖中沐浴，洗去飞行途中积累的疲惫。在伊芙琳倚着湖岸、你们俩相拥放松的片刻里，你们注意到水中有什么东西。 它从大约五十码外的深处升起，水滴从它那闪闪发光的身体上不断滑落。 “哦？”伊芙琳好奇地问道，“这是什么？” “是一种黏液生物，”你微笑着回答，“它们其实挺友好的。它确实看起来比这个地方的其他生物要友善一些，”她说道。 “比起半人马来，它确实要友善得多，”你回答道。 [flags.CQ_CLEAR |至少是我们在外面看到的那些。嗯…… 是 在这个地区，至少还有一个由没有堕落的半人马组成的村庄，但他们实在是太稀少了。” “真的吗？”伊芙琳说道，她轻轻捏了捏你的胳膊。“你的旅行经历肯定让你看到了很多有趣的事情吧。 [pc.mascFem |我拿到了！”你在她的手中挣扎着说道。 |你轻声笑了起来：“我有。 ] |也更加健谈了。” “这个家伙似乎并不这么健谈，”伊芙琳说道。 “也许它只是有点害羞吧，”你建议道，“你知道，你确实是个非常迷人的存在。” 伊芙琳轻轻捏了捏你的手，然后你们…… [pc.mascFem |在她的掌控中挣扎着逃脱 |轻笑 ]. ] 你向那只黏液生物挥了挥手，它也向你挥了挥手，然后你继续离开，重新整理好装备，再次振翅飞翔。与伊芙琳一起在空中飞行的时光，和她在地面上的时光一样充满乐趣。你和这位龙女一起在天空中飞舞、旋转，她巨大的翅膀将你们俩推向更高的地方，让你几乎觉得伸手就能触到一片云朵。 突然，你瞥见了下方有什么东西，于是转过头去查看。 [flags.CQ_CLEAR |哦！那是马人村落。” “马人？”伊芙琳说道，“我在书里才见过这种生物，现实中从未见过。” “也许有一天我们可以一起去看看吧。”你说道。 [atani.married |我在那里有妻子。” “真的吗？”伊芙琳说道，“现在我…… 是 真有意思，我们以后一定要去看看。 |他们是一个由女性组成的部落，主要以游牧为生。也是些非常友善的人。” “有意思，”伊芙琳说道，“现在我好奇了。我们以后一定要去看看他们。 ] 那些骑着双足马的女子们正在下方忙碌地过着她们的日常生活。坚固的蒙古包散布在大地之上。 |又一个村庄，”你说，“还有骑马的人吗？” 你们俩好奇地观察着那个村庄。在地面远处，似乎有一些骑着马的妇女在活动。坚固的蒙古包散布在那些土地上。 “真有意思，”伊芙琳说，“我以后一定要去那里看看。 ] 你们俩在完成探险任务后，来到了伊芙琳的洞穴，那位龙女就在那里。 [pc.hasWings |护送您回到室内。 |她微笑着将你带到室内，然后让你坐在她的王座上。 ]伸展身体时，她开心地叹了口气：“真是太有趣了。多亏了你这个主意。 [pc.name]没问题，”你微笑着对她说，“我也很开心。” 她吻了你一下：“如果你想的话，可以留下来继续享受乐趣哦。 |[pc.hasWings |牵着伊芙琳的手，你从她的身边脱离出来，与她一同翱翔在天空中，穿梭于云层之中。 [dayNight |晴朗的天空 |夜空 ]你们俩在空中翱翔，俯瞰着萨瓦拉，仿佛是它的守护者一般。 |在伊芙琳紧紧抱着你的时候，看着她在你身边旋转跳跃，你们一起笑了起来。 [dayNight |晴朗的天空 |夜空 ]她俯身向地面冲去，却又立刻弹了回来。你们两人从高处俯视着萨瓦拉，就像它的守护者一样，漂浮在半空中。 ] 哦，”伊芙琳说道，“那些半人马还不少呢。” 你低头一看，果然有一群看起来衣衫褴褛的半人马散布在景色中，排成一排。他们似乎并没有朝某个特定的方向前进，只是在观察周围的景色而已。 或者寻找那些独自旅行的旅行者。 当你观察时，他们会停下来聚在一起。看起来他们可能是打算停下来吃饭或休息。 “要想抓住他们，简直太容易了。……”伊芙琳轻声说道。 [pc.hasWings |你瞥了埃弗琳一眼，她的脚步顿时慢了下来，她还露出了微笑。[dayNight | |她的獠牙在月光下闪闪发光。 ]是时候向当地人介绍一下自己了。” 你可以从她那双闪闪发光的翡翠般的眼睛中看到一丝野性的智慧。“就在你身后。 |当你抬头看向伊芙琳时，她放慢了脚步。她微笑着说道：[dayNight | |她的獠牙在月光下闪闪发光。 ]我想你应该不会介意我向当地人介绍一下自己吧。” 你可以从她那双闪闪发光的翡翠般的眼睛中看到一丝野性的智慧。“瞄准中心部位。 ] 那些半人马甚至都没有抬头去看，也不明白地面上那道阴影为何会不断扩大。等到他们终于听到你靠近的声音时，已经为时已晚。一颗燃烧的陨石坠落下来，其冲击力足以震动大地，锋利的爪子和獠牙在那些不幸的掠夺者中间肆意横冲，与此同时，阵阵剧烈的火焰照亮了周围的一切。[dayNight | |说来也巧，简直就像白天一样明亮。 ]半人马们根本不知道发生了什么。 [pc.hasWings |直到你站在她的身边 |直到你击败了其中的几只为止。 ]到那时就为时已晚了。一切还没开始就已经结束了。 你把最后那几个残暴的家伙逼得四处逃命。[dayNight | | 直到深夜 ]惊慌的呼喊声和语无伦次的咒骂声，就像半人马全力奔跑一样，迅速消失在远处——而半人马的奔跑速度，确实快得惊人。 “哈！”伊芙琳喘着粗气，露出残忍的笑容。她身上只裹着薄薄一层汗水，站在那一堆被她制服、正在轻轻呻吟的半人马中间，显得无比得意。“看看那些该死的家伙，肯定正慌忙往他们的巢穴跑去呢。多亏了我…… [pc.name]我并没有做太多事情，”你说。这是事实。大部分工作其实都是通过龙后展现的力量来完成的。 “是你教会了我如何战斗，”她说。“为此，我真的感激不尽。啊……我应该多这样做才行。”她对你微笑着，“让我们回去吧。 [pc.name]而这些腐化的掠夺者们可以自己回家去了。也许以后他们会更加谨慎一些……不过我对此表示怀疑。”女龙闲闲地踢了踢那个倒霉的半人马，惹得他发出一声痛苦的呻吟。“看来他们没有哪个聪明人来领导他们。没错，”你说，“我觉得他们并没有什么伟大的领袖之类的东西。我认为卡西拉只是把他们当作一种极其笨重的武器来使用罢了。” “啊，当然，”伊芙琳若有所思地低声说道。 你跟我提到的那个恶魔——那个与阿尔劳恩有关的恶魔。我当初真该把那些线索联系起来……嗯，惹怒这样一个强大的存在，或许并不是明智之举。” “我当然无法揣测她的意图，但我觉得她根本不在乎那些人会发生什么。”你说道。 那些东西在当时只是方便而已。现在，她已经离开了。” “我明白了，”她说，“谢谢你。 [pc.name]你又给了我一个非常重要的教训……无论是身体上的冲突，还是精神上的对抗，我们都应该保持同样的谨慎与克制，即使自己拥有压倒性的优势。”她瞥了瞥那些半人马，“我们走吧，这些讨厌的东西散发着难闻的气味。 糟糕 当你烧毁它们的时候。[pc.isCunning | 大概是因为它们那毛茸茸的皮毛上沾满了油脂吧，”你说道，“说实话，我很惊讶它们不会像灯笼一样被油脂点燃。” 伊芙琳哈哈大笑起来：“那…… 会 真是令人叹为观止的场景——那些易燃的半人马啊。 ] 不久之后，你降落在伊芙琳的领地，拍掉身上的灰尘，而那位龙女则正在把她的衣物晾晒出去。或许应该问问她，她对收获谷地的现状有何看法——这其中或许蕴藏着一些外交机会。 |[pc.hasWings |握着伊芙琳的手，你从她的身体中脱离出来，与她一同飞翔，穿梭于空中。 [dayNight |晴朗的天空 |夜空 ]你们俩在空中翱翔，俯瞰着萨瓦拉，仿佛是它的守护者一般。 |在伊芙琳紧紧抱着你的时候，看着她在你身边旋转跳跃，你们一起笑了起来。 [dayNight |晴朗的天空 |夜空 ]她俯身向地面冲去，却又立刻弹了回来。你们两人从高处俯视着萨瓦拉，就像它的守护者一样，悬浮在半空中。 ] 下方的连绵丘陵上，幸运地没有半只半人马。 “嗯，”伊芙琳微笑着说，“我看周围也没有半人马在四处游荡。” “也许它们害怕龙吧，”你建议道，“毕竟…… 做 看来他们还是挺聪明的。” 伊芙琳笑了：“跟我的预期相反呢。如果他们再出现的话，我就得更小心了。谁知道呢，他们说不定会带着网和弓来呢。” 又飞行了几分钟后，那片巨大的湖泊终于出现在眼前。你们俩便趁这个机会在湖里沐浴，洗去飞行过程中身上的灰尘和汗水。 rows.raw: ' [var0 |[pc.hasWings |Holding Evelyn's hand, you unwrap yourself from her body and take flight alongside her, diving through the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ]. The two of you soar through the air, gazing down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians. |With Evelyn holding you close, you laugh as she pirouettes in the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ], diving towards the ground and flinging herself back up. The two of you gaze down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians, floating high above. ] "Look," Evelyn says, nodding at a hillside dotted with brown shapes. "Centaurs." "Oh," you say. "Those will be the marauders... they're the scourge of the valley, as far as the populace are concerned." "Really?" she says, interested. "Hm. Maybe I should set a few alight every so often." [pc.isDK |You chuckle darkly. "I doubt anyone would miss them if you did." |"Not that I'm advocating it, but I doubt anyone would miss them if you did," you sigh. "They've driven plenty of people out of their homes and worse." ] You look down at the scraggly centaurs as you pass over them. You're not sure what they're up to, but it looks like it might just be a patrol. Some scars across the land will remain even after you finish your quest, it seems. The giant lake comes into view after a few minutes more of flying and the two of you take the opportunity to bathe in it, washing yourselves clean after your flight. After some time relaxing in Evelyn's arms while she leans against the bank, you notice something in the water. It rises from the depths some fifty yards away, droplets cascading off its shimmering body. "Oh?" Evelyn says, curious. "What's this?" "A slime," you say with a smile. "They're friendly enough." "It does look friendlier than the other inhabitants of this place," she notes. "Certainly more than the centaurs," you say. [flags.CQ_CLEAR |"At least the ones we saw out there. There is at least one village of uncorrupted centaurs in the area, but they're a rarity." "Really?" Evelyn says. She squeezes you a little. "You've certainly seen a lot in your travels." [pc.mascFem |"I have!" you say, wriggling in her grip. |You giggle. "I have." ] |"More talkative, too." "This one doesn't seem to be," Evelyn says. "Maybe it's shy," you suggest. "You are quite the divine sight, you know." Evelyn gives you a squeeze and you [pc.mascFem |wriggle in her grip |giggle ]. ] You give the slime a wave and it waves back as you leave, re-dressing and taking wing once more. The time spent in the air with Evelyn is every bit as fun as the time with her on the ground. You dance and whirl through the sky with the dragoness, her enormous wings thrusting the two of you higher until you could swear you can reach out and touch a wisp of cloud. You catch a glimpse of something below and turn to look. [flags.CQ_CLEAR |"Oh! It's the marefolk village." "Marefolk?" Evelyn says. "I've never seen one outside of a book before." "Maybe we can visit together one day," you say. [atani.married |"I have a wife there." "Really?" Evelyn says. "Now I am curious. We'll have to stop by sometime." |"They're an all-female tribe, mostly nomadic. Pleasant people, too." "Interesting," Evelyn says. "Now I'm curious. We'll have to stop by sometime." ] Two-legged horsewomen walk around far below, heading about their daily lives. Sturdy yurts dot the landscape. |"Another village," you say. "Horsepeople?" The two of you curiously note the village. It looks like there are two-legged horsewomen walking around, far below on the ground. Sturdy yurts dot the landscape. "Interesting," Evelyn says. "I'll have to stop by there sometime." ] The two of you land at Evelyn's cave after your excursion, the dragoness [pc.hasWings |escorting you back inside |smiling as she carries you all the way inside and deposits you on her throne ]. Stretching, she lets out a happy sigh. "That was fun. Thank you for the idea, [pc.name]." "Not a problem," you say, smiling at her. "I enjoyed it too." She gives you a kiss. "Feel free to stay for more fun." |[pc.hasWings |Holding Evelyn's hand, you unwrap yourself from her body and take flight alongside her, diving through the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ]. The two of you soar through the air, gazing down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians. |With Evelyn holding you close, you laugh as she pirouettes in the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ], diving towards the ground and flinging herself back up. The two of you gaze down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians, floating high above. ] "Oh," Evelyn says. "There's more of those centaurs." You look down and sure enough, there's a group of scruffy-looking centaurs dotted across the landscape in a line. It doesn't look like they're headed anywhere in particular – just surveying the surrounding land. Or hunting for lone travelers. As you watch, they stop and gather together. It looks as though they might be taking a break to eat or rest. "How easy it would be to fall upon them..." Evelyn murmurs. [pc.hasWings |You glance at Evelyn, and her pace slows. She grins[dayNight | |, her fangs shining in the moonlight ]. "Time to introduce myself to the locals." You can see the light of feral intelligence in her gleaming emerald eyes. "Right behind you." |You glance up at Evelyn as her pace slows. She grins,[dayNight | |, her fangs shining in the moonlight ]. "I don't suppose you'd mind if I introduced myself to the locals." You can see the light of feral intelligence in her gleaming emerald eyes. "Aim for the center." ] None of the centaurs even look up to discern why the shadow across the ground is growing, and by the time they can hear you coming it's too late. A flaming meteor descends with an impact that shakes the earth, claws and fangs flying through the ranks of the hapless marauders as screaming bursts of fire light the surroundings[dayNight | |brightly enough it might as well be day ]. The centaurs have no idea what's going on [pc.hasWings |until you've landed beside her |until you've beaten down several of them ], and by then it's far too late. It's over before it begins. You send the last few brutes running for their lives[dayNight | | into the night ], panicked yells and incoherent yammering fading into the distance as fast as a centaur can gallop in one direction – which is pretty damn fast. "Ha!" Evelyn pants, grinning viciously. She's thinly layered in sweat, standing triumphant amidst the pile of singed, softly moaning centaurs she's incapacitated. "Look at the curs go. Streaming back towards their hovels, no doubt. Thank you, [pc.name]." "I didn't do much," you say. It's the truth. Most of the work was done for you by the display of the dragon queen's power. "You taught me to fight," she says. "And for that I cannot thank you enough. Aah... I should do this more often." She smiles at you. "Let us return, [pc.name]. And these rotted pillagers can make their own way home. Perhaps they'll be more wary in the future... though I doubt it." The dragoness idly kicks an unlucky centaur in the side, provoking a groan of misery. "They don't seem to have anyone intelligent leading them." "Right," you say. "I don't think they have a grand leader, or anything. I think Kasyrra's just been using them as a very unwieldy weapon." "Aahhh, of course," Evelyn murmurs, considering this. "The demon you told me about – the one responsible for the Alraune. I should have put that together... hmm. Drawing the ire of one that powerful may not have been the wisest move." "Far be it from me to divine her intentions, but I don't think she cares at all about what happens to them," you say. "They were just convenient at the time. By now, she's moved on." "I see," she says. "Thank you, [pc.name]. You've taught me yet another highly valuable lesson.. physical confrontations are to be regarded with the same wariness and restraint as mental ones, even with an overwhelming advantage." She glances at the centaurs. "Let us depart. These wretched things smell awful when you burn them."[pc.isCunning | "Probably on account of all the oil and grease in their shaggy hides," you suggest. "I'm surprised they don't go up like lanterns, to be honest with you." Evelyn barks a laugh. "That would be quite the sight. Inflammable centaurs." ] You land at Evelyn's domain not much later, dusting yourself off as the dragoness airs out her clothes. It might be prudent to ask her a bit about what she thinks of the situation in Harvest Valley. There's diplomatic opportunities to be had. |[pc.hasWings |Holding Evelyn's hand, you unwrap yourself from her body and take flight alongside her, diving through the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ]. The two of you soar through the air, gazing down upon Savarra like its airborne guardians. |With Evelyn holding you close, you laugh as she pirouettes in the [dayNight |sunny sky |night sky ], diving towards the ground and flinging herself back up. "I notice there are no marauding centaurs about." "Perhaps they're afraid of dragons," you suggest. "Which does demonstrate some intelligence." Evelyn laughs. "Contrary to my expectations. I'll have to be more careful if they show up again. For all I know, they'll bring nets and bows." The giant lake comes into view after a few minutes more of flying and the two of you take the opportunity to bathe in it, washing yourselves clean after your flight. After some time relaxing in Evelyn's arms while she leans against the bank, you notice the slimes are back. "I don't think any tale about a dragon would surprise me, now. I wonder if he had a source beyond 'an adventurer I once met in a tavern.' You dance and whirl through the sky with the dragoness, her enormous wings thrusting the two of you higher until you could swear you can reach out and touch a wisp of cloud. "You should visit," you say. "I'm sure they'd be friendly." "All in good time," she says, smiling. ] Two-legged horsewomen walk to and fro, dotting the landscape like ants around their yurts. "They're very sturdy-looking," Evelyn notes. "Ah... they are quite... solidly built," you say, battling a smile. "Very bottom-heavy. Powerful." rows.original: As enraptured as you are by the sight of the world as seen from the sky and the woman you're seeing it with, all you want to do right now is fly with her.
rows.translation: 当你被从天空俯瞰世界的景象，以及与你一同欣赏这一美景的女子所吸引时，此刻你唯一想做的就是和她一起飞翔。
rows.raw: "As enraptured as you are by the sight of the world as seen from the sky and the woman you're seeing it with, all you want to do right now is fly with her."

"Do you happen to have any nice wine, Garth?" you ask him.
    
    "Well, what kind of nice wine?" he grunts, looking at you while he polishes a mug. "I've got plenty of 'em, though I don't serve it to this lot."

[flags.DRAGON_EVE_DIPLOMACY
        |"Should I accompany you on another diplomatic visit, my queen?" you ask.
        
        Evelyn hums in thought. "Do you have a location in mind, my esteemed advisor?"
        |"Have you put any more thought towards diplomacy, my queen?" you ask.

A beautiful, bountiful woman is draped across glittering golden treasures, her clothing barely concealing her lascivious body. Her coverings shine with the glamor and allure of jewelry, her meshed scales glittering across her full breasts and wide, curvy hips. She is the picture of divine femininity, and her lust-filled eyes are fixed solely on you. "[pc.name]," Evelyn purrs, a smile slowly spreading across her lips. "How fortuitous. I was just thinking of you." "You were?" you say. Evelyn's eyes rove up and down your form, all but drinking you in. "Oh yes. I wanted to talk to you, [pc.name]. About the past... and the future." She beckons you in with a single finger. "Come." She raises herself into a sitting position as you draw closer, and the moment you're within reach she pulls you onto her lap. Face-to-face with the covetous dragoness, you're momentarily struck dumb. Her arm slides around your waist, palm planted on your lower back while she gazes into your eyes. Cesare looks up at you and Evelyn with big, serious eyes as Evelyn gently touches the tip of her finger to his nose, prompting him to wave his hands in protest. Genevieve quietly drinks from your breast as Lucien closes his eyes, nuzzling against you. You get all three of them swaddled in blankets, sleeping against you while Evelyn stands over the bed. "They didn't cry at all," you say, gazing down at them. "I think they might have inherited your manner as well as your eyes." Evelyn chuckles. "They are royals, after all." She leans in to give you a gentle kiss. "You've held up very well yourself." "I'm still amazed that we have children together," you murmur. "Of course," Evelyn purrs. "It's not something I decided on a whim, you know. From the moment you unshackled me I meant to make use of my freedom, and now... well. I think I'm making good use of the potential." You smile. "I think so too." ]
rows.translation: [evelyn.numKids 1 |你突然意识到，自己的孕期仿佛也在等待这场冒险的结局。孩子们就要出生了，他们真的要来了。 很快是时候回到霍克索恩了。 你踏入霍克索恩的城广场时，呼吸有些急促。令你惊讶的是，伊芙琳站在那里，双手叉腰，上下打量着你。 哦！你又来接我了，”你愤愤不平地说。 伊芙琳无奈地叹了口气：“你迟早都得回家来接我。现在，快来吧。” “当然，”你温柔地说道，然后走到了她身边。“为了我的女王，我什么都会做的。伊芙琳又叹了口气。“好吧，好吧。现在去床上躺下，让别人来照顾你吧。” 幸运的是，分娩过程一切顺利。你在帮助伊芙琳分娩的同时，也紧紧握着她的手，给予她安慰——最终，三个健康可爱的婴儿诞生了。 [rand |三位黑发公主，全是女孩。 |三个金发碧眼的王子。 |两个女儿和一个儿子，他们全都继承了伊芙琳那漂亮的黑色头发。 |两个女孩和一个男孩，他们的头发都像伊芙琳一样，乌黑亮泽。 ] 她们与伊芙琳的相似之处实在令人震惊，只不过她们眼睛中的绿色深浅有所不同。 “这么漂亮的眼睛啊，”你抱着自己的宝贝们微笑着说，“你们真是太可爱了！你们简直就是伊芙琳的翻版啊！ [pc.mf |母亲 |完全不同的事物 ]你知道的。” 伊芙琳笑了：“他们确实有几分相似。” 你亲了他们每一个人，然后收拾好一切，把三胞胎包在毯子里，让他们和你一起睡觉，而伊芙琳则站在床边看着你们。 他们一点都没哭，”你低头看着他们说道，“我想他们不仅继承了你的眼睛，也应该继承了你的性格。” 伊芙琳轻笑了一声：“毕竟他们是皇室成员啊。”她倾身过来，轻轻地吻了你一下。 你表现得非常出色。” “谢谢。每当我想到我们的孩子们……我就觉得他们能和我们在一起真是太幸福了，”你轻声说道。 “我也有同感，亲爱的，”伊芙琳说。“你去休息吧。我会给你拿些食物和饮料，如果孩子们醒了，我也会照顾他们。你微笑着说道：“好的，谢谢。 |你突然意识到，自己的孕期仿佛也在等待这场冒险的结局。孩子们就要出生了，他们真的要来了。 很快是时候回到霍克索恩了。 你踏入霍克索恩的城镇广场时，呼吸有些急促。令你惊讶的是，伊芙琳站在那里，双手叉腰，上下打量着你。 “哦！来得正是时候。”你气喘吁吁地说。 伊芙琳无奈地叹了口气：“你迟早都会回家的。现在过来吧。” 你看着她…… [pc.heightRange 0 72 |起床了 |在……时候 ] 那位女龙仔细地护送着你走向婴儿房，说道：“你一直在监视我吗？” 她嗤笑道：“我可不像那些总是围在你身边、行为古怪的人那样…… [pc.name]不过，每次你都坚持在怀孕期间还去冒险，我就会忍不住关心你一下。” 你对她笑了笑：“你可是我的守护龙啊。” 伊芙琳又叹了口气：“是啊，是啊。现在赶紧去床上躺下，让别人来照顾你吧。 所幸，分娩过程一切顺利。你在帮助伊芙琳分娩的同时，握着她的手以给予她安慰，最终生下了三个健康可爱的宝宝——一个女儿和两个儿子。他们的头发都像伊芙琳一样是乌黑的，其中两个男孩的眼睛是绿色的，而女孩的眼睛则是蓝色的。 “你们的眼睛真漂亮，”你微笑着看着怀中的孩子们说道，“你们是不是非常可爱呢？ 我祖母的眼睛，就是这一双，”伊芙琳轻声说道，用手指轻轻划过你女儿的额头，“真是太有趣了。” “你想给它们起名字吗？”你问道。 伊芙琳点了点头，依次用手指触摸着那双眼睛：“吉纳维芙、切萨雷和卢西恩。”她微笑着继续说，“这些名字在我心里已经存在很久了。它们也属于我的家族。 你已经能够看到他们各自独特的个性在日常生活中逐渐显现出来。切萨雷用那双充满认真神情的大眼睛望着你和伊芙琳，而当伊芙琳轻轻用手指尖触碰他的鼻子时，他立刻挥动双手表示抗议。吉纳维芙则安静地吸吮着你的乳房，而卢西恩则闭着眼睛，依偎在你身边。 你看到三个孩子都被包在毯子里，依偎在你身边睡着，而伊芙琳则站在床边。 “他们一点都没哭，”你低头看着他们说道，“我想他们不仅继承了你的眼睛，也应该遗传了你的性格。” 伊芙琳轻笑了一声：“毕竟他们是皇室成员啊。”她凑过来轻轻吻了你一下，“你自己也做得非常好。 我们竟然有了孩子，我至今还是感到很惊讶，”你低声说道。 “当然，”伊芙琳轻声回答，“你知道，这可不是我一时冲动做出的决定。从你解放我的那一刻起，我就决心要好好利用这份自由，而现在……嗯，我觉得我确实把这份潜力发挥得淋漓尽致。 你微笑着说道：“我也是这么想的。 ]
rows.raw: ' [evelyn.numKids 1 |You suddenly become aware that your pregnancy is tired of waiting for the conclusion of your adventure. The babies are coming, and they're coming soon. It's time to get back to Hawkethorne. You make your way home, breathing a little hard as you step into the city square of Hawkethorne. To your surprise, Evelyn is standing there, a hand on her hip as she looks you up and down. "Oh! You came to pick me up again," you huff. Evelyn sighs in exasperation. "You had to come home to deliver sooner or later. Now come." "Of course," you purr, drawing alongside her. "Anything for my queen." Evelyn sighs again. "Yes, yes. Now get into a bed so you can be taken care of." The birth, thankfully, is completely without incident. You hold Evelyn’s hand for comfort while you deliver three beautiful healthy babies – [rand |all girls, a trio of raven-haired princesses. |all boys, three onyx-haired princes. |two daughters and a son, all with Evelyn's pretty black hair. |two girls and one boy, all with Evelyn's glossy black hair. ] The resemblance to Evelyn is shockingly apparent, though the greenness of their eyes varies in shades. "Such striking eyes," you say, smiling at your babies in your arms. "Aren't you beautiful? You're the spitting images of your [pc.mf |mother |other mother ], you know." Evelyn smiles. "They do bear a resemblance." You kiss them all and clean up, getting the triplets swaddled in blankets to sleep with you while Evelyn stands over the bed. "They didn't cry at all," you say, gazing down at them. "I think they might have inherited your manner as well as your eyes." Evelyn chuckles. "They are royals, after all." She leans in to give you a gentle kiss. "You've held up very well yourself." "Thank you. When I think about our children... I'm just so happy they're here with us," you murmur. "As am I, darling," Evelyn says. "Get some rest. I'll get you some food and drink, and take care of them if they wake up." You smile. "Okay. Thank you." |You suddenly become aware that your pregnancy is tired of waiting for the conclusion of your adventure. The babies are coming, and they're coming soon. It's time to get back to Hawkethorne. You make your way home, breathing a little hard as you step into the city square of Hawkethorne. To your surprise, Evelyn is standing there, a hand on her hip as she looks you up and down. "Oh! Good timing," you huff. Evelyn sighs in exasperation. "You had to come home to deliver sooner or later. Now come." You look [pc.heightRange 0 72 |up at |at ] the dragoness as she carefully escorts you towards the nursery. "You were keeping an eye on me?" She scoffs. "I'm not some deviant constantly hovering at your periphery, [pc.name]. I like to check on you every so often, though, when you insist on adventuring while heavily pregnant." You smile at her. "My own dragon guardian." Evelyn sighs again. "Yes, yes. Now get into a bed so you can be taken care of." The birth, thankfully, is completely without incident. You hold Evelyn’s hand for comfort while you deliver three beautiful healthy babies – a daughter and two sons. They all have Evelyn's raven-black hair, the boys green-eyed and the girl blue. "Such striking eyes," you say, smiling at your babies in your arms. "Aren't you beautiful?" "My grandmother’s eyes, this one," Evelyn murmurs, gently sweeping the back of her finger across your daughter's forehead. "How funny." "Do you want to name them?" you ask. Evelyn nods, touching her hand to each of them in turn. "Genevieve, Cesare, and Lucien." She smiles. "I've had those names in my head for a while. They've been in my family for some time." Already you can see their little personalities shining through. Cesare looks up at you and Evelyn with big, serious eyes as Evelyn gently touches the tip of her finger to his nose, prompting him to wave his hands in protest. Genevieve quietly drinks from your breast as Lucien closes his eyes, nuzzling against you. You get all three of them swaddled in blankets, sleeping against you while Evelyn stands over the bed. "They didn't cry at all," you say, gazing down at them. "I think they might have inherited your manner as well as your eyes." Evelyn chuckles. "They are royals, after all." She leans in to give you a gentle kiss. "You've held up very well yourself." "I'm still amazed that we have children together," you murmur. "Of course," Evelyn purrs. "It's not something I decided on a whim, you know. From the moment you unshackled me I meant to make use of my freedom, and now... well. I think I'm making good use of the potential." You smile. "I think so too." ] '
