rows.original:
[evelyn.numKids 1
            |You spend the next few days in Hawkethorne, looking after your children with Evelyn. She hasn't left, and though the novelty of a royal dragoness in Hawkethorne was notable at first, by now her presence is business as usual. She's every bit as attached as she was with the first three of your children, one of the newborns constantly at her bosom.
            
            "There's [pc.mf
                |daddy
                |mommy
            ]," Evelyn says to your [rand
                |daughter
                |son
            ] as you re-enter the nursery. "Say hello." She waves your baby's little hand. "Hello [pc.mf
                |daddy
                |mommy
            ]!"
            
            You [pc.mf
                |chuckle
                |giggle
            ]. "Are the rest asleep?"
            
            "Yes. Though they'll be up and wanting to play soon, I’m sure." She sighs. "I should tend to things. I can't be here forever, even though it might be nice."
            
            You nod, reaching down to offer your wonderful child a fingertip as they reach out for you. "I understand."
            
            Evelyn puts the kids to bed with the others and smooches each of them good night, standing back up to give you your own goodbye kiss. "I'll be back to visit in a few days. Take care of yourself for us, okay?"
            
            You give her another kiss. "And you."
            
            The two of you head outside and you watch as she beats her powerful wings, ascending into the sky and flying south until she's a speck in the [dayNight
                |sunny sky
                |starlit sky
            ]. It hurts a little, but the pain of parting is lessened by knowing she's not far.
            |You spend the next few days in Hawkethorne, looking after your children with Evelyn. She hasn't left, and though the novelty of a royal dragoness buying baked bread strikes some at first, it doesn't take long for her presence to be business as usual. She's more attached than you'd expected, one of the babies constantly at her bosom.
            
            This time it's Genevieve, who turns her head to stare wide-eyed at you from Evelyn's arms as you re-enter the nursery.
            
            "There's [pc.mf
                |daddy
                |mommy
            ]," Evelyn says to her. "Say hello." She waves Genevieve’s little hand for her. "Hello [pc.mf
                |daddy
                |mommy
            ]!"
            
            You [pc.mf
                |chuckle
                |giggle
            ]. "Are the boys asleep?"
            
            "Yes. Though Lucien will be up and wanting to play soon, I’m sure." She sighs. "I should tend to things. I can't be here forever, even though it might be nice."
            
            "What are you tending to?" you ask.
            
            "Demons and villages, mostly," Evelyn says, looking down at your daughter. "Keeping the former away from the latter, and strengthening relations. When we eventually make our way to Belhar, it won't be alone. In the meantime, I'll be gathering strength one way or another."
            
            You nod, reaching down to offer Genevieve a fingertip as she silently reaches out for you. "I understand."
            
            Evelyn puts Genevieve to bed with her brothers and smooches each of them good night, standing back up to give you your own goodbye kiss. "I'll be back to visit in a few days. Take care of yourself for us, okay?"
            
            You give her another kiss. "And you."
            
            The two of you head outside and you watch as she beats her powerful wings, ascending into the sky and flying south until she's a speck in the [dayNight
                |sunny sky
                |starlit sky
            ]. It hurts a little, but the pain of parting is lessened by knowing she's not far.
        ]
rows.translation:
[evelyn.numKids 1
            |在接下来的几天里，你一直待在霍克索恩，和伊芙琳一起照顾你的孩子们。她一直没有离开，虽然一开始，霍克索恩出现了一位皇家龙女这一事实确实引起了人们的注意，但如今，她的存在已经变得习以为常了。她对你们之前的三个孩子一样充满关爱，其中一个新生儿更是始终待在她的怀里。

“还有…… [pc.mf
                |爸爸
                |妈妈
            ]伊芙琳对你说…… [rand
                |女儿
                |儿子
            ] 当你重新走进婴儿房时，她说：“跟他说声你好吧。”她牵着你宝宝的小手，说道：“你好。 [pc.mf
                |爸爸
                |妈妈
            ]你 [pc.mf
                |轻声笑起来
                |轻笑
            ]其他人都睡着了吗？”

“嗯，应该都睡着了。不过我敢肯定，他们很快就会醒来，然后想玩游戏了。”她叹了口气，“我得去处理一些事情了。虽然待在这里很愉快，但我总不能永远待在这里吧。”

你点了点头，当你的孩子伸出手来时，你用指尖轻轻触碰他们的手。 我明白了。”

伊芙琳像其他孩子一样，帮他们哄他们上床睡觉，然后一一亲吻他们道晚安，最后才站起来，给你一个自己的告别之吻。“过几天我会再来看你们的。代我们好好照顾自己，好吗？你又吻了她一次。“你也一样。”

你们俩一起走到外面，看着她振动强有力的翅膀，飞向天空，向南飞去，直到她变成天空中一个微小的点…… [dayNight
                |晴朗的天空
                |繁星点点的夜空
            ]虽然会有一点疼，但知道她并不在远处，这种离别的痛苦就会减轻一些。
            |在接下来的几天里，你一直待在霍克索恩，和伊芙琳一起照顾孩子们。她一直没有离开，虽然一开始，有人会对这位皇家龙女购买烤面包这一举动感到新奇，但很快，她的存在就变得再平常不过了。她对孩子们的情感之深超出了你的预期，其中一个婴儿几乎总是待在她的怀里。

这一次，当你们重新走进婴儿房时，正是吉纳维芙从伊芙琳的怀里转过头来，睁大眼睛盯着你看。

“有…… [pc.mf
                |爸爸
                |妈妈
            ]去打个招呼吧，”伊芙琳对她说，“跟她打个招呼。”她示意吉纳维芙伸出小手来。“你好。 [pc.mf
                |爸爸
                |妈妈
            ]你 [pc.mf
                |轻声笑起来
                |轻笑
            ]孩子们都睡着了吗？”

“嗯，应该都睡了吧。不过卢西恩很快就会醒来，然后想要玩耍的，我敢肯定。”她叹了口气，“我得去处理一些事情了。我不能永远待在这里，虽然这样其实也挺不错的。
            
            你在忙些什么？”你问道。

“主要是对付那些恶魔和守护那些村庄，”伊芙琳低头看着你的女儿回答道，“不让恶魔侵扰村庄，同时也要加强各村庄之间的联系。等我们最终前往贝尔哈尔的时候，就不会孤单了。 与此同时，我会想办法积蓄力量。”

你点了点头，伸手轻轻触碰了吉纳维芙的指尖，而她也默默地伸出了手。“我明白。”

伊芙琳把吉纳维芙和她的兄弟们一起送上了床，亲了亲他们每个人，然后站起来，也给了你一个道别之吻。 过几天我会再来看你。代我们好好照顾自己，好吗？”

你又吻了她一下：“你也一样。”

你们俩一起走到外面，看着她用力拍动翅膀，飞向南方，直到她变成天空中一个微小的点…… [dayNight
                |晴朗的天空
                |星光灿烂的夜空
            ]虽然会有一点疼，但知道她并不在远处，这种离别的痛苦就会减轻一些。
        ]

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original:
You enter the nursery and you're mildly surprised to see Evelyn herself, her wings tucked away while she looks into the cot of one of your children. She looks up to see you and beams.
    
    "[pc.name]," she says. "I came by to see how our children are doing."
    
    "Evelyn," you say, smiling.
    
    You cross to her side and she kisses you, your son waving his little arms in excitement when he sees you above. Reaching down, you gently take his little hand in your own, and the smile he makes up at you is like being purified by the sun. It takes you a moment to get yourself together.
    
    "I’m glad you came by," you say to Evelyn.
    
    "Mm. It's only a short flight, after all," she says. "I'll be here as often as I can."
    
    A part of you hurts in the admittance. Neither of you can be here as often as you want to be, but even so, you make the time when it's possible. You stay with Evelyn, stretching out the minutes available to you until she has to go.
    
    "I'll be back whenever I can be," Evelyn murmurs, holding you in her hands as she kisses your forehead. "Take care."
    
    You nod, and she's gone. In her absence, you tickle your son until he begins to giggle. You give him a kiss and stand back up.
    
    There's still so much worth fighting for.
rows.translation:

“伊芙琳，”你微笑着说道。

Evelyn pulls you into a close hug, leaning in to kiss your neck several times. "Return in one piece," she says. "I will," you say. She gives you one last kiss on the lips and settles back onto her treasure pile with a sigh, watching you leave.
rows.translation: 当你慢慢醒来时，首先映入你脑海的是大腿内侧那种隐隐作痛的感觉。那些关于自己被层层床单覆盖的记忆重新浮现，你睁开眼睛，发现自己正处于一个怀孕的状态——怀着一个龙女的孩子。当然，这一点并没有通过任何魔法手段得到确认，但…… 那个 进行如此大规模的繁殖……这是不可避免的。 你通过实验来测试自己的能力吧。[pc.hasToes | 并将脚趾朝下弯曲 ]开心地发着抖，你却…… 特别是 此刻你真的需要去任何地方，于是你再次闭上眼睛，躺在伊芙琳的床上，长舒一口气。当你再次睁开眼睛时，她就在那里。 “睡得好吗？”她轻声问道，用手指轻轻抚过你的额头。 我确实累了，”你说道，强忍着哈欠，“有点筋疲力尽。” 伊芙琳轻笑了一声：“我可不会为此道歉。” “相信我，我根本不需要任何道歉，”你继续说，“但我还是应该起床……” 你又伸了个懒腰，终于坐了起来，却发现就连腹部也有些酸痛。 她 真的吗 她可真把你骗到了。你看向伊芙琳，她会心一笑，然后从床上站了起来。 “我去准备泡个澡，”她说，“这样你在继续旅程之前，应该会感觉好一些。” 你和伊芙琳一起泡进了浴缸，这位龙女坐在你身旁，手臂搭在你的肩上。水很温暖，而和她在一起的这种感觉更是令人愉悦。你闭上眼睛，靠在她身上，静静地享受着这份宁静与舒适，沉浸在片刻的放松之中。 [var0 |这样很好，”伊芙琳轻声说道，“如果不知道你有多有能力，我是不会让你离开的。 [pc.name]我害怕会失去你。 [var0 |你微笑着说道：“幸好我们之前已经进行了如此彻底的测试。” 她笑了起来，笑声像涟漪一样在空气中荡开：“确实算是测试过了。 |你微笑着说道：“你不必为我担心。” “不过，我想我还是会担心的，”她回答道。 ] 过了一会儿，你们俩从水中爬上来，擦干身体并重新穿好衣服。伊芙琳紧紧地拥抱了你，还多次亲吻你的脖子。 “一定要平安回来，”她说道。 “我一定会很快就会回来的，”你回答道。 她最后在你的嘴唇上吻了一下，然后叹了口气，重新坐回她的“宝堆”上，目送你离开。 |等你在霜冻之地的事情办妥之后，”伊芙琳轻声说道，“我会让你得到应得的回报。你会为我生下无数孩子…… [pc.name]我保证。” 你脸红了，心中充满了激动。那种轻微的紧张感和肾上腺素驱使你尽可能地坦诚而坚定地说出这些话：“即使你把我折磨死，我也会死得很开心。” 伊芙琳仰头大笑：“听到你这么说，我真的很高兴。 [pc.name]她微笑着，触碰着你的…… [pc.hasHair |用手指捋头发 |脸蛋 ]但我早就知道了。你的身体…… 非常 这种交流……当我完全融入你之中时，这种感觉最为强烈。” 你微微脸红，伊芙琳则靠得更近了一些：“每当我想要拉开距离时，你紧紧抓住我的方式——真是…… 绝望她恳求我不要离开。而当我再次回到她身边时，她又欣喜若狂，让我彻底湿透了……然而，她依然用她那美妙的大腿将我紧紧抱住。 “好吧，”你红着脸嘟囔道，“我明白了。” 她满意地笑了笑，然后靠在椅背上说道：“说真的，你在床上的表现真是太出色了。我真的很期待你能一直成为我生活中的伴侣。 ] 过了一会儿，你们俩从水中爬上来，擦干身体并重新穿好衣服。伊芙琳紧紧地拥抱了你，还多次亲吻你的脖子。 “一定要平安回来，”她说。 “我一定会的，”你回答道。 她最后在你的嘴唇上吻了一下，然后叹了口气，重新坐回她的“财宝堆”上，目送你离开。
rows.raw: ' The first thing to enter your consciousness as you slowly awaken is a dull ache in your inner thighs. The memories of being plowed through the sheets return, and you open your eyes to a world in which you're pregnant with the child of a dragon-woman. It's not magically confirmed, of course, but after that much vigorous breeding... it's inevitable. You experimentally stretch your legs[pc.hasToes | and point your toes downwards ], shivering happily. You don't particularly need to be anywhere right now, and so you close your eyes again and spreadeagle in Evelyn's bed with a sigh of relief. When you open them once more, she's there. "Sleep well?" she purrs, stroking the back of her finger across your forehead. "I did," you say, stifling a yawn. "I was a little worn out." Evelyn chuckles. "I make no apologies." "Believe me, I don't want any," you say. "But I should still get up..." You stretch out one last time and sit up, noting that even your core aches a little. She really did a number on you. You give Evelyn a look, and she smiles knowingly before rising from the bed. "I'll fill the bath," she says. "It should liven you up before you resume your journey." You slip into the bath together with Evelyn, the dragoness sitting alongside you with her arm resting across your shoulders. The water is nice, and the feeling of being here is nicer still. You close your eyes, leaning against her and losing yourself in silent, comfortable relaxation for a while. [var0 |"This is good," Evelyn murmurs. "I wouldn't let you leave if I didn't know how competent you are, [pc.name]. I'd be afraid to lose you." [var0 |You smile. "A good thing we've tested each other so thoroughly." She laughs, ripples spreading through the water. "Tested indeed." |You smile. "You don't have to worry about me." "I think I will anyway," she says. ] The two of you rise from the water some time later, drying off and re-dressing. Evelyn pulls you into a close hug, leaning in to kiss your neck several times. "Return in one piece," she says. "I'll be back before you know it," you say. She gives you one last kiss on the lips and settles back onto her treasure pile with a sigh, watching you leave. |"When you are done in the Frost Marches," Evelyn murmurs, "I am going to take you as you deserve. You will bear me an uncountable number of children, [pc.name]. I promise it." You blush, excitement beating in your heart. The slight nervousness and adrenaline compels you to speak as honestly and strongly as possible. "Even if you fucked me to death, I'd die happy." Evelyn throws her head back and laughs. "I am glad to hear such passion from your lips, [pc.name]." She smiles, touching your [pc.hasHair |hair with a finger |cheek ]. "But I already knew. Your body is very communicative... and it's at its loudest when I sheathe myself in you." You blush a little, and Evelyn leans closer. "The way you grip me when I seek to pull back – such desperation, imploring me not to leave. Then, a great rejoicing when I thrust back in, leaving me freshly soaked... and yet, already seeking to keep me contained with your wonderful thighs." "Okay," you mumble, red as a tomato. "I get it." Her smile widens as she settles back. "Truly, you are a wondrous performer in bed. And I am looking forward to you being a constant companion in mine." ] The two of you rise from the water some time later, drying off and re-dressing. Evelyn pulls you into a close hug, leaning in to kiss your neck several times. "Return in one piece," she says. "I will," you say. She gives you one last kiss on the lips and settles back onto her treasure pile with a sigh, watching you leave. '

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: The ascent into this lair is a familiar piece of illusory magic to Kaina's den; if you didn't know what you were looking for, you'd never have seen this 'doorway' into the mountains. A craggy rock, clearly sheer and weathered by wind and time... maybe, just maybe it's reminiscent of the shape of a doorframe, but even then it's nearly incomprehensible. You press your hand against the rock marked out on your map, and you... end up touching rock, not an actual door. However your fingers appear to have sunk in half-an-inch, revealing the surface for its illusory nature. [party.som |It takes a few minutes of wall-stroking to actually find the handle, but you finally manage to get a grip on something and tug it down hard enough to make the stones grind. |You and [companion1.name] still take a few minutes actually wall-stroking to actually find the handle, but [companion1.mf |he |she ] spots it a moment before you. It only takes a single tug to pull the handle free. With a slow grinding of stone, the door begins to slide open. |You and your companions still take a few minutes actually wall-stroking in order to find the handle, until [companion2.name] gets a hold of something and pulls. With a slow grinding of stone, the door begins to slide open. ] Once the initial dirt and grit have been forced from the entryway, its own weight pushes it open, forcing you to hold on and slow it down to avoid having the door rip itself from its own ancient hinges. The scent of age and dirt hits your nostrils, accompanied by the thick and cloying taste of blood. "Ah fuck..." [party.randComp agni arona atugia azzy brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv |Agni's face scrunches up when she takes a big whiff, placing a hand on your shoulder. "Not my first time with something like this... better steel[silly |e ] yourself." |"Ugh." Arona grimaces and wafts a hand in front of her face. "I really fucking hope there are no ghosts." |Tui shudders and gags. "Eugh, I've smelt that before, but definitely not so... old? Better ready your stomach." |[azzy.kdb |"Oh no, what is that? I... don't think Kaina's worries were unfounded." | |"Urk! Oh, oh no..." Azzy's lip trembles. "This won't be good, will it?" ] |Brienne gags and turns her head away, spitting on the ground. "Oh I don't like this." |Brint snorts instinctively — an instinct that he immediately regrets — before nearly heaving. "Gah... well? Best steady yourself, [pc.name]." The bull plants a protective hand on your shoulder and readies himself. |Cait's eyes water, and she covers her nose before turning around to sneeze. "Blech... oh, [pc.name]. I don't think we're going to like what we find." Her tail droops, and she stands a little closer to you while readying herself. |[etheryn.lnhConfidence |Ryn's purple skin turns painfully pale, and the boreal princess leans into you as though it would shield her from the odor. "Oh I.... I don't like this." |Ryn coughs and covers her face, a full-body shudder wracking her form before she hides halfway behind your body. "I, uh... [pc.name]? I don't like this." |Ryn's caught just as off-guard as you, pinching her nose and turning away with watering eyes. "Oh Lumia's lips, that's not a good smell. We have to go in there, don't we?" ] |The stench has enough force to damage even Kiyoko's bronze-clad confidence, and she turns her head in order to sneeze and steady herself. "I suspect our draconic aunt has passed this plane." |Quin immediately pales, with his jaw setting tightly, ears leaning back, and perfectly-poofed tail going still. "That is not what I'd call a promising smell." |[viv.isDemon |Your demonic-witch companion shudders, drawing a hand across her face and pressing up to your side as though it might ward away the odor. "Oh, that is not the smell of a lively dragon— I think, at least." |Viv squints and hides her mouth and nose behind a hand, pressing against your side as though it might ward away the odor. "I don't know what a dragon smells like, but I don't think that's the smell of a living one..." ] ] An ominous premonition at least, but not one you can just walk away from. Before you can actually attempt the steps, however, you notice one other change with the illusion itself gone; a thick blue gem set in the wall. You recognize the gem almost immediately, not by any visual recognition, but by the way it tugs on you; this must be a waystone. When you brush your fingers across the jewel — removing an ancient layer of dust — there's a familiar tingle to herald its repeat use. At least you won't have to make the trip here on foot in the future.
rows.translation: 对于凯娜的巢穴而言，攀登这条通往洞穴的道路本身就是一种熟悉的、具有迷惑性的魔法；如果你不知道自己在寻找什么，的话，你永远也不会发现这道通向山中的“门”。那是一块崎岖的岩石，显然十分陡峭，而且已经被风和时间的侵蚀而变得布满裂痕……也许吧。 也许吧 它的形状让人联想到门框，但即便如此，也几乎让人无法理解它的真正含义。你将手放在地图上标记出的那块岩石上，结果……你触摸到的依然是岩石，而不是真正的门。 然而，你的手指似乎陷入了半英寸深的岩石中，这使得岩石的表面暴露了出来，从而揭示了它的虚幻本质。 [party.som |你得在墙上摸索几分钟才能真正找到那个把手，但最终你还是抓住了它，用力一拉，那些石头才开始移动、开始发出摩擦声。 |你和 [companion1.name] 实际上，还是需要花上几分钟的时间在墙上摸索，才能找到那个把手。 [companion1.mf |他 |她 ] 在你之前，它就已经发现了那个地方。只需轻轻一拉，把手就能被拔出来。随着石头缓缓地摩擦，门开始缓缓地打开。 |你和你的同伴们还是花了几分钟的时间在墙上摸索，才终于找到了那个把手。 [companion2.name] 抓住某个东西，然后用力拉。随着石头与地面缓慢摩擦，门开始缓缓打开。 ] 当那些最初的灰尘和污垢被从入口处清除后，门会因为自身的重量而自动打开，这时你不得不抓紧门框，减缓它的开启速度，以免这扇古老的门从铰链上脱落。空气中弥漫着岁月的痕迹与尘土的气味，同时还带着一股浓烈而黏腻的血腥味。“啊，该死…… [party.randComp agni arona atugia azzy brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv |阿格尼深深地吸了一口，然后把手放在你的肩上，说道：“这种东西我以前也遇到过……这种钢材确实更优质。[silly |e ] 你自己吧。 |呃……”阿罗娜皱着眉头，用手在面前挥了挥。“我真心希望这里根本没有鬼魂。 |崔不禁打了个寒颤，还差点吐出来。“呃，这种味道我以前确实闻到过，但绝对没有这么……陈旧吧？最好做好心理准备。 |[azzy.kdb |哦不，那是什么？我……觉得凯娜的担忧并非毫无根据。 | |呃！哦，不……”阿齐的嘴唇开始颤抖，“这样下去不会有什么好结果的，对吧？ ] |布蕾妮忍不住作呕，转过头去，将口水吐在地上。“哦，我真不喜欢这样。 |布林特本能地哼了一声——这个反应让他立刻后悔起来——随后差点吐了出来。“呃……好吧？最好先稳住自己。 [pc.name]那头公牛将一只保护性的手放在你的肩膀上，然后准备好了行动。 |凯特的眼睛有些发酸，她捂住鼻子，然后转过身去打喷嚏。“呸……哦， [pc.name]我觉得我们看到的东西不会让我们满意的。”她的尾巴耷拉下来，然后她站得离你更近了一些，似乎在做好心理准备。 |[etheryn.lnhConfidence |瑞恩那紫色的皮肤变得异常苍白，这位北方公主紧紧地靠向你，仿佛这样就能让自己远离那股难闻的气味。“哦，我……我不太喜欢这种味道。 |瑞恩咳嗽着，用手捂住了脸，全身不由自主地颤抖着，最终躲到了你的身后。“我，呃…… [pc.name]我不喜欢这个。 |瑞恩也和你一样措手不及，她捏了捏自己的鼻子，然后泪眼朦胧地转过身去。“哦，卢米娅的嘴唇……那味道可不太好。我们得进去看看，对吧？ ] |这种恶臭甚至足以动摇基约科那充满自信的心态，她不得不转过头去打喷嚏，同时稳住身体。“我怀疑我们的‘龙之阿姨’已经离开了这个空间。 |奎因的脸色立刻变得苍白，下巴紧绷，耳朵向后耷拉，那条蓬松的尾巴也完全静止不动了。“这种气味可真不能说有什么吸引力啊。 |[viv.isDemon |你的那位女巫同伴颤抖着，用手捂住脸，然后紧紧靠在你身边，似乎这样就能驱散那股气味。“哦，这可不像是一条活泼的龙散发出来的气味……至少我是这么认为的。 |薇芙眯起眼睛，用手遮住自己的嘴和鼻子，紧紧贴在你的身侧，仿佛这样就能驱散那股气味。“我不知道龙到底有什么味道，但我觉得那肯定不是活龙的气味…… ] ] 至少这是一种不祥的预感，但绝不是你可以轻易忽视的东西。然而，在你真正打算采取行动之前，你注意到另一个变化：那个幻象本身已经消失了，取而代之的是墙上镶嵌着一颗深蓝色的宝石。 你几乎立刻就认出了这颗宝石，不是通过视觉上的辨认，而是因为它那种吸引你的力量——这肯定是一块重要的指引石。当你用手指轻轻触碰这颗宝石，清除掉覆盖在它表面的古老尘埃时，会有一种熟悉的感觉传来，这说明它还可以再次被使用。 至少以后你就不必步行来到这里了。

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original:
The entrance consists of wide stone steps, with sharp, sheer edges. Although a trip might result in some bloodied shins, they're surprisingly human in height. It still proves to be a minute long ascent, with the scent of age, sickness, and blood only ever intensifying. 
        
        It's when you reach the landing — foyer? — of this ascent, that your breath is robbed and your stomach falls out. Laid out in a massive heap is a titanic reptilian form, every part the depiction of dragons of legend... but very still.
        
        Your first assumption is that this dragon has died, but you can see the weak rise and fall of their titanic chest, and the glowing half-moons of barely open eyes burning from the darkness. There's a skylight above in this vaulted dome of a den, and it casts a shaft of [dayNight
            |sun
            |moon
        ]light. It casts a huge stone throne in luminescence, and the tail wrapped around it glistens with brilliant golden scales.
        
        A brilliance you realize is missing from the rest of this creature; her scales are lackluster, pale imitations of the ones capturing scant light at the throne. You look around carefully, considering this... apparently-unwell dragon isn't speaking up; what might once have been immense wings, capable of blotting out the sky, are tattered and pinned together by a thick, sweeping-headed spear. This injury is the source of that scent of blood, and ancient illness, and every breath seems to tug on it.
        
        There are rooms branching off of this foyer, so far as you can see, but there's no reaching either of them. It strikes you, with a cold shiver, that this poor dragon was only a staircase away from help.
rows.translation:
入口处设有宽阔的石阶，台阶的边缘十分陡峭。虽然走上去可能会让人的胫骨受伤流血，但这些台阶的高度却出奇地适合人类攀爬。尽管需要花费一分钟的时间才能登上顶端，但那里弥漫着的陈旧气息、病态的气息以及血腥味却愈发浓烈。 
        
        当你抵达这段攀登路的终点——那个类似门厅的地方时，你会顿时喘不过气来，胃部也仿佛要掉出来一样。那里堆放着一具巨大的爬行动物骨架，它的每一个部位都完美地再现了传说中龙的形象……但却完全静止不动。
        
        你的第一个假设是这条龙已经死了，但你可以看到它那巨大的胸膛仍在微微起伏，而它那半睁着的、泛着微光的眼睛仿佛在黑暗中燃烧着。在这个拱形洞穴的顶部有一扇天窗，它投下了一道光线…… [dayNight
            |太阳
            |月亮
        ]光芒。它将一座巨大的石制王座照得熠熠生辉，而缠绕在王座周围的尾巴上，那些闪闪发光的金色鳞片更是令人赞叹。

然而，你很快就会发现，这种光芒在这只生物的其他部位并不存在；它的鳞片黯淡无光，只是那些在王座上反射出微弱光芒的鳞片的苍白模仿品罢了。 你仔细地环顾四周，思索着……这只显然身体不适的巨龙为何没有发出任何声音；那些曾经可以遮蔽整个天空的巨大翅膀，如今已经破烂不堪，被一根粗大的长矛刺穿并固定在那里。 这种伤势正是那种血腥气味的来源，也是那种古老疾病的根源，每一次呼吸似乎都在刺激着这些伤势。

从这个门厅出发，有房间向各个方向延伸开来，但无论你朝哪个方向走，都无法到达那些房间。 当你想到，这只可怜的龙其实只需跨过一段楼梯就能得到帮助时，你会不寒而栗。
rows.raw:
"
        The entrance consists of wide stone steps, with sharp, sheer edges. Although a trip might result in some bloodied shins, they're surprisingly human in height. It still proves to be a minute long ascent, with the scent of age, sickness, and blood only ever intensifying. 
        
        It's when you reach the landing — foyer? — of this ascent, that your breath is robbed and your stomach falls out. Laid out in a massive heap is a titanic reptilian form, every part the depiction of dragons of legend... but very still.
        
        Your first assumption is that this dragon has died, but you can see the weak rise and fall of their titanic chest, and the glowing half-moons of barely open eyes burning from the darkness. There's a skylight above in this vaulted dome of a den, and it casts a shaft of [dayNight
            |sun
            |moon
        ]light. It casts a huge stone throne in luminescence, and the tail wrapped around it glistens with brilliant golden scales.
        
        A brilliance you realize is missing from the rest of this creature; her scales are lackluster, pale imitations of the ones capturing scant light at the throne. You look around carefully, considering this... apparently-unwell dragon isn't speaking up; what might once have been immense wings, capable of blotting out the sky, are tattered and pinned together by a thick, sweeping-headed spear. This injury is the source of that scent of blood, and ancient illness, and every breath seems to tug on it.
        
        There are rooms branching off of this foyer, so far as you can see, but there's no reaching either of them. It strikes you, with a cold shiver, that this poor dragon was only a staircase away from help. 
        "

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: "Hello?" You [party.som | |and [companion1.name] |and your companions ] all but leap out of your [party.som |skin |respective skins |respective skins ], as a soft, weak voice tickles its way to your ears. It's more like a grunt of pain at first, unlodging the dust of ages. The second attempt proves more audible, but it's still weak and halting. "Hello? Are you... a visitor?" One of the dragon's eyes open all the way, as large as your whole head, and incredibly bloodshot near the slitted pupil. "Yes, I was sent by your... niece, Kaina." She blinks slowly, taking another shallow breath. "Oh, Kaina... she's a very good girl, the poor thing. Is she well?" [pc.dcb |"What a fucking ridiculous thing to worry about when you're practically dead." You scowl. "Yes, she's fine." |"Uh... yes, she's doing very well. You, on the other hand, don't seem to be." You frown. |"Y-yeppers, but uh, miss dragon? You look sick." You frown. ] "I've... seen better days, yes. Kaina doesn't know what happened to me, does she?" "No, what did happen?" The dragon takes a long, slow breath. It proves to take a few minutes for the massive golden creature to pull herself together, and even once she begins it's with such depths of exhaustion you're surprised she doesn't drift off to sleep where she lies. "I am Bringer of Ash, the Fire That Renews the Forest and Scourges Foes. Something a little too exhausting to... say often. Please, call me Ashe, or Ashelander." "It is only by the grace of a couple of kobold servants that I have survived so long... though they have long since disappeared, and over these long years I have become so hungry, tired, and... lonely. Such loneliness that my soul has surely withered from the loss of contact." Ashe pauses, blinking slowly. "I have hallucinated people before, but none like you... if you are just a cruel jest of my mind, it is surely because I have run out of ways to stay sane; I'm out of rocks to count." "Rocks to count?" you ask, confused. "Yes. I am hoping to forget how many there are that make up all I can see, so that I have something to count again... four-hundred, twenty-three thousand, two hundred and thirty-one rocks." Her great big eyes well up with tears for a moment, and she blinks away the huge droplets as though they sting her. "The pain keeps me from sleeping for more than a month at a time..." "From the spear in your wings? It doesn't look like it's buried very deeply." Ashe remains quiet for a time, taking a series of slow, deep breaths, enough to kick up tiny clouds of dust. "And yet it is, both in limb and soul. The princess, Lady Iveryn var Rydell, younger sister to Queen Atheldred, and wraith-blinder, did this to me." [party.comp etheryn |Ryn gasps beside you, eyes widening. "The what? And why would she do this? How come I've not heard of you?" |"Why would a boreal-elf princess attack you?" ] Ashe swallows her reluctance and continues. "Ivy, my beautiful friend. We strode across the land doing good deeds together, but while I slept to recover from an older, long-healed injury, she rode out without me... intending to sacrifice herself in order to slay some horrible creature. Her sword was broken in the— the monster's skull, but she was swallowed whole." Once it becomes clear to her you still don't understand, she sighs — a raspy, blood-tinted thing — and continues. "When such a creature eats you, it consumes you. Ivy came to my home, and struck me as I rose to my feet, pinning my wings together so that I could not escape." Her voice becomes a tight, rasping hiss, and it rolls down your spine with such potency it nearly steals the strength from your legs. For a moment, just a brief, insignificant moment, you can taste the pain of such an ancient, massive creature. [party.som | |As does [companion1.name], judging by the way [companion1.mf |he |she ] trembles. |As do your companions, judging by the way they fight down trembles from either side of you. ] "She gloated, in a broken voice that cut me deeper than any betrayal. When Ivy made to finish me off, she drew forth the very same, beautiful mace I had gifted her with a year before." Ashe's voice cracks, but she carries on still. [party.comp etheryn |Poor Ryn hangs on every word, eyes still wide and now glistening with moisture. |It tugs [pc.dcb |even at your icy heartstrings, finding some sympathetic thread and strumming furiously away. |at your own heartstrings, and you swallow down a lump in your throat. ] ] "I saw there was nothing left of my best friend, sometimes-lover, and most personal confidant. It hurt me — hurts me still — to do so, but I slew her, with dragonsfire. I breathed hard, and deep, with every ounce of myself, until naught remained but coarse ash, and the mace. I was determined to end her, and rescue her legacy." The dragon opens both eyes now, staring at you clearly and weakly lifting her head to reveal the mace resting beneath her chin. The flanges clearly dig into her but it's been cradled protectively since. "I lost consciousness, dears, and when I woke all fights were long over. The spear could not be removed, and my fate has been sealed thus for the longest time."
rows.translation: 喂？ [party.som | |以及 [companion1.name] |以及你的同伴们 ] 几乎要从你身上跳出来 [party.som |皮肤 |相应的皮肤 |相应的皮肤 ]那声音轻柔而微弱，仿佛轻轻拂过你的耳畔。起初，它更像是一声痛苦的呻吟，仿佛在拨开积压已久的尘埃。第二次尝试时，那声音变得清晰了一些，但依然显得虚弱而断断续续。 “喂？ 你是……一位访客吗？”那条龙的一只眼睛完全睁开了，它的大小相当于你的整个头部，而那狭长的瞳孔附近也充满了血丝。 “是的，我是受你的……侄女凯娜的委托而来的。 她缓缓地眨了眨眼，又浅浅地吸了一口气。“哦，凯娜……她是个非常好的女孩，那个可怜的孩子。她现在还好吗？ [pc.dcb |当你已经差不多没命的时候，还为这种荒谬的事情担心，真是太可笑了。”你皱着眉头说道，“没错，她没事。 |呃……是的，她现在发展得很好。而你，似乎就不是那么顺利了。”你皱起了眉头。 |耶……不过，呃，龙小姐？你看起来有点不舒服啊。”你皱起了眉头。 ] 我……确实经历过更好的日子，没错。凯娜并不知道我发生了什么，对吧？” “不，她并不知道…… 做了 怎么会这样呢？” 巨龙缓缓地吸了一口气。这只庞大的金色生物显然花了好几分钟才恢复过来，而当它终于开始行动时，那种疲惫的程度实在令人惊讶——它竟然还能保持清醒，没有在原地睡着。 我是‘灰烬使者’，那能重燃森林之火、惩罚敌人的火焰。不过，这种身份实在让人……不太愿意经常提及。请叫我阿什吧，或者阿舍兰德。” “多亏了几只地精仆从的帮忙，我才能活到现在……不过它们早就不见了。这些年来，我变得如此饥饿、疲惫，而且……孤独。这种孤独感实在太过强烈，让我的灵魂仿佛因与它们的分离而逐渐枯萎。”阿什缓缓停顿了一下，然后缓缓眨了眨眼。 我以前确实出现过幻觉，但从来没有见到像你这样的人……如果你只是我脑海中的一场残酷玩笑，那肯定是因为我已经找不到任何办法来保持理智了；我简直已经没有可以用来数数的石头了。” “用来数数的石头？你困惑地问道： “是的。我希望自己能够忘记那些构成我眼前所见的一切究竟有多少，这样我就可以重新开始计数了……四百二十三万两千三百一块石头。她那双大大的眼睛瞬间充满了泪水，她眨着眼睛试图驱赶那些仿佛会刺痛她的泪水。 这种疼痛让我连续一个月都无法入睡……” “是翅膀上的那支长矛造成的吗？看起来它并没有扎得很深啊。” 阿什沉默了一会儿，慢慢地深吸了几口气，这些气息在空气中激起了细小的尘埃。“但实际上，它确实深深地刺入了我的身体和灵魂。就是这位艾薇琳·瓦·瑞德尔公主——阿瑟德雷德女王的妹妹，那个被怨灵迷惑的女子，对我做了这样的事。 [party.comp etheryn |瑞恩在你身旁倒抽着气，眼睛瞪得大大的。“什么？她为什么要这么做？我怎么从来没听说过你？ |为什么一位北方精灵公主会攻击你呢？ ] 艾希强压下内心的犹豫，继续说道：“艾薇，我亲爱的朋友。我们曾经一起走遍各地，做着许多好事，但当我在伤势痊愈后休息时，她却独自离开了……她打算牺牲自己，去消灭那个可怕的怪物。 她的剑在怪物的头骨上折断了，但随后她整个人都被那怪物吞了下去。 当她意识到你仍然不明白时，她叹了口气——那是一种沙哑的、带着血腥味的叹息——然后继续说道：“当这样的生物吞下你的时候，它…… 消耗 你……艾薇来到了我的家中，当我站起来的时候，她突然袭击了我，将我的翅膀紧紧束缚住，让我无法逃脱。” 她的声音变得尖锐而刺耳，这种声音仿佛沿着你的脊椎一直传下来，其威力之大几乎会让你失去行动的能力。有那么一瞬间，虽然很短暂，你真的能够感受到这种古老而强大的生物所带来的痛苦。 [party.som | |也是如此 [companion1.name]从目前的情况来看…… [companion1.mf |他 |她 ] 颤抖着。 |从你们周围的同伴们努力抑制颤抖的样子来看，他们也是如此。 ] 她用那种破碎的声音说着，这种声音给我带来的伤痛比任何背叛都要深刻。当艾薇准备彻底结束我的生命时，她拿出了那把我一年前送给她的、同样精美的钉头锤。” 阿什的声音有些颤抖，但她还是继续说下去。 [party.comp etheryn |可怜的瑞恩紧紧地听着每一个字，眼睛依然睁得大大的，此刻正闪烁着泪光。 |它在拉扯着…… [pc.dcb |即使在你那冰冷的心弦上，也能找到某根富有共鸣的弦，然后疯狂地拨弄它。 |在你内心最柔软的地方，你强忍着喉咙里的哽咽。 ] ] 我看到，我最好的朋友、曾经的爱人，也是我最亲密的倾诉对象，已经不复存在了。这样做让我感到痛苦——至今依然如此——但我还是用龙火将她烧成了灰烬。我竭尽全力地呼吸，直到只剩下灰烬和那根战锤。 我决心结束她的生命，同时拯救她的遗产。” 此刻，那条龙睁开了双眼，清晰地注视着你，它虚弱地抬起头，露出了搁在下巴下的那根钉头锤。那些钉头显然深深地刺入了它的身体，但从那以后，它们就被当作一种保护措施而被留在那里。 亲爱的们，我失去了意识，当我醒来时，所有的战斗都已经结束了。那支长矛始终无法被拔出来，因此我的命运从那时起就被注定了。

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original:
Your mouth[party.som
        | has
        |s have
        |s have
    ] run long dry, and Ashe goes quiet when you fail to follow up with any questions.
    
    "Why can't you get the spear out?" you finally query, looking at the injury again. Age and blood-scent aside, it's not buried so deeply it couldn't be removed. The barbs aren't even penetrating the deepest part of the wound.
    
    "Ah, that... yes I suppose you don't know this weapon, do you?" Ashe mutters, eyes tired half-lids once more. "The Amazon Spear can only be used by royalty, direct lines. Ivy got it from an old jotun king... noble I may be, but royalty I'm not. I can't draw it free, and such attempts breed only further pain."
    
    [party.comp etheryn
        |"I could take it out!" Ryn steps up, swallowing her fear and crouching down to look at Ashe earnestly. 
        
        Ashe inhales sharply, eyes squeezing shut hard enough to wring moisture from them. "You're of Atheldred's line?"
        
        "[ryn.lnhConfidence
            |Y-yes...
            |I, uh, am.
            |I am, yes.
        ] Etheryn var Ridell. Atheldred was my grandma... not that I ever got to see her alive, or Iveryn."
        
        Ashe inhales sharply, and regrets the reaction almost immediately based on her pained, hissing exhale. "I miss her so dearly, my friend... Lady Etheryn your offer honors and humbles me more than you could ever imagine." You can practically hear the 'but' that follows, as can your elven companion. "I cannot let you; the Amazon Spear is a weapon destined for conquest, and the thought of another of my wonderful friend's line touching it near breaks my heart."
        |"Etheryn could take it out," you offer. "She's Queen Atheldred's granddaughter. I'm sure she'd be glad to help you at the drop of a hat."
        
        Ashe inhales sharply, and regrets the reaction almost immediately based on her pained, hissing exhale. "I— no, I could not... the Amazon Spear is a weapon destined for conquest, and the thought of another of my dear friend's line touching it breaks my heart. I would rather die than let that happen again."
    ]
    
    You step closer, [party.comp etheryn
        |placing a hand on Ryn's shoulder.
        |trying not to cringe at the scent of that pending death.
    ] "Surely we can do something, then?"
    
    The dragon falls silent, taking slow, careful breaths. "Do you know other members of royalty? Ones whose dispositions would resist such influences, or be unimpacted?"
    
    [var0
        |"No... not yet, I don't."
        
        "Then... I will wait, or perish. But I thank you. If you will excuse me... I will be trying to sleep until then. Go with warmest blessings, and the brilliance of a sunfire." Ashe closes her eyes and goes still, breathing so shallowly she looks to be deceased already.
        
        [party.randComp agni arona atugia brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv
            |"We have to help this ancient paladin. It is a crime to see that flame gutter out." Agni stares at the wound, still drowning in the sad dragon's story.
            |Arona grunts and looks away. "Well, now I feel shitty. We should keep an eye out for some hot dommy princess somewhere."
            |Atugia bites her lip and looks to you, shaking her head slowly after a moment's consideration. "I know nobility, not royalty. We have to find someone."
            |Brienne lets out a sad moo, hugging you tightly. "What an awful tale."
            |Brint grimaces, thumping his palm and casting his gaze around the room. "This goes over my head, but I can hardly let someone suffer for nothing. We should keep an eye open."
            |Cait's the very picture of tear-filled sorrow, motioning to hug your arm. "How horrible... we have to do something."
            |[etheryn.lnhConfidence
                |"I— I promise I'll find someone for you, Ashe."
                |"I promise I'll find someone for you Ashe."
                |"I feel like a terrible princess for just leaving you in pain, I swear on my name I'll find someone for you though. I swear it."
            ] Ryn gulps down a voice-cracking sob and turns away.
            |"This is a truly distressing tale, and a grim sight for someone who should be so... glorious. Should we find a suiting prince or princess, we will have to invite them, no?" Kiyoko's tails swish pensively, though her fingers remain resolutely placed to shield her nose from death.
            |Quin grunts and crosses his arms, looking to you. "I'm trying to figure out some kind of loophole for royalty, but I don't think a magic spear's going to be fooled."
            |Viv's expression is the picture of sour, lips pursed tightly and body taut with tension. "How hard can it be to find a princess? I'm sure we will before... the worst happens."
        ]
        |[var1
            |[azzy.around
                |Azzy purses her lips and scratches her jaw. "I could do it."
                
                You spin around to see the honey-hornet in thought, before she gives you a brilliant smile. [azzy.kdb
                    |"I am my mother's daughter, all Vesparan knights are children of a queen, who is in turn the child of a queen, and queens going back until we've ever existed. Technically, I am a princess... just missing the crown."
                    |
                    |"I mean, like... mom's a queen, her mom was queen, her mom was queen. That means I could be a queen, and I'm royalty."
                ]
                
                Ashe stirs a little, visibly wincing at the discomfort before letting the tension go again. "That... if you are certain, it could be done."
                |"What about Azzy? She's a hornet knight — a Vesparan — and technically a princess. Her mom's a queen, and I'm pretty sure they're all[pc.isBimbo
                    |, like,
                ] born that way."
            ]
        ]
        
        [var2
            |Come to think of it; Evelyn, back at the Frost Hound, is a princess. Surely she would appreciate an ancient, powerful, land-conquering artifact... probably more than Azzy would. "I do also know another member of royalty who could use the help..."
        ] 
        
        The golden dragon's whole body attempts to stir, before eventually failing. Ashe's voice is nothing but a weak, hopeful whisper. "Really?"
        
        "Yes, really."
    ]
rows.translation:
你的嘴[party.som
        | 拥有
        |拥有
        |拥有
    ] 然而，最终一切都无果而终，当你没有再提出任何问题时，艾希也变得沉默不语。

“为什么你取不出那支长矛呢？”你终于问道，再次观察那处伤口。抛开年龄和血腥味不谈，那支长矛并没有埋得那么深，应该能够取出来才对。 这些倒钩甚至都无法刺入伤口的最深处。

“啊，那个……嗯，我想你应该不认识这种武器吧？”艾什低声说道，她那半闭的双眼显得十分疲惫。“这种‘亚马逊长矛’只有王室成员才能使用。 艾薇是从一位古老的巨人之王那里得到的……虽然我身份高贵，但并不属于王室。我无法免费获得它，而任何试图获取它的努力只会带来更多的痛苦。
    
    [party.comp etheryn
        |我可以把它取出来！”瑞恩走上前，强压下恐惧，蹲下来认真地看着艾什。

艾什猛地吸了一口气，双眼紧闭到几乎挤不出眼泪的程度。“你是阿瑟德雷德的后裔吗？[ryn.lnhConfidence
            |是的……
            |我，呃，是。
            |是的，我就是。
        ] 埃瑟琳·瓦·里德尔。阿瑟雷德是我的祖母……不过我从未有机会见到她活着的样子，艾弗琳也没有。

阿什猛地吸了一口气，几乎立刻就因为自己那痛苦而嘶哑的呼气声而后悔自己的反应。“我非常想念她，我的朋友。……埃瑟琳女士，您的提议让我感到无比荣幸，同时也让我深感谦卑，这种感受恐怕您根本无法想象。”你几乎能听到接下来那句“但是”，你的精灵同伴也听得到了。“我无法接受您的请求；亚马逊之矛是一件注定用于征服的武器，一想到我的这位挚友的后代会接触到它，我就心如刀绞。"
        |埃瑟琳完全可以胜任这个任务，”你说道，“她是阿瑟尔雷德女王的孙女，我相信她一定会毫不犹豫地帮助你的。”

阿什猛地吸了一口气，但紧接着，她从自己痛苦而嘶哑的呼气声中意识到，自己刚刚的反应有些过激了。“不……我做不到……‘亚马逊之矛’是一件专为征服而设计的武器，如果让我珍视的朋友们的后代再次使用它，我会心碎的。我宁愿死，也不愿让这种事再次发生。
    ]
    
    你向前迈了一步， [party.comp etheryn
        |将手放在瑞恩的肩上。
        |试图忍住对那种即将到来的死亡气息所产生的反感。
    ] 那么，我们肯定能想出办法来吧？”

巨龙沉默了片刻，缓缓而谨慎地呼吸着。“你知道其他皇室成员吗？那些性格坚强、不会受到这种影响的人，或者那些根本不会被这些因素所动摇的人。
    
    [var0
        |不……还没有，我不会的。”

“那么……我就等着，直到死去。但我还是要谢谢你。如果可以的话，请允许我……在那之前尝试入睡。愿你们带着最温暖的祝福和太阳之火的辉煌离去。”艾什闭上了眼睛，一动不动，呼吸变得如此微弱，看起来仿佛已经去世了一般。
        
        [party.randComp agni arona atugia brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv
            |我们必须帮助这位古老的圣骑士。眼睁睁看着那火焰逐渐熄灭，实在是一种罪过。”阿格尼凝视着那道伤口，心中仍回荡着那条悲伤的龙的故事。
            |阿罗纳哼了一声，然后把目光移开了。“好吧，现在我感觉糟透了。我们还是应该留意一下有没有哪个强势的女王公主吧。
            |阿图吉亚咬了咬嘴唇，看着你，思考片刻后缓缓摇了摇头。“我了解贵族，但并不了解皇室成员。我们还得再找其他人。
            |布蕾妮发出一声悲伤的哞声，紧紧地抱住了你。“真是个可怕的故事啊。
            |布林特皱了皱眉头，拍了拍手掌，然后环顾了一下房间。“这超出了我的理解范围，但我也不能眼睁睁看着别人白白受苦。我们应该密切关注这件事。
            |凯特满脸泪水，显得十分悲伤，她伸手挽住了你的手臂：“太可怕了……我们必须想办法才行。
            |[etheryn.lnhConfidence
                |我……我保证会为你找到合适的人选，艾希。
                |我保证会为你找到合适的人选，艾什。
                |让我把你留在痛苦中，我觉得自己真像个糟糕的公主……但我发誓，一定会为你找到合适的人。真的。
            ] 瑞恩强忍住那声令人心碎的哭泣，转身离开了。
            |这真是一个令人痛心的故事，对于一个本该如此……辉煌的人来说，更是令人难堪的场景。如果我们能找到合适的王子或公主，就必须要邀请他们来，对吧？”清子的尾巴忧郁地摆动着，而她的手指却依然紧紧地捂着鼻子，仿佛在躲避什么可怕的东西。
            |奎因哼了一声，双臂交叉，看着你说：“我正在想办法找出某种规避版税规定的漏洞，但我觉得魔法长矛这种东西是不会被骗到的。
            |薇芙的表情活像一个酸溜溜的人，嘴唇紧紧地抿着，全身都绷得紧紧的，充满了紧张的气氛。“找一位公主到底有那么难吗？我相信在我们……遇到最糟糕的情况之前，一定能找到的。
        ]
        |[var1
            |[azzy.around
                |阿齐抿着嘴唇，挠了挠下巴，说道：“我一定能做到。”

你转过身，看到她正若有所思地望着前方，不久之后，她露出了灿烂的笑容。 [azzy.kdb
                    |我是我母亲的女儿，所有维斯帕兰骑士都是一位女王的孩子，而那位女王本身也是另一位女王的后代。这样的女王世世代代延续下去，直到我们这个时代的诞生。从严格意义上来说，我其实是一位公主……只是还没有戴上王冠而已。
                    |
                    |我的意思是，就像……妈妈是女王，她的母亲也是女王，祖祖辈辈都是女王。这意味着我也可以成为女王，毕竟我也属于王室家族。
                ]
                
                阿什微微动了动，显然是因为不适而皱起了眉头，但很快又放松了下来。“那个……如果你确定的话，应该是可以办到的。
                |那阿齐怎么办？她可是黄蜂骑士团的一员，也是维斯帕兰人，严格来说还是位公主。她的母亲是女王，所以我敢肯定，他们全家……[pc.isBimbo
                    |比如说，
                ] 生来就是这样的。
            ]
        ]
        
        [var2
            |仔细想来，艾芙琳在霜猎犬组织里可是一位公主啊。她肯定会更欣赏这样一件古老而强大的、能够帮助她征服疆土的神器……或许比阿齐还会更看重它呢。“我其实还知道另一位皇室成员也会需要这样的帮助……
        ] 
        
        金龙试图挣扎着动弹，但最终还是失败了。艾什的声音只是微弱而充满希望的低语：“真的吗？”

“是的，真的。
    ]
rows.raw:
'
    Your mouth[party.som
        | has
        |s have
        |s have
    ] run long dry, and Ashe goes quiet when you fail to follow up with any questions.
    
    "Why can't you get the spear out?" you finally query, looking at the injury again. Age and blood-scent aside, it's not buried so deeply it couldn't be removed. The barbs aren't even penetrating the deepest part of the wound.
    
    "Ah, that... yes I suppose you don't know this weapon, do you?" Ashe mutters, eyes tired half-lids once more. "The Amazon Spear can only be used by royalty, direct lines. Ivy got it from an old jotun king... noble I may be, but royalty I'm not. I can't draw it free, and such attempts breed only further pain."
    
    [party.comp etheryn
        |"I could take it out!" Ryn steps up, swallowing her fear and crouching down to look at Ashe earnestly. 
        
        Ashe inhales sharply, eyes squeezing shut hard enough to wring moisture from them. "You're of Atheldred's line?"
        
        "[ryn.lnhConfidence
            |Y-yes...
            |I, uh, am.
            |I am, yes.
        ] Etheryn var Ridell. Atheldred was my grandma... not that I ever got to see her alive, or Iveryn."
        
        Ashe inhales sharply, and regrets the reaction almost immediately based on her pained, hissing exhale. "I miss her so dearly, my friend... Lady Etheryn your offer honors and humbles me more than you could ever imagine." You can practically hear the 'but' that follows, as can your elven companion. "I cannot let you; the Amazon Spear is a weapon destined for conquest, and the thought of another of my wonderful friend's line touching it near breaks my heart."
        |"Etheryn could take it out," you offer. "She's Queen Atheldred's granddaughter. I'm sure she'd be glad to help you at the drop of a hat."
        
        Ashe inhales sharply, and regrets the reaction almost immediately based on her pained, hissing exhale. "I— no, I could not... the Amazon Spear is a weapon destined for conquest, and the thought of another of my dear friend's line touching it breaks my heart. I would rather die than let that happen again."
    ]
    
    You step closer, [party.comp etheryn
        |placing a hand on Ryn's shoulder.
        |trying not to cringe at the scent of that pending death.
    ] "Surely we can do something, then?"
    
    The dragon falls silent, taking slow, careful breaths. "Do you know other members of royalty? Ones whose dispositions would resist such influences, or be unimpacted?"
    
    [var0
        |"No... not yet, I don't."
        
        "Then... I will wait, or perish. But I thank you. If you will excuse me... I will be trying to sleep until then. Go with warmest blessings, and the brilliance of a sunfire." Ashe closes her eyes and goes still, breathing so shallowly she looks to be deceased already.
        
        [party.randComp agni arona atugia brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv
            |"We have to help this ancient paladin. It is a crime to see that flame gutter out." Agni stares at the wound, still drowning in the sad dragon's story.
            |Arona grunts and looks away. "Well, now I feel shitty. We should keep an eye out for some hot dommy princess somewhere."
            |Atugia bites her lip and looks to you, shaking her head slowly after a moment's consideration. "I know nobility, not royalty. We have to find someone."
            |Brienne lets out a sad moo, hugging you tightly. "What an awful tale."
            |Brint grimaces, thumping his palm and casting his gaze around the room. "This goes over my head, but I can hardly let someone suffer for nothing. We should keep an eye open."
            |Cait's the very picture of tear-filled sorrow, motioning to hug your arm. "How horrible... we have to do something."
            |[etheryn.lnhConfidence
                |"I— I promise I'll find someone for you, Ashe."
                |"I promise I'll find someone for you Ashe."
                |"I feel like a terrible princess for just leaving you in pain, I swear on my name I'll find someone for you though. I swear it."
            ] Ryn gulps down a voice-cracking sob and turns away.
            |"This is a truly distressing tale, and a grim sight for someone who should be so... glorious. Should we find a suiting prince or princess, we will have to invite them, no?" Kiyoko's tails swish pensively, though her fingers remain resolutely placed to shield her nose from death.
            |Quin grunts and crosses his arms, looking to you. "I'm trying to figure out some kind of loophole for royalty, but I don't think a magic spear's going to be fooled."
            |Viv's expression is the picture of sour, lips pursed tightly and body taut with tension. "How hard can it be to find a princess? I'm sure we will before... the worst happens."
        ]
        |[var1
            |[azzy.around
                |Azzy purses her lips and scratches her jaw. "I could do it."
                
                You spin around to see the honey-hornet in thought, before she gives you a brilliant smile. [azzy.kdb
                    |"I am my mother's daughter, all Vesparan knights are children of a queen, who is in turn the child of a queen, and queens going back until we've ever existed. Technically, I am a princess... just missing the crown."
                    |
                    |"I mean, like... mom's a queen, her mom was queen, her mom was queen. That means I could be a queen, and I'm royalty."
                ]
                
                Ashe stirs a little, visibly wincing at the discomfort before letting the tension go again. "That... if you are certain, it could be done."
                |"What about Azzy? She's a hornet knight — a Vesparan — and technically a princess. Her mom's a queen, and I'm pretty sure they're all[pc.isBimbo
                    |, like,
                ] born that way."
            ]
        ]
        
        [var2
            |Come to think of it; Evelyn, back at the Frost Hound, is a princess. Surely she would appreciate an ancient, powerful, land-conquering artifact... probably more than Azzy would. "I do also know another member of royalty who could use the help..."
        ] 
        
        The golden dragon's whole body attempts to stir, before eventually failing. Ashe's voice is nothing but a weak, hopeful whisper. "Really?"
        
        "Yes, really."
    ]
    '

"I'll go and get Azzy."
    
    You've never seen a dragon smile before, but it's a weak thing that lifts the corners of her muzzle. "What is this Azzy like?"
    
    You do your best to describe the knightly virtues of your [liaden.poly
        |polyamorous cuddlebug
        |honey-sweet companion
    ], and there's the weakest, amused little twitch of the dragon's tail around her throne. "Very well, I shall await..."

rows.original:
"I can get Evelyn, she's a princess."
    
    You've never seen a dragon smile before, but it's a weak thing that lifts the corners of her muzzle. "What is this Evelyn like?"
    
    There are few words you can bring to mind when it comes to describing the awe Evelyn can inspire in you, but you do your best to describe her in as positive and... justice-oriented a light as you can. The rest will be down to Evelyn herself.
    
    There's the weakest, amused little twitch of the dragon's tail around her throne. "Very well, I shall await..."
rows.translation:
我可以得到伊芙琳，她可是一位公主啊。”

你从未见过龙会微笑，但它的嘴角确实微微上扬，露出一种淡淡的笑容。“那么，伊芙琳到底是怎样的一个人呢？”

当试图描述伊芙琳带给你的那种震撼与敬畏之情时，真正能够用语言表达出来的词语其实并不多，但你还是尽力用最积极的语言来描述她。.. 尽量保持公正与客观。其余的，就交由伊芙琳自己来处理了。

龙的尾巴在她的王座周围轻轻摆动了一下，仿佛在表示赞同。“好吧，那我就会等待……

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: [var0|Ashe hasn't moved since you last saw her — unsurprisingly — but her bloodshot eyes track your return warily. "Ah... you've come back. I know you said you would, but still, I part expected to see this sliver of hope come to nothing." It looks as though Azyrran's heart might break, and the busty hornet approaches with a click of chitin on stone. "Sorry you've been waiting for so long; I can help right away, I'm sure."] "Are you certain, absolutely sure, Azzy?" You ask, looking between your [azzy.kdb |knightly companion | |bubbly-bimbo partner ], and the massive, exhausted bulk of Ashe. The hornet smiles warmly, following your gaze before gently putting down her lance and shield. [azzy.kdb | | |She focuses on her collar for a moment, brow wrinkling in frankly-adorable consternation. Her body performs the familiar process of de-attuning to the honey-gem choker, and she straightens herself out again while Ashe watches on with rapt curiosity. ]"Of course I am! I would be a terrible Lumian without compassion, and I have no fear; no matter what this spear might make of me, I will be me, and do the best for everyone." [flags.LUMIA_QUEST |You try to give Ashelander the most reassuring smile you can, waving your hands gently. "Iveryn was known as a Lumian, before she became a martyr fighting the ancient wraith... Ashe takes a deep — or at least as deep as she can — shuddering breath, but her voice is a soft whisper. "Then I will pray to this Lumia too, and I wish you both the best of luck. If you're ready to begin, I am ready to end." |Ashe's voice is a soft whisper, and she watches the two of you cautiously. "I hope that this Lumia serves you well, and I wish you both the best of luck. If you're ready to begin, I am ready to end." ] Like a shiv in the heart, you swallow the lump in your throat back down and let Azzy get started. There's a lot of wincing and groaning on the part of the huge golden dragon as she's clambered on; it's all well and good flying up there, but she needs her footing in order to get a good yank. Azyrran takes one deep breath once she's in position, biting her lip. "Are you ready, Ashe?" The pregnant silence goes on for what feels like a small eternity, before she finally mutters a muted "yes..." She doesn't sound so certain, but at this point you've come too far to stop; Azzy nods, sets her stance, grips [silly |it, and rips it |the haft, and hauls backward ] in one — mostly — smooth motion. Her wings snap up and she catches the air before she can tumble, and for a brief moment it's all you can do to fight down your gorge at the immediately potent stench of blood. [silly |It's enough to make a man sick... ] Ashe doesn't even roar out, simply going limp instead. "It's done... I'll finally be able to sleep for good." What dimness remains of the dragon's scales begins to lose its final luster, and while you're choking on blood it hits you with certainty; this dragon is dying. "I... didn't want to tell you, in case your resolve wavered; I'm afraid. I'm afraid of death, and the end. The magic in that spear was basically life-support for me, keeping my heart from beating too hard..." She takes a deep, shuddering breath, attempting to stand before going limp again. "I'm still so scared, even after the pain. I never got to do more good deeds, to bask in the sun, to see my scales shine again..." The gulps — a motion that's loud enough to actually hear every muscle contract powerfully — and looks up at Azzy, even as the hornet begins to buzz down to the stone. Beads of sweat begin to form on your companion's brow, both hands gripping the spear tightly in order to remain upright. The dragon lifts her chin, slowly and gently. "I do not wish to be gone forever. Please, the mace... my dearest and last friend's. Place it in my mouth." Ashe's bloodshot, tired eyes well up with tears. "I do not have long, and would breathe my last into it. It was truly a great work, magic runs through the veins of it." Sparing a glance for your sweating companion, you stalk up to the dragon's mouth and tug it free from her jaw, where the flanges have long been dug inside. It's a beautiful piece, whose blades are reminiscent, surprisingly, of flowering womanhood, and whose head is capped with a little pink heart gem you would call adorable if it weren't so desperately in need of a cleaning. You place the mace head into Ashe's mouth, careful not to place your hand too deeply should it be lost. "[pc.name]?" Azzy gasps, grinding her thighs together. "I do think something's happening." When she bites her lip it's with pointed incisors, and there's an exquisite depth all of a sudden to her perfect black eyes. Your attention is being dragged between a dying dragon and your sweating companion, until Ashe heaves in a deep breath; some utterly unknown, animal fear grips the two of you bone deep. You're trapped like dazzled deers, all it would take is a moment to turn you into so much scorched dust on the wind. When Azyrran's hand whips out and grabs you tightly for dear life, you do nothing to pull away. But the prophesied exhalation never comes— not for you two, at least. She breathes, a long, slow, deep breath. Heat sears the flagstones around her body, turning the air to shimmering steam at the heart of a fire, and the flanged mace's head glows forge-hot. When the silence begins to fill the room, and Azzy has let go of you, you slowly, cautiously, approach the still dragon. This time there's no inhale; she doesn't breathe in again... nor will she ever. The clang of the mace hitting the ground has you leaping out of your skin, and it rolls towards you before stopping on its flanges.
rows.translation: [var0|自从你上次见到她之后，艾希就一直一动不动地待在原地——这也并不奇怪。不过，她那双布满血丝的眼睛正警惕地注视着你回来的身影。“啊……你回来了。我知道你说过会回来的，但说实话，我其实还是预料到这份希望最终会破灭。” 阿兹兰看起来仿佛心都要碎了，而那个身材丰满、长着角的女子则发出甲壳与石头碰撞的声音，走了过来。“很抱歉让你等了这么久；我相信，我现在就能帮你。] 你确定吗？真的确定吗，阿齐？”你问道，目光在两人之间来回扫视。 [azzy.kdb |骑士伙伴 | |活泼可爱的搭档 ]还有那个庞大而疲惫的艾希。 黄蜂温暖地笑了笑，顺着你的视线看去，然后轻轻放下了她的长矛和盾牌。 [azzy.kdb | | |她盯着自己的项圈看了一会儿，眉头紧锁，露出一种既可爱又令人怜爱的困惑表情。她的身体开始逐渐适应那条琥珀色项圈，过了一会儿，她又恢复了正常的姿势，而阿什则怀着浓厚的好奇心注视着这一幕。 ]当然啦！如果没有同情心，我就不是一个合格的卢米安人了。我毫不畏惧；无论这把长矛会把我变成什么样，我依然会做自己，为所有人尽我最大的努力。 [flags.LUMIA_QUEST |你尽力向阿舍兰德露出最让人安心的微笑，轻轻挥动着双手。“艾弗琳在成为对抗那些古老怨灵的烈士之前，其实是一个卢米安人……” 阿舍深吸了一口气——至少是她所能做到的最深的一次——她的声音却轻得像耳语。“那么我也会向这位卢米安人祈祷，祝你们俩一切顺利。如果你们准备开始了，我也准备结束这一切了。 |艾什的声音轻柔得像耳语一般，她小心翼翼地注视着你们两个人。“希望这款Lumia能为大家带来帮助，也祝你们一切顺利。如果你们准备好了开始，那我也就准备结束这一切了。 ] 就像有一把利刃刺进了心脏，你强忍住喉咙里的哽咽，让阿齐开始行动吧。 当那条巨大的金色巨龙开始攀爬时，它不断地发出痛苦的呻吟声。虽然在高空中飞行确实很惬意，但它必须稳稳地抓住支撑点，才能用力拉扯那些东西。 阿兹兰在摆好姿势后深吸了一口气，然后咬住了嘴唇：“你准备好了吗，艾希？” 那种令人窒息的沉默持续了仿佛永恒般漫长的时间，最终她才低声回答道：“嗯……” 她的声音听起来并不十分确定，但在这个时候，你已经走得太远了，不能再停下来；阿兹兰点了点头，调整了自己的姿势，然后握紧了手中的武器…… [silly |抓住它，然后狠狠地撕碎它。 |握住柄部，然后向后拉。 ] 她以一种几乎流畅的动作完成了整个动作。她的翅膀迅速张开，在身体开始翻滚之前便升入了空中。有那么一瞬间，你真的不得不强忍住想要作呕的冲动——因为空气中弥漫着那股浓烈的血腥味。 [silly |这真的会让任何人感到恶心…… ] 阿什甚至没有发出一声吼叫，只是缓缓软了下来。“一切都结束了……我终于可以永远安眠了。”那条龙鳞上残存的微弱光泽也在逐渐消失，而当你被鲜血呛到时，你清楚地意识到：这条龙正在死去。 我……本来不想告诉你的，生怕你的决心会动摇。我害怕死亡，害怕一切终结。那把长矛中的魔法对我而言，其实就是维持生命的支柱，它让我的心跳不会过于剧烈……”她深吸一口气，身体微微颤抖着，试图站起身来，却又再次软弱地倒下了。 即使疼痛已经过去，我仍然感到非常害怕。我再也没有机会去做更多的好事，再也没有机会沐浴在阳光下，再也没有机会让自己的鳞片重新焕发光彩……”他不断地吞咽着口水，那种吞咽的动作如此剧烈，以至于都能听到每一块肌肉都在强烈地收缩；他抬头望着阿齐，而那只大黄蜂也已经开始朝那块石头飞了过来。你的同伴的额头上开始冒出汗珠，他双手紧紧地握着长矛，努力保持着站立的姿势。 龙缓缓而轻柔地抬起了她的下巴。“我并不想永远离开这个世界。求你，把那根权杖……我最珍视、也是最后的朋友送给我的那根权杖，放在我的嘴里吧。”艾什那双布满血丝、疲惫不堪的眼睛里涌出了泪水。“我的时日不多了，我想在它里面咽下最后一口气。这确实是一件杰作，魔力流淌在它的每一寸金属之中。 你瞥了眼正在流汗的同伴，然后走到龙的嘴边，将那把长矛从它的牙缝中拔了出来——那些锋利的刃口早已深深地嵌入了龙的牙槽之中。这是一件精美的武器，它的刀刃形状令人联想到盛开的花朵，而它的矛头上还镶嵌着一颗粉红色的宝石，要是它不是急需清洗的话，你一定会觉得它非常可爱。你把那把长矛的矛头放进了艾什的嘴里，同时小心翼翼地避免把手伸得太深，以免它不小心掉进去。 "[pc.name]？！”阿齐倒吸一口凉气，大腿不自觉地相互摩擦着。“我确实觉得有些事情正在发生……”当她咬住嘴唇时，那锋利的门牙清晰地显露出来，这一幕显得格外迷人…… 深度 突然，她的那双完美的黑色眼睛吸引了你的注意。 你的注意力在一条即将死去的巨龙和你的那位满头大汗的同伴之间来回切换，直到阿什深深地吸了一口气——一种完全陌生的、源自野兽内心的恐惧突然笼罩了你们两人。 你们就像那些被迷住的鹿一样被困住了，只需要一瞬间，你们就会化作随风飘散的灰烬。当阿兹兰伸出手来，紧紧抓住你们的时候，你们却丝毫没有试图挣脱。 然而，那预言中的结局始终没有到来——至少对你们两个人来说没有。 她深深地吸了一口气，那是一口漫长、缓慢而深沉的呼吸。周围铺着的石板被热气烤得发烫，空气在火焰的中心处变成了闪烁的蒸汽，而那把带有凸边的钉头锤也变得炽热无比。 当房间里渐渐陷入寂静，而阿齐也松开了对你的束缚时，你便小心翼翼地、慢慢地走向那条静止不动的巨龙。 这一次，她没有吸气；她再也没有呼吸过……也不会再呼吸了。那柄钉头锤撞击地面的声响让你吓得魂不附体，它滚向你的方向，最终在边缘处停了下来。
rows.raw: " [var0|Ashe hasn't moved since you last saw her — unsurprisingly — but her bloodshot eyes track your return warily. "Ah... you've come back. I know you said you would, but still, I part expected to see this sliver of hope come to nothing." It looks as though Azyrran's heart might break, and the busty hornet approaches with a click of chitin on stone. "Sorry you've been waiting for so long; I can help right away, I'm sure."] "Are you certain, absolutely sure, Azzy?" You ask, looking between your [azzy.kdb |knightly companion | |bubbly-bimbo partner ], and the massive, exhausted bulk of Ashe. The hornet smiles warmly, following your gaze before gently putting down her lance and shield. [azzy.kdb | | |She focuses on her collar for a moment, brow wrinkling in frankly-adorable consternation. Her body performs the familiar process of de-attuning to the honey-gem choker, and she straightens herself out again while Ashe watches on with rapt curiosity. ]"Of course I am! I would be a terrible Lumian without compassion, and I have no fear; no matter what this spear might make of me, I will be me, and do the best for everyone." [flags.LUMIA_QUEST |You try to give Ashelander the most reassuring smile you can, waving your hands gently. "Iveryn was known as a Lumian, before she became a martyr fighting the ancient wraith... Ashe takes a deep — or at least as deep as she can — shuddering breath, but her voice is a soft whisper. "Then I will pray to this Lumia too, and I wish you both the best of luck. If you're ready to begin, I am ready to end." |Ashe's voice is a soft whisper, and she watches the two of you cautiously. "I hope that this Lumia serves you well, and I wish you both the best of luck. If you're ready to begin, I am ready to end." ] Like a shiv in the heart, you swallow the lump in your throat back down and let Azzy get started. There's a lot of wincing and groaning on the part of the huge golden dragon as she's clambered on; it's all well and good flying up there, but she needs her footing in order to get a good yank. Azyrran takes one deep breath once she's in position, biting her lip. "Are you ready, Ashe?" The pregnant silence goes on for what feels like a small eternity, before she finally mutters a muted "yes..." She doesn't sound so certain, but at this point you've come too far to stop; Azzy nods, sets her stance, grips [silly |it, and rips it |the haft, and hauls backward ] in one — mostly — smooth motion. Her wings snap up and she catches the air before she can tumble, and for a brief moment it's all you can do to fight down your gorge at the immediately potent stench of blood. [silly |It's enough to make a man sick... ] Ashe doesn't even roar out, simply going limp instead. "It's done... I'll finally be able to sleep for good." What dimness remains of the dragon's scales begins to lose its final luster, and while you're choking on blood it hits you with certainty; this dragon is dying. "I... didn't want to tell you, in case your resolve wavered; I'm afraid. I'm afraid of death, and the end. The magic in that spear was basically life-support for me, keeping my heart from beating too hard..." She takes a deep, shuddering breath, attempting to stand before going limp again. "I'm still so scared, even after the pain. I never got to do more good deeds, to bask in the sun, to see my scales shine again..." The gulps — a motion that's loud enough to actually hear every muscle contract powerfully — and looks up at Azzy, even as the hornet begins to buzz down to the stone. Beads of sweat begin to form on your companion's brow, both hands gripping the spear tightly in order to remain upright. The dragon lifts her chin, slowly and gently. "I do not wish to be gone forever. Please, the mace... my dearest and last friend's. Place it in my mouth." Ashe's bloodshot, tired eyes well up with tears. "I do not have long, and would breathe my last into it. It was truly a great work, magic runs through the veins of it." Sparing a glance for your sweating companion, you stalk up to the dragon's mouth and tug it free from her jaw, where the flanges have long been dug inside. It's a beautiful piece, whose blades are reminiscent, surprisingly, of flowering womanhood, and whose head is capped with a little pink heart gem you would call adorable if it weren't so desperately in need of a cleaning. You place the mace head into Ashe's mouth, careful not to place your hand too deeply should it be lost. "[pc.name]?" Azzy gasps, grinding her thighs together. "I do think something's happening." When she bites her lip it's with pointed incisors, and there's an exquisite depth all of a sudden to her perfect black eyes. Your attention is being dragged between a dying dragon and your sweating companion, until Ashe heaves in a deep breath; some utterly unknown, animal fear grips the two of you bone deep. You're trapped like dazzled deers, all it would take is a moment to turn you into so much scorched dust on the wind. When Azyrran's hand whips out and grabs you tightly for dear life, you do nothing to pull away. But the prophesied exhalation never comes— not for you two, at least. She breathes, a long, slow, deep breath. Heat sears the flagstones around her body, turning the air to shimmering steam at the heart of a fire, and the flanged mace's head glows forge-hot. When the silence begins to fill the room, and Azzy has let go of you, you slowly, cautiously, approach the still dragon. This time there's no inhale; she doesn't breathe in again... nor will she ever. The clang of the mace hitting the ground has you leaping out of your skin, and it rolls towards you before stopping on its flanges. "

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original:
The scorching heat has stripped every speck of dust, grind, and grime from this beautiful bronze weapon, and though it had but moments ago been burning in a draconic furnace it's merely warm — almost comforting — to the touch. 
        
        You look up at Ashe's body, ready to reach a hand out to the dragon's [silly
            |snoot
            |muzzle
        ]... you're brought short by the sight of her immensity breaking down; the smell of blood fades like an afterthought, and golden dust forms on the surface of her scales. Then her scales appear to become the dust, followed by the rest of her body. There's no goodbye, only golden dust carried on a sudden draft, capturing the last ebbs of [dayNight
            |sun
            |moon
        ]light bleeding into the room.
rows.translation:
炙热的高温已经将这把精美的青铜武器上的每一粒灰尘、碎屑和污垢都清除干净了。尽管它刚才还在龙焰熔炉中燃烧，但现在摸起来只是温热而已——甚至有一种让人感到舒适的感觉。

你抬头看向艾希的身体，准备伸出手去帮助那条龙…… [silly
            |傲慢的态度
            |封口处
        ]……然而，当你看到她那庞大的身躯开始崩解时，一切希望都破灭了；血液的气味渐渐消失，仿佛只是事后才被想起来的事情，而金色的尘埃则在她鳞片表面堆积起来。接着，她的鳞片似乎也变成了尘埃，随后她的整个身体也渐渐化为尘土。没有告别，只有被一阵突如其来的风卷走的金色尘埃，带走了她最后的生命痕迹…… [dayNight
            |太阳
            |月亮
        ]光线洒进了房间。

        ]... you're brought short by the sight of her immensity breaking down; the smell of blood fades like an afterthought, and golden dust forms on the surface of her scales. Then her scales appear to become the dust, followed by the rest of her body. There's no goodbye, only golden dust carried on a sudden draft, capturing the last ebbs of [dayNight
