rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: You hook the mace onto your belt and bend over, resting your hands on your knees and waiting for your hammering heartbeat to calm down; being jerked emotionally from fear to misery is a new one. Azzy steps up behind you, but there's something different about her heeled, chitinous footsteps. A more resounding 'clickedy-clack'. "My [azzy.fucked |sweet |dear ], I think something has changed." Azyrran's voice carries a salacious reverberation, from a greater height than you're used to. "Did you get shorter?"
rows.translation: 你将那根狼牙棒挂在腰带上，然后弯下腰，双手撑在膝盖上，等待着自己那剧烈跳动的心跳逐渐平静下来——这种因恐惧而情绪波动、继而陷入痛苦的状态，确实是一种全新的体验。阿齐从你身后走了过来，但她那穿着高跟鞋、脚步带着“甲壳质”质感的声音，似乎有些不同…… 那种声音，更加响亮了…… 咔嗒咔嗒我的 [azzy.fucked |甜美 |亲爱的 ]我觉得有些事情变了吧。”阿兹兰的声音带着一种令人遐想的回响，从比你习惯的高度传来。“你是变矮了吗？
rows.raw: " You hook the mace onto your belt and bend over, resting your hands on your knees and waiting for your hammering heartbeat to calm down; being jerked emotionally from fear to misery is a new one. Azzy steps up behind you, but there's something different about her heeled, chitinous footsteps. A more resounding 'clickedy-clack'. "My [azzy.fucked |sweet |dear ], I think something has changed." Azyrran's voice carries a salacious reverberation, from a greater height than you're used to. "Did you get shorter?" "

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: "Bwuh," your tongue has trouble forming words, adding yet another layer to the emotional whiplash. Azzy smiles and tilts her head to the side, wings twitching. "I'm itchy all over, and everything's fitting very differently." When she tilts her head she seems to notice the additional weight, reaching up flinching when horns meet her fingertips. "Oh." Her shaggy blonde locks hang down to her thighs now, impossibly long and glossy. Scales with the same deep shine as her chitin pattern her hips and cheeks, and the definition of her abs could grate a smaller [pc.mf |man |woman ] to powder. Her wings too, despite being made mostly of their usual shimmering membranes glow faintly to match her eyes, and are set inside the tightly-scaled and hooked frame of a dragon's own. Not even her clothing remains unchanged; the majority of the fabric has shifted in sheen and become sheer enough to see clearly through, while the armor has migrated towards her shoulders to set for an imposing mantle alongside her fuzzy hornet-fluff. Once your jaw has found a way to click shut again, you speak up. "How do you feel?" Azzy purses her glistening black lips, trailing her fingers across the scale-ridge protecting her elfin ears. "I don't... know how to put it into words. I feel incredible; everything is so tough, and tight. There's a fire inside of me and I have nowhere for it to go. It's also very difficult to be horny and sad about Miss Ashe at the same time." Her brow furrows at that. "My head feels clear, at least. Full of purpose. [azzy.fucked |Just... also I want to pin you up against the wall and fill you with eggs, and turn you into my sweet little hive-[pc.mf |husband |wife ] |[azzy.liaden |Just... also I want to pin Liaden up against a wall and fill her with eggs. I want to make her into my sweet little hive-wife |I could also use a sweet, bullyable cutie to pin against a wall and fill with eggs ] ]." [party.comp agni arona atugia brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv |"...And here I thought I'd run out of new experiences in life," Agni mutters. |"Fucking hell, can't say I disagree with that." Arona grunts, somewhat-agape herself; seems she was watching the hornet's transformation while you were distracted. |"I— uh, wow. That is... wow." Atugia just about manages to stop herself from drooling. |"That is an incredible look for you!" Brienne looks shocked herself, poofy-tipped tail swishing around. "I wonder if your honey's changed?" |"...Damn girl, remind me to avoid the room next to yours tonight if I want to get any sleep." Brint grunts; he tries for 'reassuring', but your massive bull-boy[brint.fucked|friend] mostly just looks impressed. |"...Mnf." Cait positively eyefucks the muscular hornet, a throaty purr building up. "Let me know if you need help with that." |[etheryn.lnhConfidence |"I— I... oh Lumia." |"Lumia bless— Azzy, that's quite incredible..." |"Lumia's tits, Azzy! You're..." ] Ryn trails off, trying to think of an apt description for her, before finally settling for awed, horny silence. |"And here I had thought this land was running out of surprises for me..." Even Kiyoko's confidence takes a minor hit in the face of such shock, not to mention the passing of such an ancient creature in her presence. |Quin only just barely bites down a thirsty wolf-whistle, but he looks impressed all the same. "Damn girl, if you want to give all of that muscle a go with me, just say." |[viv.isDemon |"And here I thought my transformation was spectacular..." the demonic Viv sighs softly. "She does look gorgeous, however." |"Mnf, traveling with you only gets better and better, [pc.name]. Look at her; she's gorgeous." ] ] Azzy's luminescent eyes shimmer, and she visibly tamps down on her own enthusiasm. "But... not here. [azzy.fucked |[liaden.poly |Just wait until I have you and Lia to myself, we're going to destroy a bed. |I want to destroy a bed with you. ] |There'll be time for messing around later... and I want to find a mirror! ]" There's still a pile of treasure untouched, as grim as such a thing might be; Ashe certainly won't be using it. As though to begrudge that fact, you're keenly aware of the weight of her mace on your belt... it doesn't stop Azyrran from sauntering over and scooping up as much as she can carry. With a [pc.dcb |wicked grin |sigh |sad sigh ], you make for the waystone out of here, ready to leave behind this now 'freshly-robbed' tomb. Telling Kaina about this is going to be awkward.
rows.translation: 呜……”你的舌头似乎无法正常发音，这种无助感为这种情感上的冲击又增添了一层复杂感。 阿齐微笑着，把头偏向一边，翅膀微微颤动：“我全身都觉得痒痒的，而且所有东西都好像戴在身上不太合适了……当她歪着头时，似乎注意到了那额外的重量。当角触碰到她的指尖时，她立刻缩了缩手，说道：“哦。” 她那浓密的金色长发如今垂到了大腿处，长得简直不可思议，而且还闪闪发亮。 她的臀部与脸颊上分布的几丁质纹理同样散发着深邃的光泽，而她腹部线条的清晰度甚至会让一些身材较瘦的人感到羡慕。 [pc.mf |男人 |女性 ] 她的翅膀也发生了变化——尽管这些翅膀主要由它们惯常使用的那种闪闪发光的膜状组织构成，但现在这些组织也发出了微弱的光芒，颜色与她的眼睛相匹配，而且这些翅膀被嵌入到一条龙那紧密排列、带有钩状的骨架结构之中。 甚至连她的服装也发生了变化：大部分衣料的光泽已经发生了变化，变得足够透明，以至于可以清楚地看到里面的衣物；而她的盔甲则移动到了她的肩膀部位，与她那蓬松的、像黄蜂绒毛一样的毛发一起，形成了一个令人印象深刻的装饰效果。 当你的下巴终于重新恢复到可以正常闭合的状态时，你开口问道：“你感觉怎么样？” 阿齐紧抿着她那双闪闪发光的黑色嘴唇，用手指轻轻抚过那条保护着她精灵般耳朵的鳞片状突起。 我……不知道该怎么用语言来表达。我只是觉得…… 难以置信一切都如此艰难、如此压抑。我内心有一股炽热的情绪，却无处宣泄。同时，对艾什小姐既感到渴望，又感到悲伤，这真的太难了。”说到这里，她的眉头紧锁。“不过至少，我的头脑现在很清醒，也充满了目标感。 [azzy.fucked |我就……还想把你按在墙上，用鸡蛋砸你，然后把你变成我可爱的小蜂巢……[pc.mf |丈夫 |妻子 ] |[azzy.liaden |说真的……我也想把莉亚登逼到墙边，然后用鸡蛋砸她。我想把她变成我那可爱的小妻子。 |我也可以找一个可爱又好欺负的小家伙，把他按在墙上，然后往他身上扔鸡蛋。 ] ]." [party.comp agni arona atugia brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv |……我还以为自己的人生中已经不会再有新的经历了呢，”阿格尼低声说道。 |该死，我确实同意这个说法。”阿罗娜嘟囔道，自己似乎也有些惊讶——看来在你分心的时候，她一直在观察那只大黄蜂的变身过程。 |我……哇，太厉害了。真的……太厉害了。”阿图吉亚几乎强忍住自己流口水的冲动。 |你这样看起来真是太漂亮了！”布蕾妮自己也显得十分惊讶，她那蓬松的尾巴在空气中摇摆着。“不知道你的丈夫是不是也变了吧？ |……该死的丫头，看来今晚如果想睡个好觉的话，还真得避开你旁边的那个房间。”布林特嘟囔道；他本想让自己的话听起来有点“安慰人”，但结果却完全像个莽撞的家伙……[brint.fucked|朋友] 大多时候，他们只是表现出惊讶和钦佩之情而已。 |……真讨厌。”凯特恶狠狠地瞪着那只肌肉发达的黄蜂，喉间逐渐传来低沉的咕噜声。“要是你需要帮忙，就告诉我吧。 |[etheryn.lnhConfidence |我——我……哦，Lumia。 |愿卢米亚保佑——阿齐，这简直太不可思议了…… |卢米娅的胸部啊，阿齐！你真是…… ] 瑞恩一时语塞，试图找到一个恰当的词语来形容她，最终只能选择用“敬畏而又充满欲望的沉默”来表达自己的感受。 |我原本还以为这片土地已经不会再给我带来任何惊喜了……”面对这样的景象，就连清子的信心也受到了轻微的打击，更不用说在她面前出现这样一种古老的生物了。 |奎因勉强压住了自己发出的那声渴望的口哨声，但看上去还是挺受影响的。“该死的女孩，如果你想让我看看你那些肌肉的实力，直接说出来就是了。 |[viv.isDemon |我还以为呢…… 我的 这种变化真是令人惊叹……”恶魔般的薇薇轻声叹息道，“不过，她确实变得非常美丽了。 |真是的，和你们一起旅行，体验简直越来越好了…… [pc.name]看她，她…… 美丽动人." ] ] 阿齐那双发光的眼睛闪烁着光芒，她明显在努力压制自己内心的兴奋。“但是……不是在这里。 [azzy.fucked |[liaden.poly |就等着我把你和 Lia 独自占有的时候吧，到时候我们一定会把那张床拆得粉碎。 |我想和你一起毁掉一张床。 ] |等会儿还有时间闲逛呢……而且我得找一面镜子！ ]还有一堆宝藏被原封不动地留在那里，尽管这样的宝藏看起来应该很诱人吧；不过阿什肯定不会去动用它们。仿佛是在嫉妒这一事实似的，你清楚地感觉到自己腰带上那根狼牙棒的重量……但这并没有阻止阿兹兰走过去，尽可能多地捡走那些宝藏。 随着…… [pc.dcb |邪恶的笑容 |唉…… |悲伤的叹息 ]你朝着那块路标走去，准备离开这个刚刚被洗劫一空的墓穴。告诉凯娜这件事未免有些尴尬……
rows.raw: ' "Bwuh," your tongue has trouble forming words, adding yet another layer to the emotional whiplash. Azzy smiles and tilts her head to the side, wings twitching. "I'm itchy all over, and everything's fitting very differently." When she tilts her head she seems to notice the additional weight, reaching up flinching when horns meet her fingertips. "Oh." Her shaggy blonde locks hang down to her thighs now, impossibly long and glossy. Scales with the same deep shine as her chitin pattern her hips and cheeks, and the definition of her abs could grate a smaller [pc.mf |man |woman ] to powder. Her wings too, despite being made mostly of their usual shimmering membranes glow faintly to match her eyes, and are set inside the tightly-scaled and hooked frame of a dragon's own. Not even her clothing remains unchanged; the majority of the fabric has shifted in sheen and become sheer enough to see clearly through, while the armor has migrated towards her shoulders to set for an imposing mantle alongside her fuzzy hornet-fluff. Once your jaw has found a way to click shut again, you speak up. "How do you feel?" Azzy purses her glistening black lips, trailing her fingers across the scale-ridge protecting her elfin ears. "I don't... know how to put it into words. I feel incredible; everything is so tough, and tight. There's a fire inside of me and I have nowhere for it to go. It's also very difficult to be horny and sad about Miss Ashe at the same time." Her brow furrows at that. "My head feels clear, at least. Full of purpose. [azzy.fucked |Just... also I want to pin you up against the wall and fill you with eggs, and turn you into my sweet little hive-[pc.mf |husband |wife ] |[azzy.liaden |Just... also I want to pin Liaden up against a wall and fill her with eggs. I want to make her into my sweet little hive-wife |I could also use a sweet, bullyable cutie to pin against a wall and fill with eggs ] ]." [party.comp agni arona atugia brienne brint cait etheryn kiyoko quin viv |"...And here I thought I'd run out of new experiences in life," Agni mutters. |"Fucking hell, can't say I disagree with that." Arona grunts, somewhat-agape herself; seems she was watching the hornet's transformation while you were distracted. |"I— uh, wow. That is... wow." Atugia just about manages to stop herself from drooling. |"That is an incredible look for you!" Brienne looks shocked herself, poofy-tipped tail swishing around. "I wonder if your honey's changed?" |"...Damn girl, remind me to avoid the room next to yours tonight if I want to get any sleep." Brint grunts; he tries for 'reassuring', but your massive bull-boy[brint.fucked|friend] mostly just looks impressed. |"...Mnf." Cait positively eyefucks the muscular hornet, a throaty purr building up. "Let me know if you need help with that." |[etheryn.lnhConfidence |"I— I... oh Lumia." |"Lumia bless— Azzy, that's quite incredible..." |"Lumia's tits, Azzy! You're..." ] Ryn trails off, trying to think of an apt description for her, before finally settling for awed, horny silence. |"And here I had thought this land was running out of surprises for me..." Even Kiyoko's confidence takes a minor hit in the face of such shock, not to mention the passing of such an ancient creature in her presence. |Quin only just barely bites down a thirsty wolf-whistle, but he looks impressed all the same. "Damn girl, if you want to give all of that muscle a go with me, just say." |[viv.isDemon |"And here I thought my transformation was spectacular..." the demonic Viv sighs softly. "She does look gorgeous, however." |"Mnf, traveling with you only gets better and better, [pc.name]. Look at her; she's gorgeous." ] ] Azzy's luminescent eyes shimmer, and she visibly tamps down on her own enthusiasm. "But... not here. [azzy.fucked |[liaden.poly |Just wait until I have you and Lia to myself, we're going to destroy a bed. |I want to destroy a bed with you. ] |There'll be time for messing around later... and I want to find a mirror! ]" There's still a pile of treasure untouched, as grim as such a thing might be; Ashe certainly won't be using it. As though to begrudge that fact, you're keenly aware of the weight of her mace on your belt... it doesn't stop Azyrran from sauntering over and scooping up as much as she can carry. With a [pc.dcb |wicked grin |sigh |sad sigh ], you make for the waystone out of here, ready to leave behind this now 'freshly-robbed' tomb. Telling Kaina about this is going to be awkward. '

rows.translation: 下一步

rows.original: "If you're ready, princess, we can meet the dragon," you say. "Perfect," Evelyn says. "I imagine this will be quite a journey." "Actually, it'll be almost instant," you say. "It would be easier to show you than explain." "Oh? All the better. Lead the way, then," she says, standing. You escort her out of the inn and towards the center of the village, standing below the hero's statue. The pendant around your neck buzzes, and you offer Evelyn your hand. She takes it and squeezes, letting you know she's ready, and you step into the Ways Between with her. All at once you're above the village looking down on its handful of denizens scurrying to and fro, little more than ants from this distance. A pillar of light shines up from the town square, where an ancient Marcher-Baron is immortalized in stone near the steps of the church. "Gods above," Evelyn murmurs. "Is that Hawkethorne?" "It is. Stay with me, princess," you caution her. "And don't let go." "Of course not," she says, gripping your hand a little tighter. "I trust you to guide me, [pc.name]." You walk with purpose, every step bearing you across leagues as though you were a giant astride the world. The waystone outside Ashelander's cave is hardly a journey at all, and the two of you emerge in front of it having walked for what feels like a few minutes. The smell is nowhere near as bad as it was when you first opened the cave, but it lingers in the air nonetheless. "Oh," Evelyn says faintly. "She's close to death," you say. "Are you okay?" Evelyn nods after a moment. "I am fine, thank you. Let us head inside." You guide her into the secret entrance, up the stairs and to the main room. "Gods above," she whispers. You understand. Before her lies a golden dragon – diminished, true; close to death, yes; but once a gleaming bastion, a monstrous beast once thought only to exist in legend. Standing there with her, it's impossible not to imagine what Ashelander must have looked like when she was capable of soaring through the skies like an arrow, parting clouds with her passage. To see her brought so low is the cruelest thing you can think of for a noble race. Taking Evelyn's hand, you walk close enough to Ashe for her to open her bloodshot eyes and survey you. "Who have you brought to me, little one?" she mutters. Evelyn steps forward, gingerly putting a hand to Ashelander's scaled body. "My name is Evelyn," she starts, falling silent for a few moments. Then she speaks again in a clear, calm voice. "I am a princess of Yvennes, of Belhar." "A princess... of Belhar," the dragon whispers. "I remember it." "It is... not the land you doubtless recall," Evelyn says. "It lies in ruins. Scattered under a thousand meaningless banners, just crumbling fragments of an era gone by. Petty fiefdoms and minor territories ruled alike." "The eventual fate of all empires," Ashelander says, sadness tinging her voice. "But brought upon us much too soon," Evelyn says. "It was shattered by means well beyond our control." "Yes... we all lost things dear to us in the battle against the wraiths," Ashelander says. "What do you propose?" "Reunification," Evelyn says. You glance at her. That's a lofty goal. "I want to restore Belhar to its former height," she continues. "Before it slips through our hands completely to be lost in the annals of history." "You would do much with this power, child," Ashelander sighs. "Many lives have been lost in search of unification." "If there is any hope of the Belharan Heartland thriving once more, it is under a singular banner. It need not be bloody," Evelyn says. "A dragon's might speaks for itself." "You speak of coercion," the dragon murmurs. "I speak of the restoration of what was once Savarra's greatest civilization," Evelyn says. "Without the land being plunged into chaos and famine with every successor born. What I want is to get back what we had before the Godswar, before the wraiths ruined us. To bring our people back under one banner and put a stop to the meaningless infighting and suffering. To take back what the demons took from us." Ashelander stirs. She speaks after some time. "There will be conflict." "Yes," Evelyn says. "There always is when you're trying to do the right thing. There is already conflict in the heartlands, and for nothing. Petty disputes. People desperately clinging to power in their tiny fiefdom. The citizenry suffer the most." Ashelander makes a long, rattling noise it takes a couple of moments for you to recognize as a pained sigh. "You would have me grant the power of a dragon to a conqueror. [pc.name], tell me of your intentions." You meet Evelyn's gaze. You hadn't known the extent of her goal before bringing her here – but she is, as far as you can tell, noble and true in her intent. And she is your princess. Giving her the gift of power, to allow her to grasp her fate with her own hands, is the best you can do for her. "I believe in her," you say, coming to Evelyn's side. She extends a hand, sliding her arm around your waist and pulling you close. "I would trust Evelyn with my life." "I see... I see," Ashelander murmurs, closing her eyes. "You two are... ah... this does bring a measure of reassurance to my heart... very well. Come, Evelyn. Lay your hand upon the spear and swear an oath." You help Evelyn make her way up the dragon's body, the noblewoman kicking her heels off to allow herself to get proper footing to hold the weapon embedded in Ashe's side. "I, Evelyn du Trusant, do swear to restore Belhar to its former glory," Evelyn says, gripping the spear. "I will undo the damage the demons have done to our civilization and ensure they never take hold again." Her expression softens momentarily. "Are you ready?" Ashe stays silent for what feels like an eternity, barely lifting her voice in a mutter. "Yes." Evelyn nods, tightening her grasp on the spear – then hauls backward. It comes free in one mostly-smooth motion and she tumbles down Ashe's side, landing in your arms to be borne to the ground. Catching someone holding a spear is probably one of the riskier things you'll do today but all you can think about is the powerful stench of blood, the acrid tang of it filling your mouth. Ashe slowly goes limp, the dragon's scales starting to lose their remaining luster, and you're suddenly certain: she's dying. "I... didn't want to tell you, in case your resolve wavered; I'm afraid," Ashe whispers. "I'm afraid of death, and the end. The magic in that spear was basically life-support for me, keeping my heart from beating too hard..." Ashe takes a deep, shuddering breath, attempting to stand before going limp again. Evelyn falls to her knees, breathing hard as you note sweat is breaking out across her entire body. She grips the spear to steady herself. "I- I will be fine," she pants, half-walking, half-dragging herself towards the entrance of the cave. "Tend to... to Ashe." "I'm still so scared, even after the pain," Ashe confesses. "I never got to do more good deeds, to bask in the sun, to see my scales shine again..." The dragon lifts her chin, slowly and gently. "I do not wish to be gone forever. Please, the mace... my dearest and last friend's. Place it in my mouth." Ashe's bloodshot, tired eyes well up with tears. "I do not have long, and would breathe my last into it. It was truly a great work – magic runs through the veins of it." Sparing a glance for your sweating companion, you stalk up to the dragon's mouth and tug it free from her jaw, where the flanges have long been dug inside. It's a beautiful piece, whose blades are reminiscent, surprisingly, of flowering womanhood, and whose head is capped with a little pink heart gem you would call adorable if it weren't so desperately in need of a cleaning. You place the mace head into Ashe's mouth, careful not to place your hand too deeply should it be lost. Ashe heaves in a deep breath and some utterly unknown, animal fear grips you bone-deep. You're trapped like a dazzled deer, all it would take is a moment to turn you into so much scorched dust on the wind. You can only accept whatever happens next, bracing yourself. But the prophesied exhalation never comes— not for you, at least. She breathes, a long, slow, deep breath. Heat sears the flagstones around her body, turning the air to shimmering steam at the heart of a fire, and the flanged mace's head glows forge-hot. When the silence begins to fill the room, you slowly, cautiously, approach the still dragon. This time there's no inhale; she doesn't breathe in again... nor will she ever. The clang of the mace hitting the ground has you leaping out of your skin, and it rolls towards you before stopping on its flanges.
rows.translation: 如果你准备好了，公主，我们就可以去见那条龙了。” “太好了，”伊芙琳说，“我想这次旅程一定会很有趣。” “其实，过程几乎是一瞬间的，”你回答道，“直接带你去见它反而比解释起来更容易理解。哦？那更好。那你就带路吧。”她说着站了起来。 你陪她走出了客栈，朝着村庄的中心走去，最终他们来到了英雄雕像下方。你脖子上的吊坠发出了嗡嗡声，于是你伸出手，想要帮助伊芙琳。 她接过它并轻轻挤压了一下，以此表示她已经准备好了，于是你便和她一起踏入了那些神秘的道路。 转眼间，你就置身于村庄的上空，俯瞰着那些在四处奔忙的村民们——从这样的高度看去，他们简直就像一群蚂蚁罢了。 一束光芒从镇中心照射而出，在教堂的台阶旁，一位古老的马歇尔男爵被刻在石碑上，永垂不朽。 “天啊，”伊芙琳轻声说道，“那是霍克索恩吗？” “没错。公主，一定要跟我在一起。”你提醒她道。 并且千万不要放开。” “当然不会，”她说着，把手握得更紧了一些，“我相信你会引导我。 [pc.name]你步伐坚定地前行，每一步都仿佛将你带往不同的境界，就像一个屹立在世界之上的巨人。从阿舍兰德的洞穴出发，这段路程其实并不算长，你们仅仅走了几分钟，就已经走到了洞穴外的地方。那里的气味已经没有你第一次进入洞穴时那么难闻了，但依然萦绕在空气中。 哦，”伊芙琳虚弱地说道。 “她已经奄奄一息了，”你说，“你没事吧？” 过了一会儿，伊芙琳点了点头：“我没事，谢谢。我们进去吧。” 你带着她穿过秘密入口，走上楼梯，来到了主房间。 天啊，”她轻声说道。 你肯定能理解她的感受。眼前这条金龙虽然已经衰弱不堪，几乎濒临死亡，但它曾经可是令人生畏的巨兽，人们只认为它存在于传说之中。当它与她一同站在那里时，人们不禁会想象：当阿舍兰德还能像箭一般翱翔在天空中，她的身影能划破云层时，她该是多么美丽啊。而如今，这样一个高贵的种族竟落到了如此地步，这真是最残酷的事情了。 你握着伊芙琳的手，走到离阿什足够近的地方，以至于她那布满血丝的眼睛能够看清你。 “你带来了谁给我看，小家伙？”她低声说道。 伊芙琳走上前，小心翼翼地把手放在阿舍兰德的鳞片覆盖的身体上。 我的名字是伊芙琳，”她开始说道，随后沉默了片刻。接着，她用清晰而平静的声音继续说道：“我是贝哈尔的伊文尼斯公主。” “一位公主……来自贝哈尔，”龙低声说道，“我记得的。” “不过，那已经不是你记忆中的那个地方了，”伊芙琳说道，“如今那里已成废墟，被成千上万的毫无意义的旗帜所覆盖，只不过是一些早已逝去的时代的残骸罢了。那些小小的领地，都由同样的统治者来管理。 所有帝国的最终命运，”阿舍兰德说道，她的声音中带着一丝悲伤。 “但它来得太早了，”伊芙琳说，“这场灾难是由我们根本无法控制的力量造成的。” “没错……在与那些幽灵的战斗中，我们都失去了珍视的东西，”阿舍兰德继续说道，“那么，你有什么建议吗？ 重新统一，”伊芙琳说道。你瞥了她一眼。 那就是。 一个崇高的目标。 “我想让贝尔哈尔重新恢复往日的辉煌，”她继续说道，“在它彻底从我们手中溜走、消失在历史的尘埃之中之前。” “拥有这样的力量，你会做出很多事情的，孩子，”阿舍兰德叹息道，“为了实现统一，已经有许多人失去了生命。 如果贝尔哈兰内陆地区真的有重获繁荣的希望，那么这种希望必须建立在同一个旗帜之下。没有必要诉诸暴力，”伊芙琳说道，“龙的力量本身就已经足以说明一切。” “你所说的，其实就是强迫罢了，”龙低声说道。 我指的是恢复萨瓦拉曾经拥有的最辉煌的文明，”伊芙琳说道，“不要让每一位新统治者上台后，这片土地就陷入混乱与饥荒之中。我所追求的，就是恢复神战之前、那些幽灵毁掉我们之前的一切。 将我们的人民重新团结在同一个旗帜下，终结那些毫无意义的内斗与苦难，夺回那些被恶魔夺走的东西。 阿舍兰德动了动，过了一会儿才开口说道：“冲突将会发生。” “没错，”伊芙琳回答，“当你试图做正确的事情时，冲突总是不可避免的。在内地地区，现在就已经出现了各种冲突，而且这些冲突毫无意义——只是些琐碎的争端罢了。人们拼命地争夺自己那小小的领地里的权力，而受害的却是普通民众。 阿舍兰德发出了一声长长的、连续不断的声响，过了好一会儿你才意识到那其实是一声痛苦的叹息。“你竟然想让我把龙的力量赐予一个征服者。 [pc.name]请告诉我你的意图。” 你与伊芙琳对视着。在将她带到这里之前，你并不知道她的目标究竟有多么坚定——但据你所见，她的意图是高尚而真诚的。她…… 是 你的公主。赋予她力量，让她能够用自己的双手去掌握自己的命运，这才是你能为她做的最好的事。 “我相信她，”你说道，走到伊芙琳的身边。她伸出手，挽住你的腰，将你拉到自己身边。“我愿意把我的生命交给伊芙琳。 我明白了……我明白了，”阿舍兰德低声说道，闭上了眼睛。“你们两个……啊……这确实让我感到一丝安心……好吧。来吧，伊芙琳，把你的手放在那支长矛上，然后宣誓吧。” 你帮助伊芙琳爬上龙的身体，这位贵族女士脱下了高跟鞋，以便能够更好地抓住那支插在阿舍身上的武器。 我，伊芙琳·杜·特鲁桑特，郑重宣誓要让贝尔哈尔重获昔日的辉煌，”伊芙琳握紧长矛说道，“我会消除恶魔给我们文明带来的伤害，确保它们再也无法肆虐。”她的表情瞬间柔和了下来，“你准备好了吗？ 阿什沉默了仿佛永恒般漫长的时间，最终才轻轻低声说道：“是的。” 伊芙琳点了点头，紧紧握住手中的长矛，然后向后一拉——长矛几乎毫无阻碍地从手中脱落，她随之倒在阿什的身边，落在了你的怀里，随后被你抱到了地面。 抓住一个手持长矛的人，恐怕是今天你会遇到的最危险的事情之一了。但此时你满脑子想的，只有那浓重的血腥味，以及那刺鼻的气味在口中弥漫的感觉。艾希的身体逐渐变得无力，她身上的龙鳞也开始失去原有的光泽，而你突然确信了：她正在死去。 我……本来不想告诉你的，生怕你会动摇决心；我真的很害怕，”艾希轻声说道，“我害怕死亡，害怕一切的终结。那把长矛里的魔法对我来说，就像是维持生命的支柱，它让我的心跳不会过于剧烈……” 艾希深吸一口气，身体微微颤抖着，试图站起身来，但很快又软弱地倒下了。伊芙琳跪倒在地，呼吸急促，全身都冒出了汗珠。她紧紧抓住那把长矛，试图稳住自己。 我、我不会有事的，”她喘着气，半走半拖地朝着洞穴的入口走去。“请照顾好……照顾好阿什。” “即使疼痛已经过去了，我仍然非常害怕，”阿什坦白道，“我再也没有机会去做更多的好事，再也没有机会沐浴在阳光下，再也没有机会让我的鳞片重新焕发光彩。……龙缓缓而轻柔地抬起了她的下巴。‘我不想永远离开这个世界。求你，把那根权杖……我最亲密、也是最后的朋友送给我的那根权杖，放在我的嘴里吧。’阿什那双布满血丝、疲惫不堪的眼睛里噙满了泪水。‘我的时日不多了，我想在它里面咽下最后一口气。 这确实是一部杰出的作品——魔力贯穿了它的每一个细节。 你瞥了眼正在流汗的同伴，然后走到龙的嘴边，将那把长矛从它的牙缝中拔了出来——那些锋利的刃口早已深深地嵌入了龙的牙槽之中。这是一件精美的武器，它的刀刃形状令人联想到盛开的花朵，而它的矛头上还镶嵌着一颗粉红色的宝石，如果它不是急需清洗的话，你一定会觉得它非常可爱。你把那把长矛的矛头放进了艾什的嘴里，同时小心翼翼地避免把手伸得太深，以免它不小心掉进去。 艾什深深地吸了一口气，一种完全陌生的、源自野性的恐惧瞬间侵袭了你的全身。你就像一只被惊呆的鹿一样被困住了，只要再有一刻的迟疑，你就可能瞬间化为风中的灰烬。此刻，你只能接受接下来会发生的一切，做好心理准备。 但是，那预言中的呼气始终没有到来——至少对你来说没有。她深深地吸了一口气，长而缓慢。周围的花岗石在高温下变得炽热，空气在火焰的中心处变成了蒸气，而那把带有凸边的钉头锤也变得炽热得仿佛刚从熔炉中取出。 当寂静开始充满整个房间时，你小心翼翼地、慢慢地靠近那条已经静止不动的巨龙。这一次，它没有吸气；它再也没有呼吸过……也不会再呼吸了。钉头锤撞击地面的声响让你吓得魂不附体，那锤子滚向你的方向，最终在边缘停了下来。
rows.raw: ' "If you're ready, princess, we can meet the dragon," you say. "Perfect," Evelyn says. "I imagine this will be quite a journey." "Actually, it'll be almost instant," you say. "It would be easier to show you than explain." "Oh? All the better. Lead the way, then," she says, standing. You escort her out of the inn and towards the center of the village, standing below the hero's statue. The pendant around your neck buzzes, and you offer Evelyn your hand. She takes it and squeezes, letting you know she's ready, and you step into the Ways Between with her. All at once you're above the village looking down on its handful of denizens scurrying to and fro, little more than ants from this distance. A pillar of light shines up from the town square, where an ancient Marcher-Baron is immortalized in stone near the steps of the church. "Gods above," Evelyn murmurs. "Is that Hawkethorne?" "It is. Stay with me, princess," you caution her. "And don't let go." "Of course not," she says, gripping your hand a little tighter. "I trust you to guide me, [pc.name]." You walk with purpose, every step bearing you across leagues as though you were a giant astride the world. The waystone outside Ashelander's cave is hardly a journey at all, and the two of you emerge in front of it having walked for what feels like a few minutes. The smell is nowhere near as bad as it was when you first opened the cave, but it lingers in the air nonetheless. "Oh," Evelyn says faintly. "She's close to death," you say. "Are you okay?" Evelyn nods after a moment. "I am fine, thank you. Let us head inside." You guide her into the secret entrance, up the stairs and to the main room. "Gods above," she whispers. You understand. Before her lies a golden dragon – diminished, true; close to death, yes; but once a gleaming bastion, a monstrous beast once thought only to exist in legend. Standing there with her, it's impossible not to imagine what Ashelander must have looked like when she was capable of soaring through the skies like an arrow, parting clouds with her passage. To see her brought so low is the cruelest thing you can think of for a noble race. Taking Evelyn's hand, you walk close enough to Ashe for her to open her bloodshot eyes and survey you. "Who have you brought to me, little one?" she mutters. Evelyn steps forward, gingerly putting a hand to Ashelander's scaled body. "My name is Evelyn," she starts, falling silent for a few moments. Then she speaks again in a clear, calm voice. "I am a princess of Yvennes, of Belhar." "A princess... of Belhar," the dragon whispers. "I remember it." "It is... not the land you doubtless recall," Evelyn says. "It lies in ruins. Scattered under a thousand meaningless banners, just crumbling fragments of an era gone by. Petty fiefdoms and minor territories ruled alike." "The eventual fate of all empires," Ashelander says, sadness tinging her voice. "But brought upon us much too soon," Evelyn says. "It was shattered by means well beyond our control." "Yes... we all lost things dear to us in the battle against the wraiths," Ashelander says. "What do you propose?" "Reunification," Evelyn says. You glance at her. That's a lofty goal. "I want to restore Belhar to its former height," she continues. "Before it slips through our hands completely to be lost in the annals of history." "You would do much with this power, child," Ashelander sighs. "Many lives have been lost in search of unification." "If there is any hope of the Belharan Heartland thriving once more, it is under a singular banner. It need not be bloody," Evelyn says. "A dragon's might speaks for itself." "You speak of coercion," the dragon murmurs. "I speak of the restoration of what was once Savarra's greatest civilization," Evelyn says. "Without the land being plunged into chaos and famine with every successor born. What I want is to get back what we had before the Godswar, before the wraiths ruined us. To bring our people back under one banner and put a stop to the meaningless infighting and suffering. To take back what the demons took from us." Ashelander stirs. She speaks after some time. "There will be conflict." "Yes," Evelyn says. "There always is when you're trying to do the right thing. There is already conflict in the heartlands, and for nothing. Petty disputes. People desperately clinging to power in their tiny fiefdom. The citizenry suffer the most." Ashelander makes a long, rattling noise it takes a couple of moments for you to recognize as a pained sigh. "You would have me grant the power of a dragon to a conqueror. [pc.name], tell me of your intentions." You meet Evelyn's gaze. You hadn't known the extent of her goal before bringing her here – but she is, as far as you can tell, noble and true in her intent. And she is your princess. Giving her the gift of power, to allow her to grasp her fate with her own hands, is the best you can do for her. "I believe in her," you say, coming to Evelyn's side. She extends a hand, sliding her arm around your waist and pulling you close. "I would trust Evelyn with my life." "I see... I see," Ashelander murmurs, closing her eyes. "You two are... ah... this does bring a measure of reassurance to my heart... very well. Come, Evelyn. Lay your hand upon the spear and swear an oath." You help Evelyn make her way up the dragon's body, the noblewoman kicking her heels off to allow herself to get proper footing to hold the weapon embedded in Ashe's side. "I, Evelyn du Trusant, do swear to restore Belhar to its former glory," Evelyn says, gripping the spear. "I will undo the damage the demons have done to our civilization and ensure they never take hold again." Her expression softens momentarily. "Are you ready?" Ashe stays silent for what feels like an eternity, barely lifting her voice in a mutter. "Yes." Evelyn nods, tightening her grasp on the spear – then hauls backward. It comes free in one mostly-smooth motion and she tumbles down Ashe's side, landing in your arms to be borne to the ground. Catching someone holding a spear is probably one of the riskier things you'll do today but all you can think about is the powerful stench of blood, the acrid tang of it filling your mouth. Ashe slowly goes limp, the dragon's scales starting to lose their remaining luster, and you're suddenly certain: she's dying. "I... didn't want to tell you, in case your resolve wavered; I'm afraid," Ashe whispers. "I'm afraid of death, and the end. The magic in that spear was basically life-support for me, keeping my heart from beating too hard..." Ashe takes a deep, shuddering breath, attempting to stand before going limp again. Evelyn falls to her knees, breathing hard as you note sweat is breaking out across her entire body. She grips the spear to steady herself. "I- I will be fine," she pants, half-walking, half-dragging herself towards the entrance of the cave. "Tend to... to Ashe." "I'm still so scared, even after the pain," Ashe confesses. "I never got to do more good deeds, to bask in the sun, to see my scales shine again..." The dragon lifts her chin, slowly and gently. "I do not wish to be gone forever. Please, the mace... my dearest and last friend's. Place it in my mouth." Ashe's bloodshot, tired eyes well up with tears. "I do not have long, and would breathe my last into it. It was truly a great work – magic runs through the veins of it." Sparing a glance for your sweating companion, you stalk up to the dragon's mouth and tug it free from her jaw, where the flanges have long been dug inside. It's a beautiful piece, whose blades are reminiscent, surprisingly, of flowering womanhood, and whose head is capped with a little pink heart gem you would call adorable if it weren't so desperately in need of a cleaning. You place the mace head into Ashe's mouth, careful not to place your hand too deeply should it be lost. Ashe heaves in a deep breath and some utterly unknown, animal fear grips you bone-deep. You're trapped like a dazzled deer, all it would take is a moment to turn you into so much scorched dust on the wind. You can only accept whatever happens next, bracing yourself. But the prophesied exhalation never comes— not for you, at least. She breathes, a long, slow, deep breath. Heat sears the flagstones around her body, turning the air to shimmering steam at the heart of a fire, and the flanged mace's head glows forge-hot. When the silence begins to fill the room, you slowly, cautiously, approach the still dragon. This time there's no inhale; she doesn't breathe in again... nor will she ever. The clang of the mace hitting the ground has you leaping out of your skin, and it rolls towards you before stopping on its flanges. '

rows.original:
The scorching heat has stripped every speck of dust, grind, and grime from this beautiful bronze weapon, and though it had but moments ago been burning in a draconic furnace it's merely warm — almost comforting — to the touch. 
        
        You look up at Ashe's body, ready to reach a hand out to the dragon's [silly
            |snoot
            |muzzle
        ]... you're brought short by the sight of her immensity breaking down; the smell of blood fades like an afterthought, and golden dust forms on the surface of her scales. Then her scales appear to become the dust, followed by the rest of her body. There's no goodbye, only golden dust carried on a sudden draft, capturing the last ebbs of [dayNight
            |sun
            |moon
        ]light bleeding into the room.
        
        You slowly, reverently guide the mace to its resting place on your belt, turning towards the cave's mouth to see what's become of Evelyn.

rows.translation: 身处户外，确实是一种令人耳目一新的体验。茂密的绿植环绕在你的周围，风中还有细小的尘埃飘过，这一切都显得如此惬意。 而就在那里，在这一切的中央，站着艾芙琳。 她弯下腰，仍然紧握着那支长矛，将自己的连衣裙扯掉了，那件红色的衣服现在已经破烂不堪，被风吹得四处飘动。 她全身赤裸，汗如雨下，发出的呻吟声会让你不寒而栗，尽管你并不完全明白其中的原因。 [flags.AZZY_DRAGOON
        |It leaves a foul taste in your mouth, stepping around Ashlander's remains in order to scrabble for loot. You would miss it if you didn't know what you were looking for; resting in a gouged-out pit created by her scrabbling claws is a small silver charm.
        |As though it's waiting for you, a soft ring of silver clinks down from... somewhere — a shelf maybe? You don't see one though — and rolls across the floor. Well, that's convenient. Your deliciously dommy dragon-girlfriend doesn't even notice, busily cleaning her nails with a satisfied smile on her face. Hmn.
    ]
    
    You slip the ring onto the chain dangling from your greatsword, relieved to see it melt onto the chain and fit securely. Now when you give the hilt a shake it jingles pleasantly.
